label:
埃尔达蒙特性
Eldamon Features

folders.Eldamon Elemental Abilities:
艾达蒙元素能力
Eldamon Elemental Abilities
folders.Eldamon Evolution Abilities:
艾达蒙进化能力
Eldamon Evolution Abilities
folders.Eldamon Form Abilities:
艾达蒙形态能力
Eldamon Form Abilities

Wooden Sword and Shield.name: 木剑与护盾 Wooden Sword and Shield
Wooden Sword and Shield.description:
你的爪击变形为木剑与护盾的形态。这会将你的爪击徒手攻击改为刃臂徒手攻击，造成 @Damage[1d8[slashing]] 伤害，失去灵巧特性，并获得多用 P 特性；这已反映在上方的统计数据中。此外，你可以使用你的护盾臂来举起护盾，其效果如同一面木制护盾，具有 10 硬度、60 HP 与 30 的 BT。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{护盾格挡} 反应动作（），你只能用护盾臂使用它。当你刷新时，你的护盾臂会恢复其所有生命值，即使它已被摧毁。

Your claws transform into the shape of a wooden sword and shield. This changes your claw unarmed attack into a blade arm unarmed attack that deals @Damage[1d8[slashing]] damage, loses the agile trait, and gains the versatile P trait; this is already reflected in the statistics above. Additionally, you can use your shield arm to Raise a Shield, with the effects of a wooden shield with 10 Hardness, 60 HP and a BT of 30. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} reaction, which you can only use with your shield arm. When you refresh, your shield arm recovers all its Hit Points, even if it was destroyed.

Entwined Avatar.name: 纠缠化身 Entwined Avatar
Entwined Avatar.description:
你已经与体内的埃达蒙如此紧密地交织在一起，以至于你的共生力量超越了埃达蒙自身所能产生的程度。你每天可以准备第六个元素力量，可以是主动、反应或刷新。你学会一个额外的元素力量，这与您在第11等级从你的元素力量职业特性学会的力量累积。

You've become so entwined with the eldamon within that your symbiotic power exceeds what the eldamon can produce on its own. You can prepare a sixth elemental power each day, which can be active, reactive, or refresh. You learn an additional elemental power, which is cumulative with the power you learn at 11th level from your elemental power class feature.

Air's Reach.name: 空气的触及 Air's Reach
Air's Reach.description:
你以空气之翼将你的力量传递到更远的距离。你那些在一定英尺数内具有射程的空气力量，其射程额外延长50%。这对区域的体型没有效果，例如线形或锥形的长度，但确实允许你将具有射程的区域效果放置在离你更远的距离。

You carry your powers across greater distances with wings of air. Your air powers that have a range within a certain number of feet have their range extended by an additional 50%. This has no effect on the size of an area, such as the length of a line or cone, but it does allow you to place an area effect that has a range at a further distance from you.

Contingent Shroud.name: 应急裹尸布 Contingent Shroud
Contingent Shroud.description:
你已做好万全准备，用笼罩的帷幕保护你免受伤害。当你掷骰先攻时，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的 1}，直到你在战斗中的第一个回合结束为止。若你在战斗的第一轮通过相位进入战斗，此效果同样适用。

You're ready for anything with a shroud to protect you from harm. When you roll initiative, you become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded 1} until the end of your first turn in combat. This also applies if you phase into combat on the first round of combat.

Energy Flower.name: 能量花 Energy Flower
Energy Flower.description:
你围绕着一朵充满木之能量的花进行旅行（或者如果你处于进化形态，则用你的三个头来达到同样的效果）。这是一株播种在你自身空间中的植物，会随你一同移动且不会妨碍你的移动。当你首次进入战斗形态或进化形态时，这朵花会被注入能量，使你能够收获它。一旦收获，这朵花在视觉上不会消失，但它会失去能量，直到你下一次进入战斗或进化形态。

You travel entwined around a flower filled with wood energy (or use your three heads for the same effect if you're in your evolved form). This is a sowed plant in your own space that moves with you and doesn't impair your movement. When you first enter battle form or evolved form, the flower is energized, allowing you to harvest it. Once harvested, the flower doesn't visually disappear, but it loses its energy until the next time you enter battle or evolved form.

Grappling Arms.name: 擒抱臂 Grappling Arms
Grappling Arms.description:
你的众多手臂能轻易擒抱敌人，即使在使用力量攻击后也是如此。你进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple}的运动学检定获得+1环境加值，并且你用于Grapple的运动学检定不会受到带有攻击（特征）的力量所导致的多重攻击减值（它们仍会受到其他多重攻击减值影响，并且仍会提高你的多重攻击减值）。如果你处于进化形态，你进行Grapple的运动学检定所获得的环境加值提升至+2。

Your many arms can easily grapple foes, even after using power attacks. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Athletics checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple}, and your Athletics checks to Grapple don't apply the multiple attack penalty from powers with the attack trait (they still apply other multiple attack penalties, and they still increase your multiple attack penalty). If you're in your evolved form, the circumstance bonus to Athletics checks to Grapple increases to +2.

Ultimate Power.name: 终极力量 Ultimate Power
Ultimate Power.description:
Eldamon 训练师 你的 eldamon 已经达到了元素力量的巅峰，使它们获得了使用终极力量的能力。你的每个 eldamon 都会从其元素中学习一种终极力量，作为其其他力量之外的额外力量。终极力量极其强大，且其运作方式不同于其他力量。终极力量会显著改变其周围的元素能量，并在 eldamon 使用它们时大幅改变你的相位。因此，在你的任何一个 eldamon 使用终极力量后，你的所有 eldamon 在 1 小时内都无法再次使用终极力量，因为这些能量需要时间来凝聚并重塑。

元素化身 你的超越已经达到了元素力量的巅峰，使你获得了使用终极力量的能力。你从你的元素中学习一种终极力量。除了你其他已准备的元素力量之外，你每天会自动准备该终极力量。终极力量极其强大，且其运作方式不同于其他力量。终极力量会显著改变其周围的元素能量，并在你每次使用它们时从你身上汲取大量能量。因此，在使用终极力量后，你在 1 小时内无法再次使用终极力量，因为这些能量需要时间来凝聚并重塑。

Eldamon Trainer Your eldamon have achieved the pinnacle of elemental power, granting them the ability to use an ultimate power. Each of your eldamon learns one of the ultimate powers from their element, in addition to their other powers. An ultimate power is extremely powerful and doesn't work like other powers. Ultimate powers significantly alter the elemental energies around them and drastically alter your phase whenever an eldamon uses them. As such, after any of your eldamon uses an ultimate power, none of your eldamon can use an ultimate power again for 1 hour, as the energies take time to coalesce and reshape.

Elemental Avatar Your transcendence has achieved the pinnacle of elemental power, granting you the ability to use an ultimate power. You learn one of the ultimate powers from your element. You automatically prepare that ultimate power each day, in addition to your other prepared elemental powers. An ultimate power is extremely powerful and doesn't work like other powers. Ultimate powers significantly alter the elemental energies around them and take significant energy from you each time you use them. As such, after using an ultimate power, you can't use an ultimate power again for 1 hour, as the energies take time to coalesce and reshape.

Trick or Treat.name: 不给糖就捣蛋 Trick or Treat
Trick or Treat.description:
你在进行用于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} 的威吓检定时获得+1环境加值。当你在一个有敌人的方格内采集植物时，该敌人不再对你的 Demoralize 暂时免疫。

You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Intimidation checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize}. When you harvest plants in a square with a foe in it, that foe is no longer temporarily immune to your Demoralize.

Master Elemental Potency.name: 掌握元素威能 Master Elemental Potency
Master Elemental Potency.description:
你与你体内的艾达蒙之间的羁绊变得极其深厚，以至于你的力量膨胀得几乎要爆裂。你所属元素的元素力量DC的熟练度等级提升至大师。

Your bond with the eldamon within you becomes so extensive that your power swells nearly to bursting. Your proficiency rank for elemental power DCs of your element increases to master.

Light Element.name: 光元素 Light Element
Light Element.description:
光元素揭示真相，以及那些曾被隐藏或未被看见的事物。但并不存在唯一客观的真相，因此光在被弯曲或塑造成使用者意志时，也能通过揭示被扭曲的真相来误导他人。

光灵魔与元素化身运用光来揭示并强调他们选择展示给他人的真相。

关联伤害类型：火

关联特性：光

光关键术语

你会在许多光元素能力中看到以下术语。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{显映的}：光能力与效果可能会使生物获得显映的状态。显映的生物被光环绕，使其如同火炬般发光，勾勒其轮廓并使其位置显而易见。由于发光的光芒，显映的生物通常无法成为隐蔽（状态）；不过，若该生物在其他情况下本会隐形，则改为成为隐蔽（状态）。隐形且在显映的同时处于隐蔽（状态）的生物无法利用隐蔽（状态）来进行躲藏或潜行，因为光会暴露其确切位置。显映的状态不会阻止拥有掩蔽的生物进行躲藏或潜行。若某生物具备在没有掩蔽或隐蔽（状态）的情况下进行躲藏或潜行的能力（例如使用伪装），则只要光仍可见，显映的状态所带来的闪耀光芒会使其更加困难，使该生物的隐秘检定受到–4环境减值，同时其隐秘DC也会在对抗“搜索”动作时受到同样影响。原本会变为显映的笼罩的生物会改为失去其笼罩的状态，反之亦然。

其他能力

若你的元素为光，你会从“元素涌动”动作、“元素护盾”动作，以及随元素而变的元素化身专长中，获得以下能力与效果。

元素机动 当你处于移动之中时，你会以光辉闪耀，使试图阻止你的人目眩。当你移动时，使用反应动作（）或自由动作（）来对抗你的敌人，会在结算其反应动作（）或自由动作（）期间短暂目眩。

元素操控 当你使用元素操控时，你可以控制光，召来一束光并将其附着在一个生物或物体上，或让其悬浮在半空中，具有一个光戏法的效果。在GM裁量下，你也可以对光进行其他小幅调整。

元素抗力 你获得对光的防护。你获得等同于你等级一半的抗力，以对抗来自光效果的伤害，并对抗此类效果的豁免获得+1环境加值；此外，对任何会使你目眩或目盲的效果也同样如此。若你拥有“强化抗力”，该环境加值提升至+2。

元素塑形师 当你使用元素塑形师专长时，你可以比元素操控更大程度地移动并控制光。这使你能够将光扭曲并塑造成各种形态，调整它们的位置或外观，范围为20尺内至多10尺×10尺的区域。在GM裁量下，你也可以对光的形状或位置进行其他类似调整。

元素感官 光会揭示你周围隐藏的秘密。当你进入距离一件隐藏的物体、生物或暗门10尺以内时，GM会为你掷一次自动的秘密察觉检定来发现它，即使你并未进行搜索。此能力无法帮助你发现或辨识陷阱、作祟与其他危害，只适用于物体、生物与暗门。

元素护盾 若敌人的近战攻击之所以未命中，仅仅是因为元素护盾给予AC的环境加值，则护盾以光使敌人目眩，该敌人将目眩直到你下个回合结束。

元素涌动 被选择的生物获得显映的状态直到你下个回合结束。

强化机动 你可以如同光线一般以光速沿直线移动。若你以直线疾行（或若你拥有其他移动方式，则使用另一种移动方式）你可以选择以光速进行。若你如此做，生物与危害无法对你使用反应动作（）或自由动作（），除非它们能以快于光速作出反应；并且你可以沿墙壁或其他垂直表面奔跑，只要你在移动结束时停在一个能够支撑你的表面上。

The element of light reveals the truth and that which was hidden or unseen. But there is no one objective truth, and so light, when bent or shaped to the user's will, is also capable of misleading by revealing a distorted truth.

Light eldamon and elemental avatars use the light to reveal and emphasize the truth that they choose to show others.

Associated Damage Type: Fire

Associated Traits: Light

Light Key Terms

You'll see the following term in many light elemental powers.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{Limned}: Light power and effects might give a creature the limned condition. A limned creature is surrounded by light, causing it to glow like a torch, outlining it and making its position obvious. A limned creature can't normally become concealed, due to the glowing light, though if the creature would otherwise be invisible, they become concealed instead. An invisible creature concealed while limned can't use the concealed condition to Hide or Sneak, as the lights give its exact location away. The limned condition doesn't prevent a creature with cover from Hiding or Sneaking. If a creature has the ability to Hide or Sneak without cover or concealment (such as by using camouflage), the shining light from the limned condition makes that much more difficult as long as the light is visible, giving a –4 circumstance penalty to the creature's Stealth check, as well as to its Stealth DCs against the Seek action. A shrouded creature that would become limned instead loses its shrouded condition, and vice versa.

Other Abilities

If your element is light, you gain the following abilities and effects from the Elemental Surge action, the Elemental Shield action, and the elemental avatar feats that vary by element.

Elemental Locomotion When you're in motion, you shine with light, dazzling those who try to stop you. While you're moving, foes who use a reaction or free action against you are momentarily dazzled while resolving their reaction or free action.

Elemental Manipulation When you use Elemental Manipulation, you can control light, calling forth a light and attaching it to a creature or object, or letting it float in mid-air, with the effects of a light cantrip. At your GM's discretion, you can make other small adjustments to light.

Elemental Resistance You become protected against light. You gain resistance equal to half your level against damage from light effects and a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against such effects, as well as any effect that would make you dazzled or blinded. If you have Enhanced Resistances, the circumstance bonus increases to +2.

Elemental Sculptor When you use the Elemental Sculptor feat, you can move and control light to a greater extent than Elemental Manipulation. This allows you to twist and shape light into various forms, adjusting their position or appearance, in up to a 10-foot by 10-foot area within 20 feet. At the GM's discretion, you can make other similar adjustments to light's shape or position.

Elemental Senses The light reveals hidden secrets around you. When you come within 10 feet of a hidden object, creature, or secret door, the GM rolls an automatic secret Perception check for you to find it, even if you aren't Searching. This doesn't help you find or identify traps, haunts, and other hazards, only objects, creatures, and secret doors.

Elemental Shield If a foe misses their melee attack only because of the Elemental Shield's circumstance bonus to AC, the shield dazzles the foe with light, and they become dazzled until the end of your next turn.

Elemental Surge The chosen creature becomes limned until the end of your next turn.

Enhanced Locomotion You can move in a straight line with the speed of light, like a ray of light. If you Stride (or use another form of movement if you have it) in a straight line, you can choose to do so at the speed of light. If you do, creatures and hazards can't use reactions or free actions against you unless they can react faster than the speed of light, and you can run up walls or other vertical surfaces, as long as you end your movement on a surface that can support you.

Hidden Shadow.name: 隐秘阴影 Hidden Shadow
Hidden Shadow.description:
当你笼罩于黑暗中时，你能更轻易地躲藏并 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行}，钻进每一个小角落与缝隙。你从 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的} 状态获得的、用于躲藏与潜行的隐匿检定环境加值在你笼罩 1 时提升至 +2，在你笼罩 2 时为 +3，在你笼罩 3 时为 +4。

When you're shrouded in darkness, you can Hide and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} more easily, crawling into every little nook and cranny. Your circumstance bonus to Stealth checks to Hide and Sneak from the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded} condition increases to +2 when you're shrouded 1, +3 when you're shrouded 2, and +4 when you're shrouded 3.

Crimson Gullet.name: 猩红咽喉 Crimson Gullet
Crimson Gullet.description:
你体内汹涌的水能量在你准备使用高潮力量时会闪耀猩红的辉光。当你处于高潮时，你将来自狂怒循环的用于伤害掷骰的状态加值加入到你的徒手颌骨打击的伤害掷骰中。此外，若你成功通过一次 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{擒抱} 检定以将一名敌人用嘴擒抱住，则他们会因横冲直撞的水能量而受到等同于该状态加值的钝击伤害。

The raging water energy within you glows crimson when you're ready to use a high tide power. When you're in high tide, you add the status bonus to damage rolls from raging cycle to your unarmed jaws Strikes. Additionally, if you succeed at a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple} check to grab a foe in your mouth, they take an amount of bludgeoning damage equal to that status bonus from the rampaging water energy.

Invisible Hand.name: 无形之手 Invisible Hand
Invisible Hand.description:
当你因你的黑暗力量而处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐蔽}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]时，你的黑暗力量更为强大。当你因你的黑暗力量造成的@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]状态，或因你的黑暗力量制造的昏暗光照或黑暗区域，而对某个生物处于隐蔽或未被察觉时，你对该生物使用黑暗力量造成的寒冷伤害获得+2状态加值；若你在力量DC上为专家则提升至+4，若为大师则为+5，若为传奇则为+6。若你因其他原因而处于隐蔽或未被察觉（例如隐形法术），则该加值不适用。

When you're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf] due to your darkness powers, your darkness powers are more powerful. While you are hidden or undetected to a creature either due to the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN] condition from your darkness powers or due to an area of dim light or darkness from your darkness powers, you gain a +2 status bonus to cold damage with darkness powers against that creature; this increases to +4 if you're an expert in power DCs, +5 if you're a master in power DCs, and +6 if you're legendary in power DCs. This bonus doesn't apply if you're hidden or undetected for another reason (such as an invisibility spell).

Eldamon Researcher.name: 艾达蒙研究者 Eldamon Researcher
Eldamon Researcher.description:
艾达魔是无穷无尽地引人入胜的生物，有别于凡人、构装体、不死生物，甚至其他异界生物。它们体现了现实的一个横截面，而凡人族裔在至少于正常环境下，极少能看见或获得许可触及；因此，它们代表了一个理解宇宙形而上基础的独特机会！基于此以及许多其他原因，无数研究者痴迷于研究艾达魔的每一种性相，而你正是他们之中备受尊崇的一员。

你可以选择智力作为你的关键属性。你在自然技能上为受训。你可以使用你的智力调整值而非你的感知调整值，以掷骰进行自然检定来进行回忆知识。你总是可以在对抗艾达魔与元素生物的先攻中掷骰使用自然技能；若你愿意，你可以使用你的智力调整值而非你的感知调整值，并且你在进行关于艾达魔与元素生物的回忆知识的自然检定，以及在对抗艾达魔与元素生物的先攻掷骰上，获得+2环境加值。此外，你关于艾达魔与元素生物的深厚知识使你在对抗艾达魔与元素生物时的察觉检定与豁免上获得+2环境加值。最后，你获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.actions.Item.MN40EoZThRVVC66m]{我知道这个！} 动作。

Eldamon are endlessly fascinating creatures, distinct from mortals, constructs, undead, and even other extraplanar creatures. They embody a cross-section of reality that mortal ancestries can rarely see or access, at least under normal conditions, and thus they represent a unique opportunity to understand the metaphysical underpinnings of the cosmos! For this and many other reasons, countless researchers have become obsessed with studying every aspect of eldamon, and you are among their esteemed number.

You can choose Intelligence as your key attribute. You're trained in Nature. You can use your Intelligence modifier, instead of your Wisdom modifier, to roll Nature checks to Recall Knowledge. You can always roll Nature for initiative against eldamon and elementals, using your Intelligence modifier instead of your Wisdom modifier if you prefer, and you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Nature checks to Recall Knowledge about eldamon and elementals and on initiative rolls against eldamon and elementals. Furthermore, your deep knowledge about eldamon and elementals grants you a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks and saving throws against eldamon and elementals. Finally, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.actions.Item.MN40EoZThRVVC66m]{I Know This!} Action.

Triple Time.name: 三重时代 Triple Time
Triple Time.description:
三个头总比一个强，所以把一个区域力量的效果分配给你的三个头。当你在锥形、线形或爆发中使用一个造成伤害的力量，且其长度或半径至少为30英尺时，你可以改为创造三个更小的效果，每个头各一个。若如此做，你创造三条线形或锥形，其长度为原本的1/3（向下取整），或创造三个爆发，其半径为原本的1/3（向下取整）。即使一个生物处于多个锥形、线形或爆发的区域内，它仍然只承受一次该力量的效果。

Three heads are better than one, so split up an area power's effect among your three heads. When you use a damaging power in a cone, line, or burst with a length or radius of at least 30 feet, you can instead create three smaller effects, one from each head. If you do, you create three lines or cones with 1/3 the original length (rounded down) or three bursts with 1/3 the original radius (rounded down). Even if a creature is in the area of more than one of the cones, lines, or bursts, it still only takes the effects of the power once.

Rebirth.name: 重生 Rebirth
Rebirth.description:
当你将要被降至0生命值时，你会重生并再次站起。你不会被降至0生命值，而是保持在1生命值，并获得等同于你的等级的临时生命值。一旦你从重生中受益，你在[[/r 1d4 #hours]]{1d4 hours}内无法再次从中受益。

When you would be reduced to 0 Hit Points, you are reborn and rise again. Instead of being reduced to 0 Hit Points, you remain at 1 Hit Point and gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level. Once you've benefited from rebirth, you can't benefit from it again for [[/r 1d4 #hours]]{1d4 hours}.

Because I Could Not Stop for Death.name: 因为我无法为死亡停下脚步 Because I Could Not Stop for Death
Because I Could Not Stop for Death.description:
你可以在移动时用死亡能量裹住自己，而当这使你的敌人不敢阻止你时，你会获得一次速度爆发。你获得死亡元素运动能力。使用该能力进行一次 Stride 时，若至少有一名敌人选择允许你穿过其空间，你可以在你陆地速度通常允许的移动距离之外额外移动 10 英尺。

You can swathe yourself with death energy as you move, and when this dissuades your foes from stopping you, you gain a burst of speed. You gain the death elemental locomotion ability. During a Stride using that ability, if at least one foe chooses to allow you to move through its space, you can move 10 additional feet beyond the movement your land Speed would normally allow.

Slippery Eel.name: 滑溜鳗鱼 Slippery Eel
Slippery Eel.description:
你的敌人尤其难以抓住你或在你躲避他们时找到你。你在进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{脱逃} 的检定以及用于躲藏的隐匿检定时，获得+2环境加值。若你在一次脱逃检定中掷骰得到成功，则改为获得大成功或大失败。

It's especially difficult for your foes to hold onto you or find you when you're hiding from them. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} and to Stealth checks to Hide. If you roll a success on a check to Escape, you get a critical success instead.

Lost and Altered Actions.name: 失去与改变的动作 Lost and Altered Actions
Lost and Altered Actions.description:
通常情况下，当你与艾尔达蒙切换相位时你无法行动，但如果你有办法这么做，你会与艾尔达蒙共享你的动作。如果你的艾尔达蒙变为迟缓、震慑、加速，或因其他任何会改变你在每个回合开始时获得的动作的事物而受到影响，它会影响你们共享的动作；但如果你有这类状态，通常不会影响你们共享的动作（不过如果你被完全阻止行动，你就不能使用任何在你相位移出时仍能起效的特殊动作）。GM裁定任何不明确的情况。

作为玩家，你同时控制你的艾尔达蒙训练师和你的艾尔达蒙，并且除非你决定不这么做，否则两者通常被认为会合作。然而，一旦你们共享了相位，艾尔达蒙将处于控制状态，直到它放弃该相位为止。如果在谁应该行动上发生冲突，你的艾尔达蒙优先于你。这意味着如果艾尔达蒙受到一种会将他们的动作从你的控制中夺走的效果影响，例如困惑或被控制（状态），你的艾尔达蒙会使用所有共享的动作，阻止你行动，并且他们可以阻止你通过 Sudden Switch、Emergency Phase 以及类似效果来强行让他们相位移出。如果你在相位移出时处于困惑或被控制（状态），你的艾尔达蒙也可以为了你好而阻止你行动，但这种情况发生的可能性要小得多。

Normally you can't act while you've shifted phases with your eldamon, but if you have a way to do so, you share your actions with your eldamon. If your eldamon becomes slowed, stunned, quickened, or otherwise affected by something that changes the actions you gain at the start of each turn, it affects your shared actions, but if you have such a condition, it ordinarily doesn't affect your shared actions (though if you're prevented from acting entirely, you can't use any special actions that work while you're phased out). The GM resolves any situation that's unclear.

You, as the player, control both your eldamon trainer and your eldamon, and the two are generally considered to cooperate unless you decide for them not to. Once you've shared your phase, however, the eldamon is in control until it relinquishes that phase. If there's ever a conflict of who should act, your eldamon wins out over you. This means that if the eldamon comes under an effect that would take their actions out of your control, such as the confused or controlled condition, your eldamon uses all the shared actions, preventing you from acting, and they can prevent you from forcibly phasing them out via Sudden Switch, Emergency Phase, and similar effects. Your eldamon can also prevent you from acting for your own good if you're confused or controlled while phased out, but this is much less likely to occur.

Moss Cover.name: 苔藓掩蔽 Moss Cover
Moss Cover.description:
当你被植物包围时，你身上的苔藓会为你提供保护。每当你处于由植物造成的困难地形中时（包括你播种的植物），你的AC和反射豁免获得+1环境加值。

When you're surrounded by plants, the moss on your body provides you protection. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your AC and Reflex saves whenever you are in difficult terrain caused by plants, including plants you sowed.

Focused Training: Burglarious Eldamon.name: 专注训练：盗窃型艾达蒙 Focused Training: Burglarious Eldamon
Focused Training: Burglarious Eldamon.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.YiWDPrJu3OAFrnTI]{专注训练} 授予

你训练你的艾达兽朋友，以拓宽他们在各种技能上的能力。对你的每一位艾达兽朋友，为其选择成为强壮、盗窃成性、摄人心魄、灵巧、自给自足、鬼祟或骇人之一。如果你的艾达兽已经拥有你所选择的专注训练所对应的技能，则你的艾达兽改为获得另一种专注训练所对应的某个技能，作为艾达兽技能。与他们其他的艾达兽技能一样，你的艾达兽在从专注训练获得的技能上变为受训，并且该技能在第5等级提升为专家，随后在第11等级提升为大师。

  • 盗窃成性：你的艾达兽对从他人身上顺走东西情有独钟。它获得盗窃作为一项艾达兽技能，以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jDdOqFmZLwE4dblQ]{扒手} 技能专长。

注：将此特性放置到你的艾达兽角色上

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.YiWDPrJu3OAFrnTI]{Focused Training}

You train your eldamon friends to broaden their capacity for various skills. For each of your eldamon friends, choose for them to become brawny, burglarious, enthralling, nimble, self-sufficient, sneaky, or terrifying. If your eldamon already has the skill associated with the focused training you chose, your eldamon gains one of the skills associated with another focused training as an eldamon skill instead. Like their other eldamon skills, your eldamon become trained in the skill gained from focused training, and the skill increases to expert at 5th level and then to master at 11th level.

  • Burglarious: Your eldamon has a penchant for snatching things from others. They gain Thievery as an eldamon skill and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jDdOqFmZLwE4dblQ]{Pickpocket} skill feat.

Note: Place this feature on your Eldamon actors

Exploit Frailty.name: 利用弱点 Exploit Frailty
Exploit Frailty.description:
你的死亡力量对虚弱的生物更为危险。你造成笨拙与力竭（状态）持续1轮的死亡力量，改为使这些状态持续至你下个回合结束。

你用死亡力量造成的伤害获得状态加值，数值等于某个生物从你的死亡力量获得的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7] 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18] 之中数值最高者，最高为+2。若你在力量DC上为专家，你的死亡力量伤害的最大状态加值为+4。若你为大师，只要某个生物具有上述四种状态之一且数值至少为1，该状态加值就提高1，总最大为+5；若你为传奇，只要某个生物具有上述四种状态之一且数值至少为1，该状态加值总共提高2，总最大为+6。

Your death powers are more dangerous against infirm creatures. Your death powers that cause the clumsy and enfeebled condition for 1 round cause those conditions to last until the end of your next turn instead.

You gain a status bonus to damage with your death powers equal to the highest of a creature's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7], or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18] value they received from your death powers, to a maximum of +2. If you're an expert in power DCs, the maximum status bonus to damage with your death powers is +4. If you're a master, the status bonus increases by 1 as long as a creature has at least one of the listed four conditions at any value, to a total maximum of +5, and if you're legendary, the status bonus increases by a total of 2 as long as a creature has at least one of the listed four conditions at any value, to a total maximum of +6.

Shrouded Grace.name: 笼罩的优雅 Shrouded Grace
Shrouded Grace.description:
当你被黑暗笼罩时，你可以移动得更快，因为阴影会将你推向你想去的地方。当你具有@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]状态时，你的各项速度获得+10英尺的环境加值，并且当你@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak}时，你可以以你的全速度移动。

When you're shrouded in darkness, you can move faster, as the shadows push you where you want to go. While you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN] condition, you gain a +10-foot circumstance bonus to your Speeds, and you can move your full Speed when you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak}.

Camouflage.name: 伪装 Camouflage
Camouflage.description:
你可以变形为任何必要的颜色以融入你的环境。即使没有掩蔽或处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态，你也可以躲藏并@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行}。

You can transform to any color necessary to blend in with your environment. You can Hide and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} even without cover or being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}.

Manual Dexterity.name: 手动敏捷 Manual Dexterity
Manual Dexterity.description:
作为一只猴子，你比其他艾达兽拥有更高的手部敏捷。你可以执行交互动作并持握基础物体。这不会让你能够挥舞武器、盾牌或大多数手持的魔法或炼金物品，不过你可以捡起并给自己喂用药水、灵药以及类似的简单饮品。

As a monkey, you have more manual dexterity than other eldamon. You can perform Interact actions and hold basic objects. This doesn't allow you to wield weapons, shields, or most held magical or alchemical items, though you can pick up and feed yourself potions, elixirs, and similar simple potables.

Brainpower.name: 脑力 Brainpower
Brainpower.description:
多亏你拥有大脑，当你相位进入时，你能比其他埃尔达蒙更容易集中注意力于近在咫尺的威胁，从而记住更多相关信息。在战斗遭遇期间相位进入时，你可以对你正在战斗的生物进行回忆知识，并且你在这么做时获得+1环境加值。每次你使用洞见奔涌来回忆知识时，你都可以选择是由你进行回忆知识，还是由你的凡人朋友进行回忆知识。

Thanks to bring a brain, when you're phased in, you can focus more easily than other eldamon on proximal threats to remember more about them. When phased in during a combat encounter, you can Recall Knowledge about the creatures you're fighting, and you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to do so. Each time you use Rush of Insight to Recall Knowledge, you can choose whether you Recall Knowledge or your mortal friend Recalls Knowledge.

Armor Spikes.name: 护甲尖刺 Armor Spikes
Armor Spikes.description:
你全身覆盖着带甲尖刺，用以刺穿你的敌人。试图对你进行近战徒手打击或非触及的近战打击的生物（无论是否命中你）会受到 @Damage[4[piercing]] 伤害，并可进行一次针对你的力量 DC 的 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。于第19等级时，此伤害提升至 @Damage[5[piercing]] 伤害。

You are covered in armored spikes that pierce your foes. A creature that attempts a melee unarmed Strike or a non-reach melee Strike against you (whether or not it hits you) takes @Damage[4[piercing]] damage, with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save against your power DC. At 19th level, this increases to @Damage[5[piercing]] damage.

Wind Speed.name: 风 速度 Wind Speed
Wind Speed.description:
空气能量会在你使用空气力量移动时加速你。当你使用空气力量移动时，你的速度获得+10尺状态加值。若你在力量DC上为专家，则提升为+20尺状态加值；若你在力量DC上为大师，则提升为+30-尺状态加值；若你在力量DC上为传奇，则提升为+40尺状态加值。

Air energy speeds you up when using your air powers to move. You gain a +10-foot status bonus to your Speeds while moving with an air power. This increases to a +20-foot status bonus if you're an expert in power DC, a +30- foot status bonus if you're a master in power DC, and a +40-foot status bonus if you're legendary in power DC.

Electricity Element.name: 电击元素 Electricity Element
Electricity Element.description:
电元素代表着闪电与其他电能所具有的带电流动与压倒性的震击。电能艾达蒙与元素化身会积蓄电荷，以发动极其强力的攻击。

关联伤害类型：电击

关联A:特征：电击

电击关键术语

你会在几乎每个电击元素能力中看到以下术语。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{带电}：电击艾达蒙与电击元素化身可以获得带电状态。带电状态总是具有数值，从1到3。如果一个带电生物已经处于带电状态并将再次变为带电，则改为将其带电状态的数值提高1，最高至带电3。带电生物在其处于带电状态期间始终处于震慑状态。任何会移除震慑状态的效果，改为使带电状态数值降低1。大多数电击能力会提供放电选项，使带电状态降低1，以获得额外效果。带电状态持续到遭遇结束；在遭遇外获得的任何电荷都会在下一次刷新时失去。因此，电击艾达蒙与元素化身总是以未带电状态开始遭遇。若电击艾达蒙或元素化身未处于带电状态，则无法使用需要其放电的能力（或能力中的可选增益）。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{震慑}：震慑状态通常不具有数值。震慑生物带有电荷，使得电击更容易伤害它。它在对抗造成电击伤害的攻击时处于措手不及（即使只是额外的电击伤害，例如电震武器），并在对抗电击效果的强韧与反射豁免时承受–2环境减值。震慑状态通常持续至所列持续时间结束，但若该生物从非持续电击伤害的来源受到任意数量的电击伤害，则会提前结束；或者若其花费一个交互动作将电荷无害地释放，也会提前结束

其他能力

若你的元素为电击，你会从元素涌动动作、元素护盾动作，以及随元素而变化的元素化身专长中获得以下能力与效果。

元素机动你几乎能立刻像闪电一样猛冲而出，从坚固表面起步，以具有移动A:特征的单动作进行。这使你能够沿直线向任意方向（甚至竖直向上）移动，距离至多为你陆地速度的一半，且不会触发基于移动的反应动作（）。若你的目的地包含一个具有显著体型且能大量导电的物体或生物（例如铜、银或金），则你可以移动至多等同于你的陆地速度，而非陆地速度的一半。若你在无法支撑你体重的地点结束该次移动（例如半空中），你会坠落。

元素操控当你使用元素操控时，你可以控制电能与电流，转移电流或电荷。你也可以使一个相邻生物获得持续2回合的震慑状态。由GM酌情决定，你也可以对电能做出其他小幅调整。

元素抗力你的身体获得对电能涌动的防护，因为你体内的能量会偏转敌对电能。环境中的电击效果永远不会偶然击中你，但这不会保护你免受电击攻击或魔法操控的天气影响。你获得等同于你等级一半的电击伤害抗力。

元素塑形者当你使用元素塑形者专长时，你能以比元素操控更高的程度移动并控制电能。这使你能够引导显著电流，甚至将附近环境中的电能导向你选择的另一个目标。例如，若雷暴中的一道闪电（不是法术、能力或其他技能）即将击中一棵树，你可以将其改道为击中附近的一个敌人。由GM酌情决定，你也可以对电能的形状或位置进行其他类似调整。

元素感官你获得30尺范围的不精确电压感知，使你能够感知电势与电流。这不仅允许你察觉周围流动的电能，它也可能让你察觉大多数活生物，因为它们依靠电流为神经系统提供动力。然而，活生物产生的电流十分微弱，很容易隐藏在环境中各种电流之中，即使该生物并未采取针对电压感知的防范措施也是如此。另一方面，更强的电能几乎不可能对你隐藏。

元素护盾若一个敌人的近战攻击之所以未命中仅仅是因为元素护盾给予AC的环境加值，则护盾会电击该敌人，使其陷入震慑状态，直到你下个回合结束。

元素涌动被选定的生物将陷入震慑状态，直到你下个回合结束，除非其成功通过针对你能力DC的反射豁免。

强化机动你可以让元素机动的闪电冲刺在导电材料间之字形连锁，如同连锁闪电。只要你继续使用闪电冲刺并且每回合至少移动一次，即使你在半空中结束移动，你也不会坠落，直到你下个回合结束。与飞行速度不同，你可以笔直向上移动而不将该移动计为困难地形，并且你在使用闪电冲刺时仍会无视基于移动的反应动作（），但你仍只能以一系列直线进行移动。

The element of electricity represents the charging flow and overwhelming shocks of lightning and other electricity. Electric eldamon and elemental avatars build up charge in order to launch extremely powerful attacks.

Associated Damage Type: Electricity

Associated Traits: Electricity

Electricity Key Terms

You'll see the following terms in almost every electricity elemental power.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{Charged}: Electricity eldamon and electricity elemental avatars can gain the charged condition. The charged condition always has a value, from 1 to 3. If a charged creature is already charged and would become charged, they instead increase the value of their charged condition by 1 to a maximum of charged 3. A charged creature is shocked as long as it is charged. Any effect that would remove the shocked condition instead reduces the charged condition value by 1. Most electricity powers offer options to discharge, reducing the charged condition by 1, in order to gain additional effects. The charged condition lasts until the end of an encounter; any charge gained outside an encounter is lost during the next refresh. As a result, electricity eldamon and elemental avatars always begin an encounter uncharged. An electricity eldamon or elemental avatar can't use a power (or an optional benefit within a power) that requires them to discharge if they aren't charged.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{Shocked}: The shocked condition normally doesn't have a value. A shocked creature is electrically charged, making it easy for electricity to harm it. It's off-guard against attacks that deal electricity damage (even if it's only additional electricity damage, such as a shock weapon) and takes –2 circumstance penalty on Fortitude and Reflex saving throws against electricity effects. The shocked condition normally lasts for the duration listed, but it ends early if the creature takes any amount of electricity damage from a source other than persistent electricity damage, or if they spend an Interact action to discharge the electricity harmlessly

Other Abilities

If your element is electricity, you gain the following abilities and effects from the Elemental Surge action, the Elemental Shield action, and the elemental avatar feats that vary by element.

Elemental Locomotion You can jolt off like a bolt of lightning almost instantly, as a single action, which has the move trait, starting from a solid surface. This allows you to move in a straight line in any direction (even vertically), at a distance out to half your land Speed, without triggering reactions based on movement. If your destination contains an object or creature of significant size that substantially conducts electricity (such as copper, silver, or gold), you can move up to your land Speed instead of half your land Speed. If you end the movement somewhere that can't support your weight, such as in mid-air, you fall.

Elemental Manipulation When you use Elemental Manipulation, you can control electricity and electric current, diverting electric currents or electric charge. You can also give an adjacent creature the shocked condition for 2 rounds. At your GM's discretion, you can make other small adjustments to electricity.

Elemental Resistance Your body becomes protected against electric surges, as the energy within you diverts hostile electricity. Environmental electricity effects never strike you by chance, though this doesn't protect you from electric attacks or magically controlled weather. You gain resistance equal to half your level against electricity damage.

Elemental Sculptor When you use the Elemental Sculptor feat, you can move and control electricity to a greater extent than Elemental Manipulation. This allows you to channel significant electric current and even direct nearby environmental electricity to another target of your choice. For instance, if a lightning bolt from a thunderstorm (not a spell, power, or other ability) was about to hit a tree, you could divert it to a nearby foe instead. At the GM's discretion, you can make other similar adjustments to electricity's shape or position.

Elemental Senses You gain imprecise voltsense out to 30 feet, which allows you to sense electric potential and currents. Not only does it allow you to notice electric power moving around you, it can potentially allow you to notice most living creatures, as they rely on electric currents to power their nervous systems. However, the electric current from a living creature is quite small and easily hidden amidst the various currents in the environment, even if a creature isn't taking precautions against voltsense. Stronger electricity, on the other hand, is almost impossible to hide from you.

Elemental Shield If a foe misses their melee attack only because of the Elemental Shield's circumstance bonus to AC, the shield zaps the foe, and they become shocked until the end of your next turn.

Elemental Surge The chosen creature becomes shocked until the end of your next turn unless they succeed at a Reflex save against your power DC.

Enhanced Locomotion You can chain the lightning jolts from your elemental locomotion zigzagging through conductive materials like chain lightning. As long as you continue using lightning jolts to move at least once per turn, you don't fall until the end of your next turn, even if you end your movement in mid-air. Unlike a fly Speed, you can move straight up without counting the movement as difficult terrain, and you continue ignoring reactions based on movement with your lightning jolts, but you can still only move in a series of straight lines.

Elemental Effusion.name: 元素灌注 Elemental Effusion
Elemental Effusion.description:
随着时间推移，未被使用的元素能量往往会在你周围汇聚与积蓄，等待在首次释放时倾泻而出。在一次遭遇中，你第一次让你的eldamon进行相位切入之前，就在你改变相位的瞬间，与即将进行相位切入的eldamon相匹配的元素能量会不由自主地从你身上溢出。你可以引导那股能量，使其显现为一次微小的元素突袭，攻击一名敌人以造成轻微伤害并测试敌人的抗力。在战斗中，你第一次让你的eldamon进行相位切入之前，选择60尺内的一名敌人，并选择你打算相位切入的eldamon的一个关联伤害类型。该敌人必须尝试进行一次@Check[fortitude|against:eldamon-trainer]豁免，对抗你的职业DC，并产生以下效果。你可以在你的Phase Eldamon上花费一个单动作，将你正要相位切入的eldamon切换为另一只eldamon，依据你从这次溢散中获得的信息。

大成功或大失败：成功 敌人完全避开了此次溢散，不会受到任何伤害，并且你知道对方获得了大成功或大失败：成功，而且此次溢散未向你提供任何信息。

成功 该溢散对敌人造成@Damage[1[untyped]]点所选关联类型的伤害，并且该伤害也具有该eldamon元素的关联特征。你会知道这次伤害是否对敌人生效，这可能帮助你判断对方是否对该伤害类型具有抗力或免疫。

失败 如成功，但你造成@Damage[2[untyped]]点伤害。

大成功或大失败：失败 如成功，但你造成@Damage[4[untyped]]点伤害。

Elemental energy tends to pool and gather around you over time as it remains unused, waiting to spill out when first released. Just before you phase in your first eldamon during an encounter, as you alter your phase, elemental energy that matches the eldamon you intend to phase in spills out from you whether you want it to or not. You can direct that energy to manifest into a small elemental assault at a foe to deal minor damage and test the foe's resistances. Just before you phase in your first eldamon during a battle, choose a foe within 60 feet and choose an associated damage type of the eldamon you intend to phase in. The foe must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon-trainer] save against your class DC with the following effects. You can spend a single action on your Phase Eldamon to switch the eldamon you're phasing in to a different eldamon based on the information you learned from the effusion.

Critical Success The foe avoids the effusion entirely and doesn't take any damage, and you know they critically succeeded and that the effusion didn't give you any information.

Success The effusion deals @Damage[1[untyped]] damage of the associated type to the foe, which also has the associated traits of the eldamon's element. You know whether or not this damage applied to the foe, which could help you determine whether they might have resistance or immunity to that damage type.

Failure As success, but you deal @Damage[2[untyped]] damage.

Critical Failure As success, but you deal @Damage[4[untyped]] damage.

Amphibious Assault.name: 两栖突击 Amphibious Assault
Amphibious Assault.description:
你在陆地和海中都格外迅捷。尽管你是水埃尔达蒙，你的陆地速度仍为30英尺，而你的游泳速度为40英尺。此调整已包含在数据表中。

You're especially quick both on land and in the sea. Your land Speed is 30 feet, despite being a water eldamon, and your swim Speed is 40 feet. This adjustment is included in the statblock.

Elemental Powers (17th).name: 元素力量（17级） Elemental Powers (17th)
Elemental Powers (17th).description:
你再学会一个额外的元素力量，其等级必须等于或低于你的等级。

You learn one additional elemental power, which must be of your level or lower.

Dragon Soul.name: 巨龙之魂 Dragon Soul
Dragon Soul.description:
你的自信涌动，赋予你巨龙之魂以解除你的恐惧。你在对抗恐惧效果的豁免上获得+1环境加值。当你在对抗恐惧效果的意志豁免中掷骰获得成功时，改为获得大成功或大失败中的大成功。此外，每当你获得惊惧（状态）时，将其数值减少1。

Your confidence surges, granting you the soul of a dragon to dispel your fears. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against fear effects. When you roll a success at a Will save against a fear effect, you get a critical success instead. In addition, anytime you gain the frightened condition, reduce its value by 1.

Hivemind Antennae.name: 蜂巢思维触角 Hivemind Antennae
Hivemind Antennae.description:
由于你与盟友之间的联系，你的触角能捕捉到敌人的移动。除非你的所有盟友也都被夹击，否则你不会因与你同等级或更低等级的夹击生物而处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} 状态。然而，他们仍然可以帮助其盟友夹击。你也不会因与你同等级或更低等级的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} 或未被侦测到的生物而处于 off-guard 状态，除非他们对你的所有盟友都是 Hidden 或未被侦测到的。

Thanks to your connection to your allies, your antennae pick up your foes' movements. Unless all your allies are also flanked, you aren't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} to flanking creatures of your level or lower. However, they can still help their allies flank. You also aren't off-guard to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} or undetected creatures of your level or lower unless they're hidden or undetected to all your allies.

Elemental Powers (13th).name: 元素力量（第13级） Elemental Powers (13th)
Elemental Powers (13th).description:
你学会一个额外的元素力量，必须是你的等级或更低。

You learn one additional elemental power, which must be of your level or lower.

Mirrored Rebound.name: 镜像反弹 Mirrored Rebound
Mirrored Rebound.description:
当敌人的魔法完全未命中你时，你使用储存的光能量将魔法反弹回他们身上。只要你的镜子中储存着光能量，当一名敌人以法术或力量对你进行的攻击掷骰大失败时，他们必须以相同的调整值对自己重骰该次攻击掷骰。若他们命中，他们便对自己造成其法术或力量的效果。这会消耗储存的光能量，其将在接下来的10分钟内恢复。

When a foe's magic misses you completely, you use your stored light energy to bounce the magic back at them. While your mirror has light energy stored up, when a foe critically fails an attack roll with a spell or power against you, they must reroll the attack roll with their same modifier against themself. If they hit, they deal the effects of their spell or power to themself. This uses the stored light energy, which returns over the course of the next 10 minutes.

Melded Phase.name: 融合相位 Melded Phase
Melded Phase.description:
当你（但不是你的艾达兽）使艾达兽进入相位时，你可以选择将你已相位化的形态与你的艾达兽融合，而不是原地生根不动。这会呈现为你选择的一种视觉形态：你可以消失在艾达兽的战斗形态之中，看起来仿佛骑乘在艾达兽上，或采取不同的形态。无论你如何呈现，你都会与已回相位的艾达兽一同行动；当你回相位时，你会在与你的艾达兽已相位化时相同的位置回相位。

When you (but not your eldamon) Phase Eldamon, instead of becoming rooted in place, you can choose to meld your phased out form with your eldamon. This takes a visual form of your choice: you can disappear inside the eldamon's battle form, appear as if mounted on the eldamon, or take a different form. However you appear, you move alongside your phased in eldamon, and when you phase back in, you do so in the same position where your eldamon phased out.

Breathtaker.name: 夺息者 Breathtaker
Breathtaker.description:
当你的死亡力量杀死一名敌人时，你会被他们临终的吐息所激励。你在察觉检定、豁免和技能检定上获得+1状态加值，持续到你下个回合结束为止。如果你在享受该加值期间对该敌人使用 Reap Lives，或者你用 Reap Lives 杀死一名生物，则该状态加值提高至+2。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.6r7lJqvKO3mSeVUy]{效果: Breathtaker}

When your death power kills a foe, you're energized by their dying breath. You gain a +1 status bonus on Perception checks, saving throws, and skill checks until the end of your next turn. If you use Reap Lives on that foe while benefiting for this bonus, or if you kill a creature with Reap Lives, the status bonus increases to +2.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.6r7lJqvKO3mSeVUy]{Effect: Breathtaker}

Inner Senses.name: 内在感官 Inner Senses
Inner Senses.description:
由于你花费了如此多的时代进行自我审视，你也学会了如何留意周围的事物。你的察觉熟练度等级提升至大师。

By spending so much time looking within yourself, you've learned how to notice things around you as well. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to master.

Weapon Specialization.name: 武器专精 Weapon Specialization
Weapon Specialization.description:
你已经学会如何用你最擅长的武器造成更严重的伤害。你在自己为专家的武器和徒手攻击中额外造成 2 点伤害。若你为大师，此伤害提高至 3 点；若你为传奇，则提高至 4 点。

You've learned how to inflict greater injuries with the weapons you know best. You deal an additional 2 damage with weapons and unarmed attacks in which you are an expert. This damage increases to 3 if you're a master, and 4 if you're legendary.

Shrouded Power.name: 笼罩的力量 Shrouded Power
Shrouded Power.description:
当你被黑暗笼罩时，你的黑暗力量造成额外伤害。当你具有笼罩的状态时，你使用黑暗力量造成的寒冷伤害获得+1状态加值；若你在力量DC上为专家，则此加值提升至+3；若你在力量DC上为大师，则提升至+4；若你在力量DC上为传奇，则提升至+5。

When you're shrouded in darkness, your darkness powers deal additional damage. While you have the shrouded condition, you gain a +1 status bonus to cold damage with darkness powers; this increases to +3 if you're an expert in power DCs, +4 if you're a master in power DCs, and +5 if you're legendary in power DCs.

Focused Training: Enthralling Eldamon.name: 专注训练：迷魂艾达蒙 Focused Training: Enthralling Eldamon
Focused Training: Enthralling Eldamon.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.YiWDPrJu3OAFrnTI]{专注训练} 授予

你训练你的艾达兽朋友，以拓展他们在各种技能方面的能力。对你的每一只艾达兽朋友，为其选择成为强壮、善盗、魅惑、灵巧、自给自足、鬼祟或骇人之一。如果你的艾达兽已经拥有你所选专注训练所关联的技能，则你的艾达兽改为从另一种专注训练所关联的技能中获得一个，作为艾达兽技能。与他们其他的艾达兽技能一样，你的艾达兽在从专注训练获得的技能上成为受训，并在第5等级时提升为专家，随后在第11等级时提升为大师。

  • 魅惑：你的艾达兽能轻易魅惑其他生物。他们获得 表演 作为一项艾达兽技能，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.7LB00jkh6JaJr3vS]{迷人表演} 技能专长。

注：将此特性放置在你的艾达兽角色上

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.YiWDPrJu3OAFrnTI]{Focused Training}

You train your eldamon friends to broaden their capacity for various skills. For each of your eldamon friends, choose for them to become brawny, burglarious, enthralling, nimble, self-sufficient, sneaky, or terrifying. If your eldamon already has the skill associated with the focused training you chose, your eldamon gains one of the skills associated with another focused training as an eldamon skill instead. Like their other eldamon skills, your eldamon become trained in the skill gained from focused training, and the skill increases to expert at 5th level and then to master at 11th level.

  • Enthralling:Your eldamon easily enthralls other creatures. They gain Performance as an eldamon skill and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.7LB00jkh6JaJr3vS]{Fascinating Performance} skill feat.

Note: Place this feature on your Eldamon actors

Siphoning Element.name: 虹吸元素 Siphoning Element
Siphoning Element.description:
由于你的凡躯与你体内的艾达蒙之间的相互作用，你以多层面的方式与你的元素建立联系，使你能够以不同于常人的方式使用元素力量——不是将其显现出来，而是虹吸或消除元素能量。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.actions.Item.4w72ljp4eLBqeZB2]{虹吸元素} 动作。

Because of the interaction between your mortal body and the eldamon within, you relate to your element in a multifaceted way, allowing you to use elemental powers in a way different than ordinary, to siphon or nullify elemental energy rather than manifest it. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.actions.Item.4w72ljp4eLBqeZB2]{Siphoning Element} action.

Protrusive Cover.name: 突出掩蔽 Protrusive Cover
Protrusive Cover.description:
你的大地力量从你体内渗出，使你能够为盟友提供额外的掩蔽。每当你在穿过你空间进行的攻击中给予盟友次等掩蔽时，你给予他们的AC获得+2环境加值，而非通常的AC获得+1环境加值。

Your earth power seeps out of you, allowing you to grant your allies additional cover. Whenever you give your allies lesser cover against an attack made through your space, you grant them a +2 circumstance bonus to AC instead of the usual +1 circumstance bonus to AC.

Resistant Shell.name: 抗性甲壳 Resistant Shell
Resistant Shell.description:
你拥有一层具备电抗性的能量外壳，使你能够安全地储存电荷。当你因自身的元素力量而处于 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{带电} 时，你不会变为 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{震慑}，且你不会因那些会移除震慑状态的效果而降低你的带电状态。

You have an outer shell of energy that's electrically resistant, allowing you to safely store charge. When you are @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{Charged} from your own elemental powers, you don't become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{Shocked}, and you don't reduce your charged condition from effects that would remove the shocked condition.

Chromatic Ridges.name: 虹彩山脊 Chromatic Ridges
Chromatic Ridges.description:
你的脊棘会根据你的情绪呈现不同的颜色，使你获得一种随机能量类型的抗力。当你相位进入时，或如果你已处于相位中则在遭遇开始时，掷骰 1d8，并查阅彩虹光元素能力中的颜色与伤害类型。你的脊棘会呈现你掷出的颜色（若掷出 8，则为你选择的颜色），并使你获得等同于你等级的抗力，对应于相关的伤害类型。若掷出 7，则你对力场的该抗力可与作为光艾达蒙所具有的基础抗力累加。

Your ridges take on a coloration based on your mood, granting you resistance to a random energy type. When you phase in, or at the beginning of an encounter if you're already phased in, roll 1d8 and consult the colors and damage types from the rainbow light elemental ability. Your ridges take on the color you rolled (or the color you chose if you roll an 8), and you gain resistance equal to your level to the associated damage type. On a roll of 7, this resistance to force is cumulative with your base resistance from being a light eldamon.

Apex Training.name: 巅峰训练 Apex Training
Apex Training.description:
通过共同突破极限，你与艾尔达蒙的训练取得了极佳成果，使你的艾尔达蒙伙伴能够展现惊人的力量。你的艾尔达蒙获得四次属性提升：其三个最低属性各获得一次，且其原本第二高的属性再获得一次。

你的艾尔达蒙也会在第15级时获得力量DC的宗师熟练度，并且具备学习额外一个力量的能力，不过即使你没有此职业特性，它也仍会如此。

在与艾尔达蒙训练时突破你自身的极限，也会为你带来额外益处。这使你每天可以多准备相位化一只艾尔达蒙，最多可达六只艾尔达蒙，或你的关键属性+1，以较低者为准。

By pushing past your limits together, your training with your eldamon has achieved fantastic results, allowing your eldamon friends to express incredible powers. Your eldamon gains four attribute boosts, one to each of their three lowest attributes, and one to the attribute that was originally their second-highest.

Your eldamon also gain master proficiency in power DCs at 15th level as well as the capacity to learn an additional power, although it does so even if you don't have this class feature.

Pushing past your own limits while training with your eldamon grants you additional benefits as well. This allows you to prepare to phase one more eldamon each day, to a maximum of six eldamon, or your key attribute +1, whichever is lower.

Harden Soil.name: 硬化土壤 Harden Soil
Harden Soil.description:
你对硬化大地魔法有了更强的控制力，使你对伤害略微更具抗力。当一种大地力量基于你的等级赋予你抗力或硬度时，你获得的抗力或硬度如同你的等级比正常高1级。

You have greater control over hardening earth magic, allowing you to become slightly more resistant to damage. When an earth power grants you resistance or hardness based on your level, you gain resistance or hardness as if your level was 1 higher than normal.

Rampaging.name: 横冲直撞 Rampaging
Rampaging.description:
你的电荷在敌人之中肆虐，使其在承受电击伤害后仍可能偶尔附着不散。当一名因你的元素力量而 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{震慑} 的敌人从你的元素力量受到电击伤害时，该敌人必须进行一次 @Check[type:flat|dc:5]。若成功，他们如常失去震慑状态；若失败，他们保留电荷并继续处于震慑状态。然而，这不会延长其震慑状态的持续时间。

Your electric charges rampage through your foes, allowing them to occasionally cling even after they suffer electricity damage. When a foe @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{Shocked} from your elemental powers takes electricity damage from your elemental powers, the foe must attempt a @Check[type:flat|dc:5]. On a success, they lose the shocked condition as normal, whereas on a failure, they retain the charge and remain shocked. However, this doesn't extend the duration of their shocked condition.

Tentacle Tail.name: 触手 尾巴 Tentacle Tail
Tentacle Tail.description:
你的尾巴分裂成八条触手，将其触及提高至20英尺。此外，你的陆地速度和游泳速度提高至40英尺。这些调整已包含在数据表中。

Your tail splits into eight tentacles, increasing its reach to 20 feet. Additionally, your land Speed and swim Speed increase to 40 feet. These adjustment are included in the statblock.

Amethyst Sled.name: 紫水晶雪橇 Amethyst Sled
Amethyst Sled.description:
你使用一颗心智紫水晶轻松地滑过散落的瓦砾、沙地或积雪。你无视由瓦砾、沙地或积雪造成的困难地形。

You use a mind amethyst to sled across scattered rubble, sand, or snow with ease. You ignore difficult terrain from rubble, sand, or snow.

Focused Training: Terrifying Eldamon.name: 专注训练：骇人埃达蒙 Focused Training: Terrifying Eldamon
Focused Training: Terrifying Eldamon.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.YiWDPrJu3OAFrnTI]{专注训练} 授予

你训练你的艾达兽伙伴，以拓宽他们在各种技能上的能力。对你的每一位艾达兽伙伴，选择让他们成为强壮、盗贼般、摄人心魄、灵巧、自给自足、鬼祟或骇人。若你的艾达兽已经拥有你所选择的专注训练所对应的技能，则你的艾达兽改为将另一种专注训练所对应的一项技能作为艾达兽技能来获得。与他们的其他艾达兽技能一样，你的艾达兽在从专注训练获得的技能上成为受训，并且该技能在5级时提升为专家，随后在11级时提升为大师。

  • 骇人：你的艾达兽在他们的战斗形态中可怖得令人难以理解。他们获得威吓作为艾达兽技能，以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ar2DUlvDK4LDcH9J]{快速胁迫} 技能专长。与其他将威吓作为艾达兽技能的艾达兽一样，他们也会自动获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.xQMz6eDgX75WX2ce]{威吓目光} 技能专长。

注：将此特性放置在你的艾达兽角色上

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.YiWDPrJu3OAFrnTI]{Focused Training}

You train your eldamon friends to broaden their capacity for various skills. For each of your eldamon friends, choose for them to become brawny, burglarious, enthralling, nimble, self-sufficient, sneaky, or terrifying. If your eldamon already has the skill associated with the focused training you chose, your eldamon gains one of the skills associated with another focused training as an eldamon skill instead. Like their other eldamon skills, your eldamon become trained in the skill gained from focused training, and the skill increases to expert at 5th level and then to master at 11th level.

  • Terrifying: Your eldamon is unfathomably terrifying in their battle form. They gain Intimidation as an eldamon skill and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ar2DUlvDK4LDcH9J]{Quick Coercion} skill feat. Like other eldamon with Intimidation as an eldamon skill, they also automatically gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.xQMz6eDgX75WX2ce]{Intimidating Glare} skill feat.

Note: Place this feature on your Eldamon actors

Brains in a Jar.name: 罐中之脑 Brains in a Jar
Brains in a Jar.description:
你通过罐中大脑对思维进行多重处理，使你能够优雅地失败并躲避精神效果。当你意志豁免失败时，你可以将效果转移到你的附属大脑中，以便重骰该豁免并采用更好的结果；这是一个命运效果。若你这样做，你的附属大脑将停机1小时，并且在此之前你不能再次使用此能力。

You multiprocesses thoughts through the brains in your jar, allowing you to fail gracefully and elude mental effects. When you fail a Will save, you can shunt the effects into your subsidiary brains in order to reroll the saving throw and take the better result; this is a fortune effect. If you do, your subsidiary brains are out of commission for 1 hour, and you can't use this ability again until then.

Compound Eyes.name: 复眼 Compound Eyes
Compound Eyes.description:
你那多对复眼能帮助你更容易看清事物，并传递你的视觉数据来帮助盟友避免攻击。你获得黑暗视觉，并在视觉察觉检定上获得+2环境加值。每当你@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜寻}时，你可以在两个区域进行搜寻，而不是一个；并且当你@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{搜索}时，你的搜索速度提高一倍。只要这些生物对你而言并非隐匿或未察觉，你的盟友不会因与你等级相同或更低等级的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐匿}或未察觉生物而处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}。

Your many compound eyes help you see more easily and transmit your visual data to help your allies avoid attacks. You gain darkvision and a +2 circumstance bonus to visual Perception checks. Whenever you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek}, you can Seek in two areas instead of one, and when you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search}, you Search twice as quickly. Your allies aren't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} or undetected creatures of your level or lower as long as the creatures aren't hidden or undetected to you.

Armor of Light.name: 光之护甲 Armor of Light
Armor of Light.description:
你穿着由硬化光构成的护甲。你从护甲获得的对AC的物品加值提高至+4，你的最大敏捷调整值降低至+1，并且你的速度降低至20尺（已反映在上方的属性中）。

You wear armor formed of hardened light. Your item bonus to AC from armor increases to +4, your maximum Dexterity modifier decreases to +1, and your Speed decreases to 20 feet (reflected in the statistics above).

Mental Wreath.name: 心灵花环 Mental Wreath
Mental Wreath.description:
你的头部和上半身缠绕着强大的精神能量。任何试图对你进行近战徒手打击或非触及的近战打击的生物（无论是否命中你）都会受到 @Damage[4[mental]] 伤害，并以你的力量 DC 为对抗进行一次 @Check[will|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。19级时，此伤害提升至 @Damage[5[mental]] 伤害。

Your head and upper body are wreathed with powerful mental energy. A creature that attempts a melee unarmed Strike or a non-reach melee Strike against you (whether or not it hits you) takes @Damage[4[mental]] damage, with a @Check[will|against:eldamon|basic:true] save against your power DC. At 19th level, this increases to @Damage[5[mental]] damage.

Quadruple Tails.name: 四尾 Quadruple Tails
Quadruple Tails.description:
你的尾巴分裂成四条螺旋状的尾巴，将它们的触及增加到20英尺。此外，你的四条尾巴帮助你稳住你愈发强大的紫水晶雪橇，使你能够无视地面上的所有困难地形，而不仅仅是由瓦砾、沙地或积雪造成的困难地形。

Your tails split into four spiralling tails, increasing their reach to 20 feet. Additionally, your four tails help you steady your increasingly powerful amethyst sled, allowing you ignore all difficult terrain on the ground, not just difficult terrain from rubble, sand, or snow.

Water Element.name: 水元素 Water Element
Water Element.description:
水之元素体现了激流的奔涌与恒常变化，以及潮汐的涨落往复。正如水以循环往复的方式存在，作为水的使用者，如果你学会最大化利用变化的潮汐，你就能掌控战场。

水流牵引：盟友若在范围内（或你选择将其作为目标），不会因你的水之能力而受到伤害，并且他们可以从该能力的各个成功等级中任选其一，并让该能力以相应距离移动他们。比如，若你的能力在大成功或大失败时不移动生物，成功时推动其10尺，失败时推动其20尺，大成功或大失败时推动其40尺，那么你的盟友可以选择留在原地，或被推动10、20或40尺（不过湍流过于迅疾，无法进行精确控制，因此他们不能选择介于其间的任意距离）。

潮汐变换：每当你掷骰决定先攻、在一次遭遇中刷新你的能力，或（若你是水之埃达蒙）相位进入时，选择高潮或低潮。这是你的初始潮汐。每当你使用一个水之能力时，你先获得你当前潮汐的效果，然后切换到另一种潮汐（高潮变为低潮，或低潮变为高潮）。以此方式，在你刷新并改为你偏好的潮汐之前，你会在潮汐之间交替施展能力。通常在遭遇之外你不会处于任何潮汐状态。

水下重击者：钝击类水之能力操纵的是水本身，因此即使它们涉及近战或远程攻击，在水下也不会受到减值。

关联伤害类型：钝击

关联特征：水

水关键术语

你几乎会在每一个水元素能力中看到下列术语中的一个或两个。通常，水之能力会根据你使用它时处于高潮还是低潮而具有特殊效果。

高潮：在高潮时，你的能力鲁莽地向外推涌，蓄势冲破海岸。任何时候，当一个水之能力说它会“移动”一名敌人时，若你处于高潮，则除非另有说明，你将把该敌人直接推离你。高潮能力往往造成额外伤害，但通常也会带来某种防御方面的缺点。

低潮：在低潮时，你的能力退涌回流，保护性地向你回撤。任何时候，当一个水之能力说它会“移动”一名敌人时，若你处于低潮，则除非另有说明，你将把该敌人直接拉向你。低潮能力往往将敌人拉向你，且其伤害低于高潮，但通常也会带来某种防御方面的好处。

其他能力

若你的元素为水，你会从元素涌动动作、元素护盾动作，以及随元素变化的元素化身专长中获得以下能力与效果。

元素机动你获得等同于你陆地速度的游泳速度（或反之：若你是通常没有陆地速度的水生生物），并且可以在水下呼吸（或若你是水生生物，则可以呼吸空气）。若你处于高潮，你的游泳速度获得+10尺状态加值；若你处于低潮，你的AC在对抗因你游泳时的移动而触发的反应动作（）时获得+1环境加值。

元素操控当你使用元素操控时，你可以以轻微的方式控制你周围的水，使你能够移动并过滤少量水分、在潮湿区域将空气中的水汽凝结成水、蒸发少量水，并执行由GM决定的其他类似动作。

元素抗力你的身体受到水的保护，也由水所庇护。你在对抗水效果的豁免上获得+1环境加值，并获得等于你等级一半的水伤害抗力。若你拥有强化抗力专长，你在对抗水效果的豁免上的环境加值提升至+2。

元素塑形师当你使用元素塑形师专长时，你可以塑形水，让你能够移动大量的水（至多40 Bulk），这些水位于至多20尺外，且其占据的空间不超过一个10尺×10尺×10尺的空间（距离你至多20尺）。你也可以将水的形态塑造成奇幻的形状，不过如果水没有容器盛装，当你停止塑形不久后，它就会四溅成一滩水洼。

元素感官你会注意到你周围水中的震颤。你获得波感，作为一种模糊感官，范围60尺。

元素护盾护盾在持续期间也会给予你等于你等级一半的强酸与火抗力。对于水之埃达蒙而言，对火的抗力可与其基础抗力叠加。

元素涌动你可以将所选生物推动（若你处于高潮）或拉动（若你处于低潮）10尺，除非其在对抗你能力DC的强韧豁免中成功。由于元素涌动动作并非能力，使用它不会改变你的潮汐。

强化机动通过在你周围唤起水之潮汐，你可以在陆地与空中游泳。你可以用你的游泳速度在陆地上以及进入空中进行游泳。当你如此做时，你会召来一道个人水浪，在你游泳时载着你前行。若你处于无法承载你重量的位置（例如半空中），则若你在你的回合中没有至少游泳一次，你会在该回合结束时坠落。

The element of water embodies the rush and constant change of currents and the ebb and flow of the tides. Just as water exists in a cycle, as a water user, if you learn to make the most of the changing tides, you can take control of the battlefield.

Current's Pull: Allies don't take damage from your water powers if they're in the area (or if you choose to target them), and they can choose any of the degrees of success from the power and allow the power to move them the appropriate distance. For instance, if you power doesn't move a creature on a critical success, pushes them 10 feet on a success, pushes them 20 feet on a failure, and pushes them 40 feet on a critical failure, your ally can choose to stay where they are or to be pushed 10, 20, or 40 feet (though the rushing water is too rapid for precise control, so they can't choose any distances in between).

Shifting Tides: Whenever you roll initiative, Refresh your powers in an encounter, or phase in if you're a water eldamon, choose high or low tide. This is your initial tide. Whenever you use a water power, you gain the effect of your current tide, then switch to the other tide (high tide becomes low tide, or low tide becomes high tide). In this way, you alternate your powers between the tides, until you refresh and change to whichever tide you prefer. You normally do not have a tide outside an encounter.

Underwater Bludgeoner: Bludgeoning water powers manipulate the water itself, so they don't take penalties underwater, even if they involve melee or ranged attacks.

Associated Damage Type: Bludgeoning

Associated Traits: Water

Water Key Terms

You'll see one or both of the following terms in almost every water elemental power. Typically, a water power has a special effect depending on if you are at high or low tide when you use it.

High Tide: At high tide, your powers push heedlessly outward, ready to break the shore. Any time a water power says it "moves" an enemy, if you're in high tide, you push the enemy directly away from you unless stated otherwise. High tide powers tend to deal additional damage, but they often come with a defensive drawback of some kind.

Low Tide: At low tide, your powers ebb back protectively toward you. Any time a water power says it "moves" an enemy, if you're in low tide, you pull the enemy directly toward you unless stated otherwise. Low tide powers tend to pull enemies toward you, and their damage is lower than at high tide, but they often come with a defensive benefit of some kind.

Other Abilities

If your element is water, you gain the following abilities and effects from the Elemental Surge action, the Elemental Shield action, and the elemental avatar feats that vary by element.

Elemental Locomotion You gain a swim Speed equal to your land Speed (or vice versa if you're an aquatic creature that normally doesn't have a land Speed) and can breathe underwater (or breathe air if you're an aquatic creature). If you're in high tide, you gain a +10-foot status bonus to your swim Speed, and if you're in low tide, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your AC against reactions triggered by your movement while swimming.

Elemental Manipulation When you use Elemental Manipulation, you can control water around you in minor ways, allowing you to move and filter small amounts of water, condense moisture in the air in a humid area into water, evaporate small amounts of water, and perform other similar actions as determined by the GM.

Elemental Resistance Your body is protected from and by water. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on saving throws against water effects and gain resistance equal to half your level against water damage. If you have the Enhanced Resistance feat, your circumstance bonus on saving throws against water effects increases to +2.

Elemental Sculptor When you use the Elemental Sculptor feat, you can sculpt water, allowing you to move substantial amounts of water (up to 40 Bulk) located up to 20 feet away and taking up no larger than a 10-foot by 10-foot by 10-foot space up to 20 feet. You can also sculpt the water's form into fanciful shapes, though if the water doesn't have a container, it will splash into a puddle soon after you stop sculpting it.

Elemental Senses You notice tremors in the water around you. You gain wavesense as an imprecise sense out to 60 feet.

Elemental Shield The shield also gives you resistance to acid and fire equal to half your level while it lasts. For water eldamon, the resistance to fire is cumulative with their base resistance.

Elemental Surge You can push (if you're in high tide) or pull (if you're in low tide) the chosen creature 10 feet unless they succeed at a Fortitude save against your power DC. Since the Elemental Surge action isn't a power, using it doesn't shift your tide.

Enhanced Locomotion By calling forth tides of water around you, you can swim on land and in the air. You can use your swim Speed to Swim on land and into the air. When you do, you call a personal wave of water that carries you along as you Swim. If you're in a location that can't hold your weight, such as in midair, you fall at the end of your turn if you don't Swim at least once during your turn.

Ice Element.name: 冰元素 Ice Element
Ice Element.description:
冰元素体现了冬季、冰与雪的极地寒意。因此，它专注于能冻结并阻碍敌人的力量。虽然冻结状态本身无法剥夺敌人的动作，但配合移动与站位，冰之力量可以把敌人逼入一种境地：由于移动速度降低，敌人要么被迫花费一个动作移除冰，要么就得移动两次。冰的使用者利用这种无解的局面来降低敌人的输出；他们也能学会其他把戏来惩罚那些选择保持不动的敌人，利用其较高的冻结值。

冰积累： 虽然通常情况下冻结状态不会累积，但冰系eldamon与冰元素化身可以将由自身力量造成的冻结状态累积，最大值为5，再加上其每4个等级+1（在20级时最大10）。这意味着，如果同一个元素化身先令一名敌人获得冻结2状态、接着又获得冻结3状态，那么该敌人会变为冻结5。若有两个eldamon或元素化身都在同一生物身上造成冻结状态，则这些数值不累积。

关联伤害类型： 寒冷

关联特征： 寒冷

冰关键术语

你会在几乎每个冰元素力量中看到以下术语。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结}： 冻结状态总是带有数值。一名冻结生物的身体正在缓慢结冰，导致其速度受到状态减值，数值等于–5英尺×冻结值，例如冻结4为–20英尺。一名冻结生物或与其相邻的盟友可以花费一个交互动作来移除冰，使冻结状态降低4。具有火（特征）的生物则改为使其（或其盟友的）冻结状态降低5。对冻结生物使用带有火（特征）的效果，或会造成火伤害的效果时，可以选择令该冻结生物的冻结值降低4，无论该生物是否实际受到任何火伤害。虽然冻结状态通常不会累积（如同其他状态），但冰系eldamon与元素化身具有一种特殊能力，使其能将由自身力量造成的冻结状态累积。

无手交互

规则中对于没有手的生物是否能使用交互动作存在一定模糊之处；但另一方面，如果它们不能，那些生物就不可能移除弓的大成功或大失败专精效果的效果。无论如何，就冻结状态而言，任何生物都可以采取移除冻结所需的交互动作。

其他能力

如果你的元素是冰，你会从元素涌动动作、元素护盾动作，以及随元素而变化的元素化身专长中，获得以下能力与效果。

元素机动 你冻结脚下空气中的水分，使你能在空中短暂行走，随后它会融化。行走在这条冰径上通常属于困难地形。当你从坚实表面开始进行疾行时，你可以在稀薄空气上移动，以最大45度角上升或下降；但在你的疾行动作完成后，若你不在能支撑你重量的表面上，你可以进行一个不带有移动（特征）的单动作或使用一个冰力量，然后你会坠落。

元素操控 当你使用元素操控时，你能以细微方式控制寒冷与冰，例如让一个物体降温，甚至冻结或解冻一个非常小的物体；这可能在环境高温下提供短暂缓解、让被冷却的金属略微收缩、让某些饮品更可口，等等。由你的GM裁定，你也可以进行其他类似的小幅调整。

元素抗力 你的身体逐渐适应冰川般的寒意。你受到保护，免于严酷的环境寒冷，并获得等于你等级一半的寒冷伤害抗力。若你拥有“强化抗力”专长，你也会受到保护，免于极端的环境寒冷。

元素塑形师 当你使用“元素塑形师”专长时，你能比元素操控更大程度地塑形并控制冰与雪。这使你能在区域内用冰与雪创造粗略的形状与特性，每次大致为一个10英尺×10英尺的方格，距离最远20英尺，随着时间推移可能形成更大的雕塑。由你的GM裁定，你也可以对冰、雪以及魔法寒冷区域进行其他类似调整。

元素感官 你能像看穿晴朗天空一样轻易看穿坠落的冰与雪。你能看穿暴风雪、冰暴之类的现象。它们不会妨碍你的视野，并且那些仅因这类降水而会处于隐蔽的生物，对你而言不算隐蔽。此外，你还能清晰看穿本会遮蔽另一侧事物的半透明冰层，但你无法看穿由冰或雪构成的坚实不透明墙壁。

元素护盾 若一名敌人的近战攻击之所以未命中仅是因为元素护盾对AC提供的环境加值，则护盾会冻结该敌人，使其变为冻结2。

元素涌动 被选中的生物会变为冻结2，除非其对抗你的力量DC的反射豁免成功；若成功则为冻结1。若大成功或大失败则不会冻结。

强化机动 当你冻结身下空气以支撑你的重量时，你脚下会保留一块稳定的冰平台，直到你走开为止。这使你能够在空中行走，并能随心所欲地停留在半空中。

The element of ice embodies the arctic chill of winter, ice, and snow. Thus, it focuses on powers that freeze and hamper enemies. While the frozen condition can't take away a foe's actions on its own, combined with movement and positioning, ice powers can put the foe in a position where it's forced to either spend an action removing the ice or moving twice, thanks to a reduced move speed. Ice users use these no-win situations to reduce their enemies' output, and they can learn other tricks to punish foes who choose to stay immobile, exploiting their high frozen value.

Ice Accumulation: While normally the frozen condition isn't cumulative, ice eldamon and ice elemental avatars can accumulate the frozen condition from their own powers to a maximum of 5 plus 1 for every 4 levels they have (maximum 10 at 20th level). This means that if a single elemental avatar causes a foe to gain the frozen 2 condition and then the frozen 3 condition, the foe becomes frozen 5. If two eldamon or elemental avatars both cause frozen conditions on the same creature, the values aren't cumulative.

Associated Damage Type: Cold

Associated Traits: Cold

Ice Key Terms

You'll see the following term in almost every ice elemental power.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen}: The frozen condition always has a value. A frozen creature's body is slowly freezing over, causing it to take a status penalty to its Speeds equal to –5-feet × the frozen value, for instance –20-feet for frozen 4. A frozen creature or an adjacent ally can spend an Interact action to remove the ice, reducing the frozen condition by 4. A creature with the fire trait instead reduces its (or its ally's) frozen condition by 5. A creature using an effect with the fire trait, or an effect that would deal fire damage, on a frozen creature can choose to reduce the frozen creature's frozen value by 4, whether the creature takes any fire damage or not. While the frozen condition is normally not cumulative (like other conditions), ice eldamon and elemental avatars have a special ability allowing them to accumulate the frozen condition from their own powers.

Interacting Without Hands

There is some ambiguity in the rules as to whether or not a creature without hands can use the Interact action; on the other hand, if they couldn't, it would be impossible for those creatures to remove the effect of bow critical specialization. In any case, for the purpose of the frozen condition, any creature can take the Interact action needed to remove frozen.

Other Abilities

If your element is ice, you gain the following abilities and effects from the Elemental Surge action, the Elemental Shield action, and the elemental avatar feats that vary by element.

Elemental Locomotion You freeze the water in the air beneath your feet, allowing you to momentarily walk on the air, before it thaws. Walking on this ice path is normally difficult terrain. When you Stride starting from a solid surface, you can move over thin air, ascending or descending at a maximum of a 45-degree angle, though after your Stride action is complete, if you aren't on a surface that can support your weight, you can take a single action that doesn't have the move trait or use an ice power and then you fall.

Elemental Manipulation When you use Elemental Manipulation, you can control cold and ice in minor ways, allowing you to chill an object or even freeze over or defrost a very small object, potentially providing momentary relief against environmental heat, slightly contracting chilled metal, making certain drinks tastier, and so on. At your GM's discretion, you can make other similar small adjustments.

Elemental Resistance Your body becomes accustomed to glacial chill. You are protected from severe environmental cold and gain resistance equal to half your level against cold damage. If you have the Enhanced Resistance feat, you also become protected against extreme environmental cold.

Elemental Sculptor When you use the Elemental Sculptor feat, you can sculpt and control ice and snow to a greater extent than Elemental Manipulation. This allows you to create rough shapes and features out of ice and snow in the area, roughly one 10-foot by 10-foot square at a time out to 20 feet, potentially allowing for a larger sculpture over time. At the GM's discretion, you can make other similar adjustments to ice, snow, and areas of magical cold.

Elemental Senses You can see through falling ice and snow as easily as through a clear sky. You can see through snow storms, ice storms, and the like. They don't impair your vision, and creatures who would be concealed only due to such precipitation aren't concealed to you. Additionally, you can see clearly through partially transparent sheets of ice that would otherwise conceal whatever was on the other side, but you can't see through solid opaque walls of ice or snow.

Elemental Shield If a foe misses their melee attack only because of the Elemental Shield's circumstance bonus to AC, the shield freezes the foe, and they become frozen 2.

Elemental Surge The chosen creature becomes frozen 2 unless they succeed at a Reflex save against your power DC, or frozen 1 on a success. They aren't frozen on a critical success.

Enhanced Locomotion When you freeze the air beneath you to support your weight, a stable platform of ice remains frozen beneath your feet until you step away. This allows you to walk on the air and remain in mid-air as long as you wish.

Retreat Into Strawberry.name: 撤入草莓之中 Retreat Into Strawberry
Retreat Into Strawberry.description:
以单动作，你可以撤退进你的壳中。如果你这样做，你获得对AC的+2环境加值，并且处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}状态。这些效果持续到你下个回合结束，不过你可以用单动作提前结束该效果。

As a single action, you can Retreat Into your Shell. If you do, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC and are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}. These effects last until the end of your next turn, though you can end the effect early with a single action.

Earth's Vengeance.name: 大地的复仇 Earth's Vengeance
Earth's Vengeance.description:
对你造成伤害的生物会很快遭到报应。在某个生物对你造成伤害之后，当你的大地力量对该生物造成伤害时，你获得对该力量伤害的+1状态加值，持续24小时。若你在力量DC上为专家，此加值提升至+2；若你在力量DC上为大师，提升至+3；若你在力量DC上为传奇，提升至+4。若该大地力量是在直接回应某个生物对你的攻击时造成伤害（例如 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.T5oNn3SpWhfIplFn]{Rebounding Embrace} 或 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.PGWQoYE0blIBmHP6]{Vengeful Backlash}），则该伤害的状态加值再提高2（若你在力量DC上为传奇，则最高至+6）。

Creatures who damage you find quick comeuppance. After a creature damages you, when your earth powers damage that creatures, you gain a +1 status bonus to the power's damage for 24 hours. This increases to +2 if you're an expert in power DC, +3 if you're a master in power DC, and +4 if you're legendary in power DC. If the earth power deals damage in direct response to a creature's attacks against you (such as @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.T5oNn3SpWhfIplFn]{Rebounding Embrace} or @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.PGWQoYE0blIBmHP6]{Vengeful Backlash}), the status bonus to damage increases by 2 (to a maximum of +6 if you're legendary in power DC).

Trainer's Heart.name: 训练师之心 Trainer's Heart
Trainer's Heart.description:
你的羁绊强化了你的心灵。你的意志豁免的熟练度等级提升至大师。当你在一次意志豁免中掷骰获得成功时，你改为获得大成功。

Your bonds strengthen your heart. Your proficiency rank for Will saves increases to master. When you roll a success at a Will save, you get a critical success instead.

Inner Truth.name: 内在真理 Inner Truth
Inner Truth.description:
你不会变为大型，而是你的进化形态剥去所有伪装，显露你的内在本质，将你变形为一名拥有镜面翅膀、飞行速度为40尺的超小型仙灵。

Instead of becoming Large, your evolved form peels away all pretensions and reveals your inner corner, transforming you into a Tiny fairy with mirror wings and a fly Speed of 40 feet.

Eldamon Expert.name: 埃尔达蒙专家 Eldamon Expert
Eldamon Expert.description:
在整个地区旅行并四处搜寻后，你所知的艾尔达兽数量众多，与你所获得的知识相匹配。你的艾尔达兽训练师职业 DC 的熟练度等级提升至专家。

Having traveled across the region, searching all around, the eldamon you know are legion with the knowledge that you've found. Your proficiency rank for eldamon trainer class DCs increases to expert.

Glowing Tail.name: 发光的尾巴 Glowing Tail
Glowing Tail.description:
储存在你尾巴中的辉光之光能量使你能够将你的力量与一次涌动结合。当你的尾巴正在辉光时，你可以熄灭你尾巴的辉光，以便在同一回合中使用一次元素涌动和一个元素力量，无视通常阻止你在同一回合中同时使用两者的限制。之后，需要10分钟，采集之光能量才会恢复你尾巴中的辉光。

The glowing light energy stored in your tail allows you to combine your powers with a surge. While your tail is glowing, you can put your tail's glow out in order to use an elemental surge and an elemental power in the same turn, ignoring the usual restrictions that prevent you from using both in the same turn. Afterward, it takes 10 minutes before the gathering light energy restores the glow within your tail.

Jolt Spines.name: 电击尖刺 Jolt Spines
Jolt Spines.description:
当敌人攻击大失败时，他们会打击到一道电流针状电弧，掠过你的身体并使其受到震慑。每当敌人以近战徒手攻击对你进行攻击掷骰并大失败，或相邻的敌人以任意近战攻击对你进行攻击掷骰并大失败时，他们受到 @Damage[2[electricity]] 伤害。若你在力量 DC 上为专家，该伤害提升至 4；若为大师，提升至 6；若为传奇，提升至 8。随后他们获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{震慑} 状态，持续 1 轮。

When a foe fumbles an attack, they strike a needle of electricity arcing across your body, shocking them. Whenever a foe critically fails an attack roll against you with a melee unarmed attack, or an adjacent foe critically fails any melee attack roll against you, they take @Damage[2[electricity]] damage. This damage increase to 4 if you're an expert in power DCs, 6 if you're a master in power DCs, and 8 if you're legendary in power DCs. They then become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{Shocked} for 1 round.

Prism’s Perception.name: 棱镜的察觉 Prism’s Perception
Prism’s Perception.description:
你头上的棱镜帮助精炼你周围的景象并将其折射进你的视野，使你更容易发现事物。你是察觉的专家，并且在第9等级时，你成为察觉大师。

The prism on your head helps refine the sights around you and refract them into your view, making it easy for you to spot things. You're an expert in Perception, and at 9th level, you become a master in Perception.

Double Senses.name: 双重感官 Double Senses
Double Senses.description:
即使它不可见，你的生命力复制体也会协助你的感官。你在察觉上为专家，并且在第9等级时，你在察觉上成为大师。

Even when it isn't visible, your life force duplicate assists your senses. You're an expert in Perception, and at 9th level, you become a master in Perception.

Vital Rest.name: 关键性休息 Vital Rest
Vital Rest.description:
当你进行休息时，你会以生命能量涌动。在遭遇期间，如果你整整一轮没有行动（通常是因为某种状态，例如震慑或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{瘫痪}，或者因为你延后了整整一轮直到你的原先攻再次到来），你获得等于2加上你等级的临时生命值，持续2轮。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.w3NW5RdWlA9hk7fb]{效果：生命休息}

When you take a break, you surge with vital energy. During an encounter, if you don't act for a full round (usually because of a condition such as stunned or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}, or because you Delayed for an entire round until your original initiative came again), you gain temporary Hit Points equal to 2 plus your level, which last for 2 rounds.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.w3NW5RdWlA9hk7fb]{Effect: Vital Rest}

Rainbow Banner.name: 彩虹旗帜 Rainbow Banner
Rainbow Banner.description:
从你尾巴上飘扬的彩虹旗帜能够鼓舞你的盟友。30英尺内能看见旗帜的盟友在对抗恐惧的豁免上获得+1状态加值，而你可以用单动作挥舞旗帜，以准备使用艺术学识@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{援助}一名盟友的攻击掷骰。

The rainbow banner that flies from your tail can inspire your allies. Allies within 30 feet who can see the banner gain a +1 status bonus to saving throws against fear, and you can wave the banner as a single action in order to prepare to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{Aid} an ally's attack roll using Art Lore.

Darkness Element.name: 黑暗元素 Darkness Element
Darkness Element.description:
黑暗元素代表未知的神秘，以及笼罩、遮蔽与隐藏的能力。虽然有些人觉得黑暗与未知令人恐惧而残酷，但它也能令人安心，保护人们免受光的严酷。黑暗元素也会操控形成于光亮与黑暗交界处边缘的阴影。黑暗艾达蒙与元素化身会以阴影与黑暗笼罩自身，并操控它们，以隐藏自己的行动与意图。

关联伤害类型：寒冷

关联特性：黑暗、阴影

黑暗关键术语

你会在许多黑暗元素力量中看到以下术语。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{笼罩的}：黑暗的力量与效果可能会使一个生物获得笼罩的状态。笼罩的状态总是具有数值，从1到3。被笼罩生物周围的光会依该状态的数值以及其周围的光照等级而被遮蔽。这会影响被笼罩生物的视野能力，也会影响其他生物看见被笼罩生物的能力。本质上，笼罩的状态会使被笼罩生物所处的光照等级降低若干步，降低的步数等于该状态的数值（明亮光→昏暗光，昏暗光→黑暗，黑暗→类似于4环黑暗法术的超自然黑暗），但有一项例外：在昏暗光中，笼罩的1会使生物对弱光视野而言处于隐蔽，而不是制造完全黑暗。此外，生物在进行隐匿检定以躲藏与潜行时，获得等同于其笼罩的状态数值的环境加值。处于笼罩时可以通过沉入阴影来躲藏与潜行，但在明亮区域，你的大致位置仍可能因黑暗帷幕而显而易见，就如同带着可见灵光四处潜行仍可能暴露你一样；在那种情况下，你会处于隐藏而非未察觉。一名会变为显映的被笼罩生物会改为失去其笼罩的状态，反之亦然。关于如何在笼罩的各个可能数值与各个可能光照等级下应用笼罩的状态的完整说明，请参阅以下边栏。

笼罩的完整示例

如果你不确定与笼罩的状态之间的互动，以下列出了笼罩数值与光照等级的所有可能组合。笼罩的状态是在区域光照等级之上叠加适用的；区域光照等级也可能由光亮与黑暗法术与效果所决定，但赋予笼罩的力量与能力属于具有黑暗特性的魔法效果，且可能被具有光亮特性并明确以其为目标的效果所对抗。在处理那些没有明确以笼罩状态来源为目标的光亮与黑暗效果时，先将这些效果全部应用以确定该区域真实的光照等级，然后再用笼罩来判断被笼罩生物有多@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐藏}以及其视野被笼罩到何种程度。若一名生物及其目标都处于笼罩，状态不会累积；只应用数值更高的笼罩状态的效果。

处于笼罩的3的生物无论光照等级或其他光源如何，都会被超自然黑暗所笼罩。若其拥有黑暗视觉但没有高等黑暗视觉，则其周围的一切都处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}（若其没有黑暗视觉则完全无法看见）；并且若其他生物拥有黑暗视觉但没有高等黑暗视觉，则被笼罩生物也处于隐蔽（若它们没有黑暗视觉则完全无法看见被笼罩生物）。

对于处于笼罩的2的生物，除非其处于明亮光区域，否则适用相同效果；若其处于明亮光区域，则其被普通黑暗所笼罩，并且若其拥有黑暗视觉则可正常看见，而其他生物若拥有黑暗视觉也可正常看见它。

如果该生物仅处于笼罩的1，则光照等级降低1步（对昏暗光有不同效果），因此在明亮光中，它被昏暗光所笼罩，并且除非对方拥有弱光视野或黑暗视觉，否则它处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}；它眼中的一切也会处于隐蔽，除非它拥有弱光视野或黑暗视觉。在昏暗光中，阴影加深，使它除非面对拥有黑暗视觉的生物，否则处于隐蔽；它眼中的一切也会处于隐蔽，除非它拥有黑暗视觉。在黑暗中，它被超自然黑暗所笼罩，即便对拥有黑暗视觉的生物也处于隐蔽，并且即使它拥有黑暗视觉，它眼中的一切也处于隐蔽。

笼罩敌人

当你笼罩一名敌人时，除了让敌人更难看见之外，也会让敌人更难看清。根据你的团队是否拥有弱光视野、黑暗视觉与高等黑暗视觉，仔细考虑是否选择会笼罩敌人的力量。在低等级时，如果你的团队几乎没有这些视野，你可能想避免选择会笼罩敌人的力量；而在高等级时，你可以考虑让团队整体获得黑暗视觉的选项（无论如何都是个好主意），以便利用这些力量。

其他能力

如果你的元素是黑暗，你会从元素涌动动作、元素护盾动作，以及因元素而异的元素化身专长中获得以下能力与效果。

元素移动 你移动时阴影与黑暗环绕着你，使你更容易四处潜行。由于黑暗的帮助，即使没有掩蔽或未处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，你也可以躲藏并@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行}，不过那掩藏你的不自然黑暗与阴影可能会让你暴露，因此你为此进行的隐匿检定承受–2罚值。若你拥有“传奇潜行”技能专长（或任何给予你与传奇潜行相同好处的其他能力，例如地精族裔专长“非常、非常鬼祟”），你不再承受该罚值，且改为在进行躲藏与潜行的隐匿检定时获得+2环境加值。

元素操控 当你使用元素操控时，你可以控制黑暗与阴影，略微改变它们的配置，或使你自己或一个自愿的、被你触碰的盟友获得笼罩的1，持续1回合。由GM酌情决定，你也可以对黑暗进行其他小幅调整。

元素抗性 你获得对抗黑暗与阴影的保护。你获得等同于你等级一半的抗性，用于抵御来自黑暗与阴影效果的伤害，并且对抗此类效果的豁免获得+1环境加值。若你拥有“强化抗性”，该环境加值提升为+2。

元素塑形师 当你使用元素塑形师专长时，你能比元素操控更大幅度地移动与控制黑暗与阴影。这允许你像影子木偶一样扭曲并塑造阴影，调整它们的位置或外观；范围为你20尺内、至多10尺×10尺的区域。由GM酌情决定，你也可以对黑暗与阴影的形状或位置进行其他类似调整。

元素感官 你获得高等黑暗视觉，这使你即便在极度黑暗的区域（例如来自4环黑暗法术或笼罩的3）也能清晰视物。

元素护盾 当你的元素护盾处于举起状态时，在你处于隐蔽时以你为目标所需的纯骰检定DC从5提高到6。

元素涌动 你或所选的自愿生物获得笼罩的1，直到你下个回合结束。

强化移动 你可以从一个阴影传送到另一个阴影，从一片黑暗传送到另一片黑暗。若你处于昏暗光或黑暗的区域（仅有笼罩的状态并不足够），你可以用一个单动作（具有移动与传送（特征））沉入阴影，并在30尺内另一处昏暗光或黑暗中的空间中再现。你仍需要对该空间具有效果线，但你不需要穿越其间的方格，从而能避开障碍物与有害地形，并且此移动不会触发基于移动的反应。

The element of darkness represents the mystery of the unknown and the ability to shroud, obscure, and hide. While some find the darkness and the unknown terrifying and cruel, it can also be comforting, protecting from the harshness of the light. The darkness element also manipulates the shadows that form on the edges between light and darkness. Darkness eldamon and elemental avatars shroud themselves in shadows and darkness and manipulate them to keep their movements and intentions hidden.

Associated Damage Type: Cold

Associated Traits: Darkness, Shadow

Darkness Key Terms

You’ll see the following term in many darkness elemental powers.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded}: Darkness powers and effects might give a creature the shrouded condition. The shrouded condition always has a value, from 1 to 3. The light surrounding a shrouded creature is occluded depending on the condition’s value and the level of light surrounding them. This affects the shrouded creature’s ability to see as well as other creatures’ ability to see the shrouded creature.
