Essentially the shrouded condition causes the light level to be a number of steps lower for the shrouded creature equal to the condition’s value (bright light to dim light, dim light to darkness, darkness to supernatural darkness akin to the 4th-rank darkness spell), except that shrouded 1 in dim light causes a creature to be concealed to low-light vision, rather than creating full darkness. Additionally, a creature gains a circumstance bonus on Stealth checks to Hide and Sneak equal to the shrouded condition’s value. It’s possible to Hide and Sneak while shrouded by sinking into the shadows, but in a bright area, your general position might still be obvious due to the pall of darkness, in the same way as sneaking around with a visible aura around you might still give you away; in that case, you would be hidden instead of undetected. A shrouded creature that would become limned instead loses its shrouded condition, and vice versa. For a full description of how to apply the shrouded condition for every possible value of shrouded and every possible level of lighting, see the following sidebar.

Shrouded Full Examples

If you're not sure of an interaction with the shrouded condition, the following are all possible combinations of shrouded values and light levels. The shrouded condition applies on top of the light level in the area, which could also be based on light and darkness spells and effects, but powers and abilities that grant shrouded are magical effects that have the darkness trait and can potentially be counteracted by effects with the light trait explicitly targeted against them. When it comes to light and darkness effects that don't explicitly target the source of the shrouded condition, apply all of those first to determine the true light level in the area, then use shrouded to see how well @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} the shrouded creature is and how shrouded its vision has become. If a creature and its target are both shrouded, the conditions aren't cumulative; apply only the higher valued shrouded condition's effect.

A creature that is shrouded 3 is shrouded in supernatural darkness, regardless of the light level or other light sources. If they have darkvision but not greater darkvision, everything around them is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} (and they can't see at all if they don't have darkvision), and if other creatures have darkvision but not greater darkvision, the shrouded creature is concealed (and they can't see the shrouded creature at all if they don't have darkvision).

For a creature that's shrouded 2, the same effect applies unless they are in an area of bright light, in which case they are shrouded in normal darkness and can see normally if they have darkvision and other creatures can see them normally if they have darkvision.

If the creature is only shrouded 1, the light level is one step lower (with a different effect for dim light), so in bright light, they're shrouded in dim light and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} except to creatures with low-light vision or darkvision, and everything is concealed to them unless they have low-light vision or darkvision; in dim light, the shadows deepen, causing them to be concealed except to creatures with darkvision, and everything is concealed to them unless they have darkvision; and in darkness, they're shrouded in supernatural darkness and concealed even to creatures with darkvision and everything is concealed to them even with darkvision.

Shrouding Foes

When you shroud a foe, it makes them difficult to see, in addition to making it harder for the foe to see. Think carefully about whether to choose powers that shroud foes based on whether your group has low-light vision, darkvision, and greater darkvision. At low levels, if your group doesn't have much of either, you might want to avoid the powers that shroud foes, while at higher levels, you can consider gaining darkvision options as a group (a good idea anyway) in order to take advantage of those powers.

Other Abilities

If your element is darkness, you gain the following abilities and effects from the Elemental Surge action, the Elemental Shield action, and the elemental avatar feats that vary by element.

Elemental Locomotion The shadows and darkness surround you while you move, making it easy for you to sneak around. Thanks to the darkness, you can Hide and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} even without cover or being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}, though the unnatural darkness and shadows that hide you might give you away, so you take a –2 penalty to your Stealth checks to do so. If you have the Legendary Sneak skill feat (or another ability that gives you the same benefit as Legendary Sneak, such as the goblin ancestry feat Very, Very Sneaky), you no longer take the penalty and instead gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Stealth checks to Hide and Sneak.

Elemental Manipulation When you use Elemental Manipulation, you can control darkness and shadows, slightly changing their configuration or giving yourself or a willing touched ally shrouded 1 for 1 round. At your GM's discretion, you can make other small adjustments to darkness.

Elemental Resistance You become protected against darkness and shadow. You gain resistance equal to half your level against damage from darkness and shadow effects and a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against such effects. If you have Enhanced Resistances, the circumstance bonus increases to +2.

Elemental Sculptor When you use the Elemental Sculptor feat, you can move and control darkness and shadows to a greater extent than Elemental Manipulation. This allows you to twist and shape shadows like shadow puppets, adjusting their position or appearance, in up to a 10-foot by 10-foot area within 20 feet. At the GM's discretion, you can make other similar adjustments to darkness and shadows' shape or position.

Elemental Senses You gain greater darkvision, which allows you to see clearly even in areas of extreme darkness (such as from a 4th level darkness spell or shrouded 3).

Elemental Shield While your Elemental Shield is raised, the flat check to target you when you're concealed increases from 5 to 6.

Elemental Surge You or the chosen willing creature become shrouded 1 until the end of your next turn.

Enhanced Locomotion You can transport from shadow to shadow, from patch of darkness to patch of darkness. If you're in an area of dim light or darkness (the shrouded condition isn't sufficient), as a single action, which has the move and teleportation traits, you can sink into the shadows and then reappear in another space in dim light or darkness within 30 feet. You still need line of effect to the space, but you don't need to cross the intervening squares, allowing you to avoid obstacles and hazardous terrain, and this movement doesn't trigger reactions based on movement.

Strength of the Earth.name: 大地的力量 Strength of the Earth
Strength of the Earth.description:
大地本身为你提供充溢的能量，保护你免受伤害。在一次遭遇期间，如果你在地面上开始你的回合，并且与岩石或土质表面直接接触，你获得1点临时生命值，持续到你下个回合开始。若你在力量DC上为专家，则增加为2点临时生命值；若你在力量DC上为大师，则为3点临时生命值；若你在力量DC上为传奇，则为4点临时生命值。

The earth itself provides you with overflowing energy that protects you from harm. During an encounter, if you start your turn on the ground, in direct contact with a rock or earthen surface, you gain 1 temporary Hit Point until the beginning of your next turn. This increases to 2 temporary Hit Points if you're an expert in power DC, 3 temporary Hit Points if you're a master in power DC, and 4 temporary Hit Points if you're legendary in power DC.

Enveloping Air.name: 包裹的空气 Enveloping Air
Enveloping Air.description:
你呼唤空气的精华来增大你的空气力量的区域。你可以选择让你的具有线形（区域）的空气力量将其长度增加至多10尺（例如，将一个 @Template[type:line|distance:20] 增加到 @Template[type:line|distance:30]），并让你的具有锥形、爆发与弥漫（区域）的空气力量将其长度或半径增加5尺（例如，将一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:25] 增加到 @Template[type:cone|distance:30]）。如果你在力量DC上为大师，这些提升为：线形的长度增加20尺，锥形、爆发与弥漫的长度或半径增加10尺。

You call upon the essence of air to increase the area of your air powers. You can choose for your air powers with a line area to increase their length by up to 10 feet (for instance, a @Template[type:line|distance:20] to a @Template[type:line|distance:30]), and your air powers with cone, burst, and emanation areas to increase their length or radius by 5 feet (for instance, a @Template[type:cone|distance:25] to a @Template[type:cone|distance:30]). If you're a master in power DC, these improve to 20 feet of length for lines and 10 feet of length or radius for cones, bursts, and emanations.

Life Element.name: 生命元素 Life Element
Life Element.description:
生命元素体现了诞生、治疗、重生，以及渗透于一切活生物之中的生命精粹，赋予它们本能、直觉与共同的信念。生命的使用者专注于保存与复苏，主要通过临时生命值来实现，无论面对何种威胁，都能让自己与盟友保持健康与精神焕发。

生命复涌：你的临时生命值充盈着复涌的生命能量。若某个生物拥有0生命值，并从你的生命力量获得临时生命值，则其恢复1点生命值。每小时一次，你可以选择不以你的生命力量给予临时生命值，而是改为为一个生物治疗等量的生命值；该生物随后在1小时内对这种替换暂时免疫。

关联伤害类型：活力

关联特征：活力

生命关键词

你会在数个生命元素力量中看到以下术语。

复苏：复苏效果是一种治疗效果，用于从特定的伤害来源中恢复。复苏效果往往与伤害来源同时发生，从而有效减少伤害。即使同时发生数个复苏效果，复苏效果也绝不会治疗超过该生物因关联伤害来源失去的实际生命值（非临时生命值）总量的伤害。当治疗与伤害同时发生时，它有可能阻止被治疗的生物降至0生命值并陷入昏迷；不过如果剩余伤害仍足以使其昏迷，则该治疗不会让其醒来。在不同时间点发生的复苏效果可以如常将生物从昏迷中唤醒，但即使与其他复苏效果结合使用，也仍不能治疗超过其失去的实际生命值总量。

其他能力

若你的元素为生命，则你从元素涌动动作、元素护盾动作，以及随元素而变化的元素化身专长中，获得以下能力与效果。

元素机动你可以通过一个生物的生命力传导自身，以穿过其空间来移动。以一个带有移动特征的单动作，你可以穿过一个相邻的活生物的空间（即使它是敌人），移动到任何其他与该生物相邻的空间。此移动不会触发基于移动的反应动作（）。

元素操控当你使用元素操控时，你可以向30尺内一个濒死生物送入生命之潮以稳定其状态。该生物失去濒死状态，但仍以0生命值保持昏迷。此外，只要你空出一只手，你就可以在没有医疗工具包的情况下使用医学；当你在3级时如此做，你的医学检定获得+1物品加值；9级时获得+2物品加值；17级时获得+3物品加值。若你拥有虹吸元素职业特性，你获得战地医疗技能专长，并且可以用你的生命力量来进行治疗伤口与以你的力量提供战地医疗，且无需医疗工具包；当你以这种方式使用治疗伤口与战地医疗时，在成功时，目标额外恢复等同于你等级的生命值，并且目标对战地医疗的暂时免疫仅持续1小时，而非1天。在GM酌情决定下，你可以对生命力进行其他类似的小幅调整。

元素抗力你的身体被生命能量强化，保护你免于死亡。若你在濒死时一次复苏检定失败，你的濒死状态不会增加；若你大失败，你的濒死状态仅增加1。若你拥有强化抗力专长，你在所有复苏检定上自动大成功。

元素塑形师当你使用元素塑形师专长时，你能比使用元素操控更轻易地塑形并控制生命力。你可以使用元素塑形师，以60尺射程施展任何耗费不超过两个动作的医学技能动作，或治疗伤口。

元素感官你可以感知附近活生物的生命力，以及亡灵体内的对抗之力。你获得生命感知，作为一种30尺的模糊感官。

元素护盾当护盾到期时，恢复等同于你等级一半的生命值，或你在护盾生效期间受到的伤害量，取较小者。这是一个复苏效果。

元素涌动所选生物获得等同于你等级的临时生命值，持续1轮。

强化机动你与盟友的连接使你能够从远处汲取他们的生命力，将自己带到他们身边。以一个带有移动特征的单动作，你可以短暂转化为生命能量，然后在60尺内一名盟友相邻的空间中再现。你仍需要对盟友具有效果线，并且你必须能以精确感官或以模糊生命感知侦测到他们，但你不需要穿越其间的方格，从而可以避开障碍物与有害地形，且此移动不会触发基于移动的反应动作（）。

The element of life embodies birth, healing rebirth, and the vital essence that permeates all living creatures, giving them their instincts, intuition, and collective faith. Life users focus on preservation and rejuvenation, mainly via temporary Hit Points, keeping themselves and their allies healthy and refreshed no matter the threat.

Vital Resurgence: Your temporary Hit Points are full of resurgent life energy. If a creature has 0 Hit Points and gains temporary Hit Points from your life power, they regain 1 Hit Point. Once per hour, instead of granting temporary Hit Points with your life power, you can choose to heal a creature for an equal amount of Hit Points; the creature then becomes temporarily immune to this substitution for 1 hour.

Associated Damage Type: Vitality

Associated Traits: Vitality

Life Key Terms

You'll see the following term in several life elemental powers.

Recovery: A recovery effect is a healing effect that recovers from a particular damage source. Recover effects often happen simultaneously to a damage source, effectively reducing the damage. A recovery effect can never heal more damage than the amount of actual Hit Points (not temporary Hit Points) the creature loses from the linked damage source, even if several recovery effects happen at once. When the healing is simultaneous to the damage, it can potentially prevent the healed creature from being reduced to 0 Hit Points and becoming unconscious, though if the remaining damage is still enough to knock them unconscious, the healing doesn't wake them up. Recovery effects that happen at a different timing can wake a creature from being unconscious as normal, though they still can't heal a creature more than the amount of actual Hit Points they lost, even in combination with other recovery effects.

Other Abilities

If your element is life, you gain the following abilities and effects from the Elemental Surge action, the Elemental Shield action, and the elemental avatar feats that vary by element.

Elemental Locomotion You can transmit yourself through a creature's life force in order to move through its space. As a single action, which has the move trait, you move through an adjacent living creature's space, even if they're a foe, to any other space adjacent to that creature. This movement doesn't trigger reactions based on movement.

Elemental Manipulation When you use Elemental Manipulation, you can send waves of life into a dying creature within 30 feet in order to stabilize them. The creature loses the dying condition, though it remains unconscious at 0 Hit Points. Additionally, you can use Medicine without a healer's kit as long as you have a hand free, receiving a +1 item bonus to your Medicine check when you do so at 3rd level, a +2 item bonus at 9th level, and a +3 item bonus at 17th level. If you have Siphoning Element class feature, you gain the Battle Medicine skill feat and can use your life powers to Treat Wounds and provide Battle Medicine with your powers and without a healer's kit; when you use Treat Wounds and Battle Medicine in this way, on a success the target recovers additional Hit Points equal to your level, and the target becomes temporarily immune to Battle Medicine for only 1 hour, not 1 day. At your GM's discretion, you can make other similar small adjustments to life force.

Elemental Resistance Your body becomes bolstered by life energy, protecting you from dying. If you fail a recovery check while dying, your dying condition does not increase; if you critically fail, your dying condition increases by only 1. If you have the Enhanced Resistance feat, you automatically critically succeed at all recovery checks.

Elemental Sculptor When you use the Elemental Sculptor feat, you can sculpt and control life force more easily than with Elemental Manipulation. You can use Elemental Sculptor to use any Medicine skill action that takes two actions or fewer, or Treat Wounds, at a range of 60 feet.

Elemental Senses You can sense the life force of living creatures nearby, and its counterforce within undead. You gain lifesense as an imprecise sense out to 30 feet.

Elemental Shield When the shield expires, recover Hit Points equal to half your level, or the amount of damage you took while the shield was active, whichever is less. This is a recovery effect.

Elemental Surge The chosen creature gains temporary Hit Points equal to your level for 1 round.

Enhanced Locomotion Your connection to your allies allows you to tap into their life force from a distance to bring yourself to their side. As a single action, which has the move trait, you can briefly transition into life energy and then reappear in a space adjacent to an ally within 60 feet. You still need line of effect to your ally and you either must be able to detect them with a precise sense or with imprecise lifesense, but you don't need to cross the intervening squares, allowing you to avoid obstacles and hazardous terrain, and this movement doesn't trigger reactions based on movement.

Firesight.name: 火视 Firesight
Firesight.description:
你获得烟视能力，并且你可以在60英尺内以模糊感官感知火焰，以及具有火焰（特征）的生物和效果。

You gain the smokesight ability, and you can sense fires and creatures and effects with the fire trait as an imprecise sense within 60 feet.

One Mind.name: 同一心智 One Mind
One Mind.description:
你体内的艾尔达蒙强化了你的心智。你的意志豁免的熟练度等级提升至大师。当你在意志豁免中掷骰获得成功时，你改为获得大成功。

The eldamon within bolsters your mind. Your proficiency rank for Will saves increases to master. When you roll a success at a Will save, you get a critical success instead.

Courageous Sparkle.name: 勇气闪光 Courageous Sparkle
Courageous Sparkle.description:
你体内的光在你的护甲与身体上闪烁。你的光之护甲提供的 AC 物品加值提升至 +5。在你的回合结束时，当你具有惊惧（状态）时，你会强烈闪耀，使该状态减少 2 而非 1；如果你以此方式使你的惊惧（状态）减少 2，且赋予你惊惧（状态）的生物在 30 尺内，则其会因闪光而在 1 轮内成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}。

The light within you sparkles across your armor and body. Your item bonus to AC from your armor of light increases to +5. At the end of your turn when you have the frightened condition, you sparkle mightily, and the condition reduces by 2 instead of 1; if you reduce your frightened condition by 2 in this way and the creature that gave you the frightened condition is within 30 feet, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round by the sparkles.

Legendary Skill (Eldamon).name: 传奇技能（Eldamon） Legendary Skill (Eldamon)
Legendary Skill (Eldamon).description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.1bk6y3aVnl7ROhVM]{传奇技能} 授予

你训练你的艾达兽在你选择的一项技能上成为真正的传奇。选择一项技能。你所有将所选技能作为艾达兽技能的艾达兽，在该技能上的熟练度等级从大师提升为传奇。若你拥有“专注训练”专长，且你选择的技能与该专长中的某一项专注训练相关联，则所有拥有该专注训练的艾达兽会根据你选择的技能获得一个额外的技能专长：

  • 杂技：你灵巧的艾达兽获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.gBSPbQRXdagZTUwY]{鲤鱼打挺} 技能专长。
  • 运动：你强壮的艾达兽获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.P04Hw8E6WAWARKHP]{快速攀爬} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.bFoh3267kNLk68cU]{快速游泳} 技能专长（为每个强壮的艾达兽分别选择）。
  • 威吓：你可怖的艾达兽获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.dc8X2Mbtwq6kGp7F]{惊惧撤退} 技能专长。
  • 表演：你引人入胜的艾达兽获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.4UXyMtXLaOxuH6Js]{干扰性表演} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.lFwfUvH2708rl6i3]{精湛表演者} 技能专长。
  • 隐匿：你鬼祟的艾达兽获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Imvu2RV2ggjJ2HZt]{迅捷潜行} 技能专长。
  • 生存：你自给自足的艾达兽获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Yj4mpROEjdCjQzMd]{位面生存} 技能专长。
  • 巧手：你善于行窃的艾达兽获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.IZbjUaZI5zHTd1Vp]{传奇窃贼} 技能专长。

注意：将此特性放置在你的艾达兽角色卡上

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.1bk6y3aVnl7ROhVM]{Legendary Skill}

You train your eldamon to become true legends in a skill of your choice. Choose a skill. All your eldamon with the chosen skill as an eldamon skill increase their proficiency rank in that skill from master to legendary. If you have the Focused Training feat and you choose a skill associated with one of the focused trainings from that feat, all your eldamon with that focused training gain an additional skill feat depending on the skill you chose:

  • Acrobatics: Your nimble eldamon gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.gBSPbQRXdagZTUwY]{Kip Up} skill feat.
  • Athletics: Your brawny eldamon gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.P04Hw8E6WAWARKHP]{Quick Climb} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.bFoh3267kNLk68cU]{Quick Swim} skill feat (choose for each brawny eldamon).
  • Intimidation: Your terrifying eldamon gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.dc8X2Mbtwq6kGp7F]{Terrified Retreat} skill feat.
  • Performance: Your enthralling eldamon gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.4UXyMtXLaOxuH6Js]{Distracting Performance} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.lFwfUvH2708rl6i3]{Virtuosic Performer} skill feats.
  • Stealh: Your sneaky eldamon gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Imvu2RV2ggjJ2HZt]{Swift Sneak} skill feat.
  • Survival: Your self-sufficient eldamon gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Yj4mpROEjdCjQzMd]{Planar Survival} skill feat.
  • Thievery: Your burglarious eldamon gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.IZbjUaZI5zHTd1Vp]{Legendary Thief} skill feat.

Note: Place this feature on your Eldamon actors

Plantwalker.name: 植行者 Plantwalker
Plantwalker.description:
你无视由植物和真菌造成的任何困难地形或更严重的困难地形，例如灌木、藤蔓和灌丛。即使是被魔法操纵的植物和真菌也不会阻碍你的前进。此外，你可以在由植物造成的困难地形的区域内进行躲藏并@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行}，包括你播种的植物造成的困难地形，即使它们没有提供隐蔽或掩蔽。

You ignore any difficult or greater difficult terrain caused by plants and fungi, such as bushes, vines, and undergrowth. Even plants and fungi manipulated by magic don't impede your progress. Additionally, you can Hide and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} in areas of difficult terrain caused by plants, including plants you sowed, even if they don't provide concealment or cover.

Spreading Flame.name: 蔓延之焰 Spreading Flame
Spreading Flame.description:
你的火力量会顽皮地扩散到其正常区域之外。当你使用一个具有效果区域的火力量时，选择一个与正常区域相邻的方格，将其纳入该区域。

Your fire powers spread mischievously beyond their normal area. When you use a fire power that has an area of effect, choose one square adjacent to the normal area to include in the area.

Air Element.name: 空气元素 Air Element
Air Element.description:
空气元素代表空气那轻盈多变、难以捉摸、不断流动的天性。因此，空气力量常常会让使用者在战场上四处移动，或从极远距离发动攻击。所有允许使用者 Stride 的空气力量，也都允许使用者在拥有 fly Speed 时 Fly。

关联伤害类型：挥砍

关联特征： Air

其他能力

如果你的元素是空气，你会从 Elemental Surge 动作、Elemental Shield 动作，以及随元素而变化的 elemental avatar 专长中获得以下能力与效果。

元素机动 当你使用你的空气力量时，你可以在一段 time 内进行 Fly，即使你平时无法 Fly。在使用那些“若你拥有 fly Speed 则允许你 Fly”的空气力量时，若你在坚实表面上使用该力量，你可以 Fly 至多等同于你正常的陆地速度。若你在一个无法支撑你体重的位置结束移动（例如停在半空中），你会坠落。

元素操控 当你使用 Elemental Manipulation 时，你可以以较小的方式控制空气与风，让你能够制造或平息微弱的轻风。这能在炎热温度下帮助你降温，效果类似于穿着暖天气服装；也能通过让你处于下风向而使他人更难借由 嗅觉 侦测到你（除非风正强劲地朝相反方向吹拂）等。由 GM 自行裁量，你也可以对空气与风做出其他细微调整。

元素抗力 风是你的盟友，而非你的敌人。你在对抗空气 效果 的 豁免 上获得 +1 环境加值；并且若你在该 豁免 上 掷骰 得到 成功，则改为 大成功或大失败。通常会成为 困难地形 的风对你而言不算 困难地形，而通常会成为更强的 困难地形 的风对你而言仅算标准的 困难地形。若你拥有 Enhanced Resistance 专长，你对抗空气 效果 的 环境加值 提升为 +2；通常会成为更强的 困难地形 的风对你而言完全不算 困难地形；并且若你在对抗空气 效果 的 豁免 上 掷骰 得到 大成功或大失败，则改为 失败。

元素塑形师 当你使用 Elemental Sculptor 专长时，你移动并控制空气与风的程度会高于 Elemental Manipulation。这让你能够制造足够的风，使一片 区域 对飞行者而言成为 困难地形，或令穿过该 区域 的实体远程 攻击 承受 –1 环境减值；或以类似的速度减缓风。你塑形时影响的范围大致为一个 10 尺×10 尺的方格或更小，不过风通常至多持续 1 分钟。由 GM 自行裁量，你也可以对空气与风的形状或位置做出其他类似调整。

元素感官 风会将各式各样的气味送到你这里，赋予你极其敏锐的嗅觉。你获得 嗅觉 作为一种 模糊感官，范围至 30 尺。与 嗅觉 的常规规则相同：当你处于上风向时，该 射程 通常会缩短；当你处于下风向时则会增加。

元素护盾 该 护盾 也会使你在 Reflex 豁免 上获得 +1 环境加值。

元素涌动 你 Stride 至多相当于你正常陆地速度的一半，Fly 至多相当于你正常飞行速度的一半（若你拥有该 速度），或 Step。

强化机动 你能在顺风助力下自由飞行。你始终获得等同于你陆地速度的飞行速度。

The element of air represents the breezy, capricious, constantly moving nature of air. Thus, air powers often move the user around the battlefield or attack from a great distance. All air powers that allow the user to Stride also allow the user to Fly if they have a fly Speed.

Associated Damage Type: Slashing

Associated Traits: Air

Other Abilities

If your element is air, you gain the following abilities and effects from the Elemental Surge action, the Elemental Shield action, and the elemental avatar feats that vary by element.

Elemental Locomotion When you use your air powers, you can Fly for a time, even though you can't Fly normally. While using your air powers that allow you to Fly if you have a fly Speed, if you use the power on a solid surface, you can Fly up to your normal land Speed. If you end the movement somewhere that can't support your weight, such as in mid-air, you fall.

Elemental Manipulation When you use Elemental Manipulation, you can control air and wind in minor ways, allowing you to create or calm down light breezes. This can help cool you down in hot temperatures, similarly to wearing a warm weather outfit, make it harder to detect you via scent by making you downwind (unless the wind is blowing strongly in the other direction), and the like. At your GM's discretion, you can make other small adjustments to air and wind.

Elemental Resistance The winds are your allies, never your adversaries. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on saving throws against air effects and if you roll a success on your saving throw, you get a critical success instead. Wind that would normally be difficult terrain isn't difficult terrain for you, and wind that would normally be greater difficult terrain is only standard difficult terrain for you. If you have the Enhanced Resistance feat, your circumstance bonus against air effects increases to +2, wind that would normally be greater difficult terrain isn't difficult terrain at all for you, and if you roll a critical failure on a saving throw against an air effect, you get a failure instead.

Elemental Sculptor When you use the Elemental Sculptor feat, you can move and control air and wind to a greater extent than Elemental Manipulation. This allows you to create enough wind to make an area difficult terrain for fliers or provide a –1 circumstance penalty to physical ranged attacks that move through the area, or slow down wind at a similar speed. When you sculpt, you affect roughly one 10-foot by 10-foot square or less, though the wind typically lasts 1 minute at most. At the GM's discretion, you can make other similar adjustments to air and wind's shape or position.

Elemental Senses The wind carries all sorts of scents your way, granting you an extremely keen sense of smell. You gain scent as an imprecise sense out to 30 feet. As normal for scent, the range is typically reduced when you're upwind and increased when you're downwind.

Elemental Shield The shield also grants a +1 circumstance bonus to Reflex saves.

Elemental Surge You Stride up to half your normal land Speed, fly up to half your normal fly Speed (if you have one), or Step.

Enhanced Locomotion You can fly freely with the wind at your back. You gain a fly Speed equal to your land Speed at all times.

Inner Light.name: 内在光 Inner Light
Inner Light.description:
你体内的光会在你进行一项颚部攻击时，或当另一个生物对你造成切割或穿刺时溢出，用以灼烧你的敌人。你的颚部打击额外造成 1d4 点火伤害（已反映在上方的数据中）；这额外伤害具有光亮（特征）。此外，当一个相邻的生物对你造成切割或穿刺伤害，或某个生物以近战徒手攻击对你造成切割或穿刺伤害时，他们会受到 @Damage[1d4[fire]] 伤害；该火伤害具有光亮（特征）。

The light within you spills out to sear your foes when you make a mandibles attack or when another creature cuts or pierces into you. Your mandibles Strikes deal 1d4 additional fire damage (reflected in the statistics above); this additional damage has the light trait. Additionally, when an adjacent creature deals slashing or piercing damage to you or a creature deals slashing or piercing damage to you with a melee unarmed attack, they take @Damage[1d4[fire]] damage; this fire damage has the light trait.

Firepower.name: 火力 Firepower
Firepower.description:
你的火力量燃烧得比其他人更炽烈。你使用火力量造成火伤害时获得+1状态加值；若你在力量DC上为专家，则此加值提高至+2；若你在力量DC上为大师，则提高至+3；若你在力量DC上为传奇，则提高至+4。如常规，此效果仅适用于来自该元素力量本身的火伤害，不适用于持续性火伤害。

Your fire powers burn brighter than others. You gain a +1 status bonus to fire damage with fire powers; this increases to +2 if you're an expert in power DCs, +3 if you're a master in power DCs, and +4 if you're legendary in power DCs. As normal, this applies only to fire damage from the elemental power itself, not to persistent fire damage.

Lifeguard Hair.name: 救生员发型 Lifeguard Hair
Lifeguard Hair.description:
当你濒临死亡时，你那撮红发会抵御毁灭。当你的生命值低于最大生命值的一半时，你获得对所有伤害类型的抗力1。若你在力量DC上为大师，则提升为对所有伤害类型的抗力2。

Your tufts of red hair repel destruction when you are close to death. When you have fewer than half your maximum Hit Points, you gain resistance 1 to all damage types. If you are a master in power DCs, this increases to resistance 2 to all damage types.

Flutter Jump.name: 振翅跳跃 Flutter Jump
Flutter Jump.description:
你的翅膀也许不足以飞行，但它们能帮助你跳得更远。你可以以单动作进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{High Jump} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jump}，无需助跑，且距离加倍（但这仍不允许你跳得超过你的速度）。

Your wings might not be enough to fly, but they help you jump farther. You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{High Jump} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jump} as a single action without a running start, and the distance is doubled (though this still doesn't allow you to jump farther than your Speed).

Prismatic Cloak.name: 虹光斗篷 Prismatic Cloak
Prismatic Cloak.description:
你身后飘曳的彩虹色斗篷保护你免受伤害，尤其是来自那些被你的光使其 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 的生物。你获得抗力 5，以抵御被你的光力量目眩的生物造成的物理伤害。该抗力在等级 18 时提升至 6。

The rainbow-colored cloak trailing behind you protects you from harm, especially from those @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} by your light. You gain resistance 5 to physical damage dealt by creatures dazzled by your light powers. This resistance increases to 6 at level 18.

Focused Training: Sneaky Eldamon.name: 专注训练：鬼祟的埃尔达蒙 Focused Training: Sneaky Eldamon
Focused Training: Sneaky Eldamon.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.YiWDPrJu3OAFrnTI]{专注训练} 授予

你训练你的艾达兽朋友们，以拓宽他们掌握各类技能的能力。对你的每一位艾达兽朋友，为其选择使其成为强壮、盗窃、迷人、敏捷、自立、鬼祟或骇人之一。如果你的艾达兽已经拥有你所选择的专注训练所关联的技能，那么你的艾达兽改为获得另一种专注训练所关联的一个技能，作为艾达兽技能。和他们的其他艾达兽技能一样，你的艾达兽在从专注训练获得的技能上变为受训，并且该技能在5级时提升为专家，随后在11级时提升为大师。

  • 鬼祟：你的艾达兽总是在你最意想不到的地方潜行徘徊。他们获得【潜行】作为一项艾达兽技能，以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.beyw5bdA5hkQbmaG]{地形潜伏者} 技能专长。

注：将此特性放置在你的艾达兽角色上

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.YiWDPrJu3OAFrnTI]{Focused Training}

You train your eldamon friends to broaden their capacity for various skills. For each of your eldamon friends, choose for them to become brawny, burglarious, enthralling, nimble, self-sufficient, sneaky, or terrifying. If your eldamon already has the skill associated with the focused training you chose, your eldamon gains one of the skills associated with another focused training as an eldamon skill instead. Like their other eldamon skills, your eldamon become trained in the skill gained from focused training, and the skill increases to expert at 5th level and then to master at 11th level.

  • Sneaky: Your eldamon is always skulking around where you least expect it. They gain Stealth as an eldamon skill and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.beyw5bdA5hkQbmaG]{Terrain Stalker} skill feat.

Note: Place this feature on your Eldamon actors

Interposing Guardian.name: 插入守护者 Interposing Guardian
Interposing Guardian.description:
你挡在你想要保护的人与攻击之间。当你希望如此时，通过你的空间进行的攻击会受到标准掩蔽，而不是较小掩蔽。

You get in the way of attacks against those you wish to protect. You provide standard cover instead of lesser cover against attacks through your space when you wish to do so.

Resurgent Life.name: 复苏生命 Resurgent Life
Resurgent Life.description:
你可以以单动作散播生机，其具有专注（特征）。这会使活生物（如植物）生长并向你移动，为你提供标准掩蔽，直到你下个回合开始。

You can spread life all around, as a single action, which has the concentrate trait. This causes living creatures such as plants to grow and move toward you, providing you standard cover until the beginning of your next turn.

Undying Flame.name: 不灭之焰 Undying Flame
Undying Flame.description:
他人尤其难以熄灭你的火焰，即使是有效的援助形式也比通常更少有帮助。来自你的元素力量的持续火焰伤害的纯骰检定DC从DC 15提高至DC 16，或在特别有效的援助后从DC 10提高至DC 12。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.8iVZqZQgvYx627rE]{效果：不灭之焰}

It’s particularly hard for others to put out your flames, and even an effective form of assistance helps less than usual. The flat check DCs for the persistent fire damage from your elemental powers increase from DC 15 to DC 16, or from DC 10 to DC 12 after especially effective assistance.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.8iVZqZQgvYx627rE]{Effect: Undying Flame}

Eldamon Battler.name: 艾尔达蒙斗士 Eldamon Battler
Eldamon Battler.description:
战斗中的胜利对你来说是最重要的，因此，你想招募一支尽可能强大的愿意帮助你一路战斗登顶的艾达兽队伍。对你而言，其他一切都只是达成这一目标的手段，但这并不意味着你不像其他感召的训练师那样同样深切地关心你的艾达兽。你每天都与它们一起训练，努力帮助它们实现目标并发掘其隐藏的潜力。如果你试图独自完成所有事情，就不可能成为最强——你们只能一起取得胜利！

你的所有艾达兽获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.actions.Item.g8lH9enxTY6Cpx9V]{元素护盾} 动作，并将其最大生命值提高一个等于你等级的数值（最低为2）。当你的艾达兽使用元素护盾动作时，该动作获得其元素所对应的A:特征或A:特征。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.oIzIs2KhbE9q9QW8]{感召：艾达兽斗士}

Victory in battle is the most important thing to you, and to that end, you want to recruit the strongest possible team of eldamon who are willing to help you fight your way to the top. Everything else is a means to that end for you, but that doesn't mean you don't care just as deeply for your eldamon as trainers of other callings. You train with them every day, working to help them actualize their goals and reach their hidden potential. You can't be the very best if you try to do everything on your own—you can only achieve victory together!

All of your eldamon gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.actions.Item.g8lH9enxTY6Cpx9V]{Elemental Shield} action and increase their maximum Hit Points by an amount equal to your level (minimum 2). When your eldamon use the Elemental Shield action, it gains their element's associated trait or traits.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.oIzIs2KhbE9q9QW8]{Calling: Eldamon Battler}

Segmented Capacitor.name: 分段电容器 Segmented Capacitor
Segmented Capacitor.description:
你将自身的电荷分割出来，赋予你更高的容量。你可以成为 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{带电} 至多带电 4，而非带电 3。每 10 分钟一次，当你处于带电 2 且将从一个电力力量获得单个电荷时，你改为成为带电 4 而非带电 3；如果你在使用该力量之前并未处于带电 2，则此项无效。

You've segmented off your electric charge, granting you higher capacity. You can become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{Charged} up to charged 4, instead of charged 3. Once per 10 minutes, when you are charged 2 and would gain a single charge from an electricity power, you become charged 4 instead of charged 3; this has no effect if you weren't already charged 2 before using the power.

Crystallize Life.name: 晶化生命 Crystallize Life
Crystallize Life.description:
你将结晶化的生命能量储存在全身的金色宝石中。当你处于相位中或在一次遭遇中第一次进入相位时，你会消耗一部分储存的能量，获得等于你等级的临时生命值，持续1轮。

You store crystallized life energy in golden jewels along your body. and you're phased in or when you first phase in during an encounter, you deplete some of the stored energy to gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level, which last for 1 round.

Element.name: 元素 Element
Element.description:
你获得一种元素的力量，取决于你作为元素化身所体现的艾达兽。你很可能会获得一个或多个与你的元素、你体内的艾达兽、或两者都相关的轻微身体特性。此外，选择一个与你的元素相符的常见、非普通或稀有艾达兽来体现（见 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.SUEJ4rJaCs7WNc2B]{第4章：艾达兽条目}）。你获得该艾达兽的元素能力。

You gain the power of an element depending on the eldamon you embody as an elemental avatar. You likely gain one or more mild physical features related to your element, the eldamon within you, or both. Additionally, choose a common, uncommon, or rare eldamon of your element to embody (see @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.SUEJ4rJaCs7WNc2B]{Chapter 4: Eldamon Entries}). You gain the elemental ability of that eldamon.

Garland of Salvation.name: 救赎花环 Garland of Salvation
Garland of Salvation.description:
你的花环纪念你曾拯救过的人，每当你为他人牺牲自己时，它便会赋予你力量。在你为了保护他人免受伤害而承受伤害，或为了保护他人免受伤害而失去生命值之后（例如来自你的替罪羊能力），你在AC和豁免上获得+1状态加值，持续至你下个回合结束。

Your garland commemorates those you have saved, and it empowers you whenever you sacrifice yourself for others. After taking damage to protect another from harm or losing Hit Points to protect another from harm (such as from your scapegoat ability), you gain a +1 status bonus to AC and saving throws until the end of your next turn.

Wild Growth.name: 野性生长 Wild Growth
Wild Growth.description:
当你播种植物时，会有更多植物在你周围生长。每当你使用一种力量进行播种时，在你占据的一个方格或与你相邻的一个方格中播种。如果你在力量 DC 上是专家，你在两个这样的方格中播种；如果你在力量 DC 上是大师，你在三个这样的方格中播种；如果你在力量 DC 上是传奇，你在四个这样的方格中播种。

When you sow plants, more plants grow around you. Any time you sow with a power, sow in a square you occupy or a square adjacent to you. If you're an expert in power DC, you sow in two such squares, if you're a master in power DC, you sow in three such squares, and if you're legendary in power DC, you sow in four such squares.

Snow Fur.name: 雪绒皮毛 Snow Fur
Snow Fur.description:
你蓬松如雪的毛皮会随着它们的寒意累积得越多，而给予你对抗生物攻击的保护。当某个生物因你的冰力量而获得3点或以上的冻结时，你对该生物的攻击的AC获得+1环境加值；当其冻结达到6点或以上时提高至+2；冻结达到9点或以上时提高至+3；冻结达到12点或以上时提高至+4。

Your fluffy snowlike fur grants you protection against creatures' attacks the more their chill accumulates. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC against a creature's attacks when they are frozen 3 or more from your ice powers, which increases to +2 when they are frozen 6 or more, +3 when they are frozen 9 or more, and +4 when they are frozen 12 or more.

Stir the Pot.name: 搅动局势 Stir the Pot
Stir the Pot.description:
当你使用你的力量来重新定位一个敌人时，你可以将他们再多移动一点点。每当你的力量允许你将一个敌人重新定位10英尺或更多时，你可以将他们再多重新定位5英尺。如果你的力量允许你将一个敌人重新定位30英尺或更多时，你可以改为将他们再多重新定位10英尺。

When you reposition a foe using your force powers, you can move them just a little bit more. Whenever your force power allows you to reposition a foe 10 feet or more, you can reposition them 5 more feet. If your force power allows you to reposition a foe 30 feet or more, you can reposition them 10 more feet instead.

Slide.name: 滑行 Slide
Slide.description:
当你用腹部滑行时，你可以在直线上移动得更快。每当你疾行时，你都可以选择用腹部滑行。如果你这么做，你必须沿直线移动，但你获得对你的速度+15英尺的环境加值。

When you slide on your belly, you can move faster in a straight line. Whenever you Stride, you can choose to slide on your belly. If you do, you must move in a straight line, but you gain a +15-foot circumstance bonus to your Speed.

Frozen Soul.name: 冻结之魂 Frozen Soul
Frozen Soul.description:
在必要时，你会紧抓意识以保护对你而言重要的事物。当你因伤害而降至0生命值时，你改为保持在1生命值。之后，你在1小时内不能从冻结灵魂中获益。

You cling to consciousness when necessary to protect what matters to you. When you are dropped to 0 Hit Points by damage, you remain at 1 Hit Point instead. Afterward, you can't benefit from frozen soul for 1 hour.

Ghost Sniffer.name: 幽灵（特征）嗅探者 Ghost Sniffer
Ghost Sniffer.description:
你获得嗅觉作为一种模糊感官，距离为30尺（与嗅觉通常规则相同，在逆风或顺风时距离减半或加倍），但该嗅觉只能闻到带有幽灵（特征）的目标、灵体、闹鬼以及其他虚体生物。若该生物是虚体且完全处于某个固态物体之内，鬼魂嗅探者不会察觉到他们，除非你在同一格或相邻一格内主动嗅闻该物体，这需要一个单动作。

You have scent as an imprecise sense out to 30 feet (halved and doubled as normal for scent when smelling upwind or downwind), except the scent can only smell ghosts, spirits, haunts, and other incorporeal creatures. If the creature is incorporeal and fully within a solid object, ghost sniffer doesn't notice them unless you actively sniffs the object while within the same or an adjacent square, which requires a single action.

The Eld.name: 埃尔德 The Eld
The Eld.description:
神圣圣化：无

神殿：地脉线节点、修道院、荒野神龛

崇拜者：德鲁伊、元素使

圣兽：全部

圣色：二十种元素颜色，或“二十彩”

领域：空气、大地、火、自然、水

牧师法术：1环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.zDJS8E66UI0himqV]，5环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.lpT6LotUaQPfinjj]，9环：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.jrBa9deU2ULFWvSl]

偏好武器：拳

神圣属性：体质或感知

神圣技能：自然

神圣圣泉：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wdA52JJnsuQWeyqz] 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]

关键典范：找到你自己的道路，尊重元素及其显现，将他人视作在埃尔德之下平等

关键禁忌：强迫他人追随你的信念，腐化或亵渎元素及其显现，向埃尔德祈求偏袒

Divine Sanctification: none

Temples: ley line nexuses, monasteries, wilderness shrines

Worshippers: druids, elementalists

Sacred Animal: all

Sacred Colors: the twenty elemental colors, or "icosachrome"

Domains: air, earth, fire, nature, water

Cleric Spells: 1st: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.zDJS8E66UI0himqV], 5th: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.lpT6LotUaQPfinjj], 9th: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.jrBa9deU2ULFWvSl]

Favored Weapon: fist

Divine Attribute: Constitution or Wisdom

Divine Skill: Nature

Divine Font: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wdA52JJnsuQWeyqz] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]

Key Edicts: find your own path, respect the elements and their manifestations, treat others as equal under the Eld

Key Anathema: force others to follow your beliefs, corrupt or defile the elements or their manifestations, beseech the Eld for favoritism

Force Hands.name: 力之手 Force Hands
Force Hands.description:
你的小手臂本身派不上多少用场，但只要你愿意，就能随时显现以太的力量之手，而且它们威力十足。当你使用运动来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{擒抱}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞}或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{绊摔}时，你可以用你的巨人力量之手来协助你。若你这么做，你使用你的智力调整值取代你的力量调整值，并且你的运动检定获得+1环境加值。当你使用一种不造成力量伤害的力量力量时，你可以尝试一次欺瞒检定，对抗旁观者的察觉、自然或神秘学DC中较高者，以欺骗对方，让他们以为你使用的是心智力量而非力量力量。

@Check[type:deception|defense:perception]{欺瞒（察觉DC）}

@Check[type:deception|defense:nature]{欺瞒（自然DC）}

@Check[type:deception|defense:occultism]{欺瞒（神秘学DC）}

Your tiny arms can't do much on their own, but you keep force hands of aether manifested whenever you desire, and those pack quite a punch. When you use Athletics to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip}, you can use your giant force hands to assist you. If you do, you use your Intelligence modifier instead of your Strength modifier, and you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your Athletics check. When you use a force power that doesn't deal force damage, you can attempt a Deception check against the higher of an observer's Perception, Nature, or Occultism DC to trick them into thinking you are using a mind power instead of a force power.

@Check[type:deception|defense:perception]{Deception (Perception DC)}

@Check[type:deception|defense:nature]{Deception (Nature DC)}

@Check[type:deception|defense:occultism]{Deception (Occultism DC)}

Massive Growth.name: 巨型生长 Massive Growth
Massive Growth.description:
你变得比大多数进化的形态更大，你庞大身体的触及也比正常情况下更远。你是超大型，而不是大型，并且你的身体拥有20英尺触及；该触及已反映在上述统计数据中。

You grow larger than most evolved forms, and the reach of your massive body is even greater than normal. You are Huge, instead of Large, and your body has a 20 foot reach; the reach has been reflected in the above statistics.

Eyes on the Back of Your Wheel.name: 你轮子后方的眼睛 Eyes on the Back of Your Wheel
Eyes on the Back of Your Wheel.description:
凭借你众多的眼睛，你不会对等级与你相同或更低的夹击你的生物处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。然而，它们仍然可以帮助它们的盟友进行夹击。

Thanks to your many eyes, you aren't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} to flanking creatures of your level or lower. However, they can still help their allies flank.

All the Luck Charms.name: 所有幸运护符 All the Luck Charms
All the Luck Charms.description:
你众多的幸运护符之一避开了厄运；这是一个幸运效果，但它除了抵消该厄运效果之外不会做任何事。之后，你在1轮内无法从该能力中获益。

One of your many luck charms averts misfortune; this is a fortune effect, but it doesn't do anything but negate the misfortune effect. Afterward, you can't benefit from this ability for 1 round.

Portal Antlers.name: 传送门鹿角 Portal Antlers
Portal Antlers.description:
你可以使用你鹿角之间的元素冰传送门来瞄准你的冰力量。选择你鹿角10英尺触及内的任意空间，作为你任何冰力量的起源点。这不仅在大多数情况下能有效将它们的射程增加10英尺，而且还能让你更有利地布置区域效果。

You can use the elemental ice portal between your antlers to aim your ice powers. Choose any space within your antlers' 10- foot reach as the origin point for any of your ice powers. This not only allows you to effectively increase their range by 10 feet in most cases, but also allows you to position area effects more advantageously.

Locus Arms.name: 法器武器 Locus Arms
Locus Arms.description:
你的手臂如同万千，由力场能量驱动，并在你穿行于地面时保持几何稳定。你获得 +2 环境加值，用于对抗试图对你施展 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} 的企图时的强韧或反射 DC。此加值同样适用于对抗试图移动你或将你击倒为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} 的法术或效果的豁免。当你靠近墙壁、天花板或其他带有易于抓握之处的边缘时，若某个效果将要强迫移动你，你可以尝试用你的手臂进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.3yoajuKjwHZ9ApUY]{Grab an Edge}，在成功时将强迫移动减少 20 尺，在大成功或大失败时将强迫移动减少 30 尺，而不是减少坠落距离。

Your arms are myriad, powered by force energy, and geometrically stable as you move across the ground. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Fortitude or Reflex DC against attempts to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} you. This bonus also applies to saving throws against spells or effects that attempt to move you or knock you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. When an effect would force you to move while you are near a wall, ceiling, or other edge with easy handholds, you can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.3yoajuKjwHZ9ApUY]{Grab an Edge} with your arms to reduce the forced movement by 20 feet on a success or 30 feet on a critical success, instead of reducing falling distance.

Wall Off.name: 隔绝墙 Wall Off
Wall Off.description:
你的身体本质上就是一堵墙，因此很难穿过你的空间移动。尽管超小型生物仍然可以进入你的空间，但它们无法自动穿过，并且仍然需要 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8]{翻滚穿越} 或使用类似的能力。对抗你进行翻滚穿越或使用类似能力的DC为你的力量DC，或通常DC再加+2环境加值，取两者中较高者。

Your body is essentially a wall, so it's difficult to move through your space. While Tiny creatures can still enter your space, they can't automatically cross through it, and they still need to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8]{Tumble Through} or use a similar ability. The DC to Tumble Through or use a similar ability against you is either your power DC or the usual DC with a +2 circumstance bonus, whichever is higher.

Transcend Element.name: 超越元素 Transcend Element
Transcend Element.description:
你独特的能力与艾尔达蒙的元素能量交织，使你得以超越你元素的常规界限，深入探索那些通常只会对你所选择的另一种元素开放的力量。选择一种不同于你自身的元素；你从该元素的列表中获得一个1级力量、一个7级或更低等级的力量，以及一个11级或更低等级的力量。当你获得新的力量时，你可以从该元素的列表中选择一个力量来替代你自身列表中的力量，只要该力量至少比你的等级低4个等级（例如15级时可选11级力量、17级时可选13级力量，依此类推）。你所选择的力量会成为你元素的力量，但除此之外，该力量仍具有其正常效果，即便这意味着它会产生对你元素而言极不寻常的伤害类型或状态（例如冰元素化身造成火伤害）。请构思一种解释，说明你如何用你的元素来显现这些力量。例如，若你的元素是寒冷，你可以选择电，并将你的超越描述为低温促成超导。

你也可以不选择自身以外的元素，而选择超越至你自身元素。在这种情况下，你获得你元素的任意三个力量，或通用力量，最高至15级。

Your unique capacities intertwined with your eldamon's elemental energies have allowed you to transcend the normal boundaries of your element, delving into powers that would ordinarily only be available to one other element of your choice. Choose an element other than your own; you gain one 1st level power from that element's list, one power of 7th level or lower from that element's list, and one power of 11th level or lower from that element's list. When you gain new powers, you can choose a power from that element's list instead of your own, as long as the power is at least 4 levels lower than your level (11th level at 15th, 13th level at 17th, and so on). The powers you choose become powers of your element, though otherwise the power has its normal effects, even if that means it produces a damage type or condition that would be highly unusual for your element (such as fire damage for an ice elemental avatar). Think of an explanation as to how you can manifest these powers using your element. For instance, if your element is cold, you might choose electricity and describe your transcendence as cold temperatures producing superconductivity.

Instead of choosing an element other than your own, you can choose to transcend into your own element. In that case, you gain any three powers from your element, or universal powers, up to level 15.

Cloak of Snow.name: 雪之斗篷 Cloak of Snow
Cloak of Snow.description:
你背上的雪之斗篷在滑行时保护你并增强你的滑行能力。当你使用你的滑行能力时，你的速度获得+25尺环境加值，而非+15尺环境加值。当你移动时，你被雪之斗篷所@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，并且当你使用你的滑行能力移动时，你的AC获得+2环境加值。

A cloak of snow along your back protects you while sliding and enhances your ability to slide. You gain a +25-foot circumstance bonus to your Speed when you use your slide ability, instead of a +15-foot circumstance bonus. You are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} by the cloak of snow while moving, and you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC while moving using your slide ability.

Elemental Defense.name: 元素防御 Elemental Defense
Elemental Defense.description:
Eldamon 训练师你运用你的eldamon的力量，并结合你自身的防御性移动，来增强你的防护。你在轻型护甲和无甲防御方面的熟练度等级提升至专家。

元素化身你运用你的元素的力量，并结合你自身的防御性移动，来增强你的防护。你在轻型护甲和无甲防御方面的熟练度等级提升至专家。

Eldamon TrainerYou use the power of your eldamon, combined with your own defensive movements, to enhance your protection. Your proficiency ranks for light armor and unarmored defense increase to expert.

Elemental AvatarYou use the power of your element, combined with your own defensive movements, to enhance your protection. Your proficiency ranks for light armor and unarmored defense increase to expert.

Dauntless.name: 无畏 Dauntless
Dauntless.description:
有人称你冷血，另一些人称你无所畏惧。无论如何，别人觉得可怕的事物，你通常只会觉得刺激。每当你获得惊惧（状态）状态时，你将惊惧值降低1。

Some call you cold-blooded, others call you fearless. Either way, things others find scary you normally just find exciting. Whenever you gain the frightened condition, you reduce the frightened value by 1.

Protective Wings.name: 守护之翼 Protective Wings
Protective Wings.description:
与你的其他空气艾达蒙相比，你那巨大的翅膀尤为坚实。以单动作，你可以将翅膀挡在身前。你获得+1环境加值至AC与反射豁免，持续至你下个回合开始，并且在相同持续时间内，你将来自wind's mobility的AC环境加值提高至+4。

Your huge wings are especially solid compared to other air eldamon. As a single action, you can interpose your wings. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC and Reflex saves until the beginning of your next turn, and you increase the circumstance bonus to AC from wind's mobility to +4 for the same duration.

Aetheric Third Eye.name: 以太第三眼 Aetheric Third Eye
Aetheric Third Eye.description:
你拥有一只以太的第三只眼，将凝聚的力场能量与以太精华混合为元素形态；这只第三只眼让你能够通过力场以几何方式感知事物。你在针对处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}状态的生物作为目标时，自动在纯骰检定中成功。

You have a third eye of aether, concentrated force energy mixed with etheric essence into elemental form, and that third eye allows you to perceive things geometrically through forces. You automatically succeed on flat checks to target @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} creatures.

Protective Armor.name: 防护护甲 Protective Armor
Protective Armor.description:
你穿着带电的重型护甲。你从护甲获得的 AC 物品加值提高到 +6，你的最大敏捷调整值降低到 +0，并且你的速度降低到 20 尺。

You wear electrified heavy armor. Your item bonus to AC from armor increases to +6, your maximum Dexterity modifier decreases to +0, and your Speed decreases to 20 feet.

Locus of Force.name: 力之法器 Locus of Force
Locus of Force.description:
你对几何学的理解使你能够将你的力量施加到更广泛的一组法器点上。你那些具有射程的力量能力的射程增加20英尺。这只影响你能够影响目标的射程；它不会增加你能够重新定位他们的距离。你的爆发、锥形与放射类力量能力的区域在长度或半径上增加5英尺。如果你在力量DC上是专家，则该区域改为在长度或半径上增加10英尺。

Your understanding of geometry allows you to apply your force across a wider locus of points. The range of your force powers that have a range increases by 20 feet. This only affects the range at which you can affect targets; it doesn't increase the distance you can reposition them. The area of your burst, cone, and emanation force powers increases by 5 feet in length or radius. If you're an expert in power DCs, the area increases by 10 feet in length or radius instead.

Icewalker.name: 冰行者 Icewalker
Icewalker.description:
你无视由冰与雪造成的困难地形与更严重困难地形，并且在穿越冰面时不会冒着坠落风险。你将冻结状态对你各项速度造成的减值减少10尺。

You ignore difficult terrain and greater difficult terrain from ice and snow and don't risk falling when crossing ice. You reduce the penalty to your Speeds from the frozen condition by 10 feet.

Innate Defenses.name: 天生防御 Innate Defenses
Innate Defenses.description:
艾达兽拥有源自其元素的天生防护，使其免受伤害，类似凡人的护甲。这使其获得AC的+2物品加值以及+3最大敏捷。此外，拥有凡人朋友的艾达兽（无论对方是否为艾达兽训练师）可以共享其朋友的护甲强效符文与抗力符文，使其AC的物品加值提高，并获得豁免的物品加值

Eldamon have innate defenses from their elements that protect them from harm, akin to armor for mortals. This grants them a +2 item bonus to AC and a +3 Maximum Dexterity. Additionally, an eldamon with a mortal friend (whether or not they're an eldamon trainer) can share their friend's armor potency rune and resilient rune, granting them an increased item bonus to AC and an item bonus to saving throws

Have Pot, Will Travel.name: 带上锅，踏上旅行 Have Pot, Will Travel
Have Pot, Will Travel.description:
你形态的一部分是一个活的罐子，你可以用它来进行防护。以单动作，你可以退入你的罐子中。如果你这样做，你获得AC+2环境加值并且变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}。这些效果持续到你下个回合结束，不过你可以用单动作提前结束该效果。

Part of your form is a living pot, which you can use for protection. As a single action, you can Retreat Into your Pot. If you do, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC and are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}. These effects last until the end of your next turn, though you can end the effect early with a single action.

Confounding Force.name: 迷惑力 Confounding Force
Confounding Force.description:
你用自己的力量力量引诱并折磨敌人，令其短暂迷惑并削弱其下一次攻击。当你以力量力量进行力量攻击掷骰并命中一名敌人，或一名敌人未能通过对抗你力量力量的豁免时，你会干扰其下一次攻击。在你下个回合结束前，该敌人下一次造成伤害时，其伤害掷骰承受–2环境减值。若你在力量DC上为专家，此减值提高至–4环境减值；若为大师，则为–6环境减值；若为传奇，则为–8环境减值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.U6FwinBAURdsyHvQ]

You bait and bedevil foes with your force powers, momentarily confounding them and weakening their next attack. When you hit a foe with a power attack roll on a force power or a foe fails their saving throw against your force power, you interfere with their next attack. The next time they deal damage before the end of your next turn, they take a –2 circumstance penalty on their damage roll. This increases to a –4 circumstance penalty if you're an expert in power DCs, –6 if you're a master in power DCs, and –8 if you're legendary in power DCs.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.U6FwinBAURdsyHvQ]

Eldamon Powers.name: 艾达蒙力量 Eldamon Powers
Eldamon Powers.description:
你的eldamon能够基于其元素施展不可思议的力量。力量（power），也称为元素力量（elemental powers），是一种特殊的魔法能力，与法术不同。当相位进入现实后，eldamon可以使用其力量来与敌人战斗。一旦eldamon使用了一项力量，他们通常在使用一项刷新力量之前都不能再次使用该力量（不过该限制不适用于刷新力量本身），或者直到他们相位退出为止，以先发生者为准。力量的攻击与DC各自拥有独立的熟练度，这些并不等同于法术、职业DC、或武器或徒手的熟练度。若你的eldamon来源于已注入的物品，则他们会与你共享数种物品加值。eldamon的力量DC与力量攻击调整值基于其关键属性：感知。

当你首次与一只eldamon结为伙伴时，他们通常知晓该eldamon在该等级所列出的力量，不过你也可能遇到拥有不同力量的eldamon。

在第3等级、第5等级、第7等级、第9等级、第11等级、第13等级、第15等级，以及第17等级时，你的eldamon可以将他们的一项元素力量替换为一项新的元素力量，新力量必须为其等级或更低。若你结交多只eldamon并使用该eldamon所列出的建议进阶，这会最简单且能节省大量时间；但既然是你在训练他们，你也可以与他们合作学习你希望的任何力量。在第19等级时，他们改为学习一项终极力量（ultimate power）（更多细节见终极力量职业特性）。

Your eldamon are capable of incredible powers based on their element. Powers, also known as elemental powers, are a special type of magical ability, different from spells. When phased into reality, eldamon can use their powers to battle your foes. Once an eldamon uses a power, they normally can't use that power again until they use a refresh power (though that limit doesn't apply to refresh powers themselves), or until they phase back out, whichever comes first. Powers have separate proficiencies for attacks and DCs, which aren't the same as spells, class DCs, or weapon or unarmed proficiencies. Your eldamon share several types of item bonus with you if they come from invested items. An eldamon's power DC and power attack modifiers are based on their key attribute, Wisdom.

When you first befriend an eldamon, they typically know the powers listed for that eldamon at that level, though you might find an eldamon with different powers.

At 3rd level, 5th level, 7th level, 9th level, 11th level, 13th level, 15th level, and 17th level, your eldamon can replace one of their elemental powers with a new elemental power, which must be of their level or lower. It's simplest and saves a lot of time if you befriend numerous eldamon to use the suggested progression listed for that eldamon, but since you're training them, you can work together with them to learn whichever power you wish. At 19th level, they instead learn an ultimate power (see the ultimate power class feature for more details).

Iguana’s Verve.name: 鬣蜥的活力 Iguana’s Verve
Iguana’s Verve.description:
你对抗麻痹与睡眠的豁免获得+2环境加值。若你对任一状态的豁免掷骰获得成功，则改为大成功或大失败；并且若你将会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}或被催眠至少2轮，则将该持续时间减少1轮。

You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your saving throws against paralysis and sleep. If you roll a success against either condition, you get a critical success instead, and if you would be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} or put to sleep for at least 2 rounds, reduce that duration by 1 round.

Acrobatic Climber.name: 杂技攀爬者 Acrobatic Climber
Acrobatic Climber.description:
你使用特技来进行攀爬，而非使用运动。

You use Acrobatics to Climb instead of Athletics.

Banhammer.name: 禁槌 Banhammer
Banhammer.description:
你的战锤会击退生物，并禁止它们返回。当你用身体的徒手攻击进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} 时，你可以改为使用你的战锤。若你如此做，你的用于 Shove 的 Athletics 检定获得 +2 环境加值。若你成功，在目标的下个回合中，若它在其移动动作期间试图向你移动，则它必须进行一次对抗你的力量 DC 的 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] 豁免；若失败，它在该移动动作期间不能向你移动。若成功，它可以向你移动，且不需要再尝试任何进一步的豁免。

Your hammer rebuffs creatures and bans them from returning. When you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} with your body unarmed attack, you can use your hammer instead. If you do, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Athletics check to Shove. If you succeed, on the target's next turn, if it attempts to move toward you during its move action, it must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon] save against your power DC; on a failure, it can't move toward you during that move action. On a success, it can move toward you and doesn't need to attempt any further saving throws.

Eldamon Master.name: 艾达蒙大师 Eldamon Master
Eldamon Master.description:
说到艾尔达蒙训练师，你是最优秀的人之一，并赢得了极高的声望。与艾尔达蒙成为朋友确实是你的使命，而训练它们是你的目标。你在艾尔达蒙训练师职业DC的熟练度等级提升至大师。

When it comes to eldamon trainers, you're among the very best and earned a great deal of fame. Befriending eldamon is truly your quest, and training them is your aim. Your proficiency rank for eldamon trainer class DCs increases to master.

Aetheric Spikes.name: 以太尖刺 Aetheric Spikes
Aetheric Spikes.description:
你被由以太构成的尖刺覆盖，以力场伤害你的敌人。尝试对你进行近战徒手打击或非触及的近战打击的生物（无论是否命中你）会受到 @Damage[4[force]] 伤害，并需进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免，对抗你的力量DC。在19级时，该伤害提升至 @Damage[5[force]] 伤害。

You are covered in spikes made of aether that damage your foes with force. A creature that attempts a melee unarmed Strike or a non-reach melee Strike against you (whether or not it hits you) takes @Damage[4[force]] damage, with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save against your power DC. At 19th level, this increases to @Damage[5[force]] damage.

Elemental Resistances and Weaknesses.name: 元素抗力与弱点 Elemental Resistances and Weaknesses
Elemental Resistances and Weaknesses.description:
艾尔达蒙对所列的伤害类型与特性具有等同于其等级的抗力与弱点。该抗力与弱点取决于其元素，因此在同一元素的艾尔达蒙之间很少会有所不同。

The eldamon has resistances and weaknesses to the listed damage types and traits equal to their level. The resistance and weakness are based on their element, so it will rarely vary between eldamon of the same element.

Wind's Mobility.name: 风之机动性 Wind's Mobility
Wind's Mobility.description:
当你移动时，空气从你身旁呼啸而过，只要你保持移动，你的敌人就更难伤害你。当你正在移动时，你处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态，并获得对AC的+2环境加值。此效果仅适用于你正处于自身移动的过程中，而不适用于因他人的动作而移动时，例如乘坐载具或坐骑时。

Air rushes past you as you move, making it harder for your foes to harm you as long as you're in motion. While you're moving, you're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} and gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC. This only applies when you're in the midst of your own movement, not when you're moving due to the actions of another, such as when riding a vehicle or a mount.

Elemental Shield.name: 元素护盾 Elemental Shield
Elemental Shield.description:
你可以召唤你的元素来保护你免受伤害。你获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.actions.Item.g8lH9enxTY6Cpx9V]{元素护盾}动作。当你使用元素护盾时，它获得与你的元素相关联的特征或特征。当你使用元素护盾时，如果你选择用一只空闲的手持握元素护盾，你可以将元素护盾提供的环境加值提高至+2。

You can call forth your element to protect you from harm. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.actions.Item.g8lH9enxTY6Cpx9V]{Elemental Shield} action. When you use Elemental Shield, it gains your element's associated trait or traits. When you use Elemental Shield, you can increase the circumstance bonus from Elemental Shield to +2 if you choose to hold the elemental shield in a free hand.

Unyielding Elephant.name: 不屈之象 Unyielding Elephant
Unyielding Elephant.description:
你在对抗试图@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip}你的尝试时，你的强韧或反射DC获得+2环境加值。此加值也适用于对抗试图使你@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}的法术或效果的豁免。此外，若任何效果会强迫你移动10尺或更多，你只会移动一半的距离。

You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Fortitude or Reflex DC against attempts to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} you. This bonus also applies to saving throws against spells or effects that attempt to knock you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. In addition, if any effect would force you to move 10 feet or more, you are moved only half the distance.

Veins of Ice.name: 冰之脉络 Veins of Ice
Veins of Ice.description:
泵入你体内的寒冷冷却了大多数持续性伤害的形态，使其更难以维持。你对抗除心智、活力与虚无伤害（它们会直接攻击你的心智或生命力）之外的持续性伤害的纯骰检定DC从DC 15降至DC 12；若有特别有效的协助，则从DC 10降至DC 7。

The cold pumping through your body chills out most forms of persistent damage, making it harder for them to last. Your flat check DC against persistent damage other than mental, vitality, and void damage (which attack your mind or life force directly) decreases from DC 15 to DC 12, or from DC 10 to DC 7 with especially effective assistance.

Foxforce.name: 狐之力量 Foxforce
Foxforce.description:
你舞动的狐之力量鬼火会短暂揭示 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} 生物，效果类似妖精之火。当你用力量力量进行力量攻击掷骰命中一个生物且其受到力量伤害，或一个生物未能通过其对抗你力量力量的豁免且其受到力量伤害时，若该生物原本为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}，则改为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}；若其原本可见，则它不能变为隐蔽。此效果持续至你下个回合结束。

Your dancing wisps of fox force briefly reveal @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} creatures similarly to faerie fire. When you hit a creature with a power attack roll with a force power and it takes force damage, or a creature fails its saving throw against your force power and it takes force damage, if the creature was @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} instead, and if it was visible, it can't be concealed. This effect lasts until the end of your next turn.

Eyes of the Unseen.name: 无形之眼 Eyes of the Unseen
Eyes of the Unseen.description:
你持续获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]{See the Unseen} 法术的效果。

You constantly gain the effects of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]{See the Unseen} spell.

Static Fur.name: 静态毛皮 Static Fur
Static Fur.description:
当你冲锋并横冲直撞时，你的毛皮会聚集电力。如果你在你的回合中花费至少三个动作来疾行，并且在该回合中不使用力量，你会在回合结束时变为@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{带电}。

Your fur gathers up electricity when you charge and rampage around. If you spend at least three of your actions on your turn to Stride and don't use a power on that turn, you become @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{Charged} at the end of the turn.

Smoke Tail.name: 烟雾尾巴 Smoke Tail
Smoke Tail.description:
当你在同一位置保持不动且至少持续2个连续轮时，你的尾巴冒出的烟雾会使你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态，直到你再次移动为止。与通常会暴露你位置的隐蔽效果相同，你不能用它来躲藏。

When you remain in the same position without moving for at least 2 consecutive rounds, smoke from your tail causes you to become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} until you move again. As normal for concealment that gives away your position, you can't use it to Hide.

Handwraps of Mighty Blows (Eldamon).name: 强力重击护手布（埃尔达蒙） Handwraps of Mighty Blows (Eldamon)
Handwraps of Mighty Blows (Eldamon).description:
当你灌注这些绣花布条时，你必须冥想并缓慢地将它们缠绕在你的手上。这些手裹上蚀刻有武器符文，使你的徒手攻击获得这些符文的益处，让你的徒手攻击如同魔法武器一般运作。例如，+1 强击猛击手裹会使你的徒手攻击攻击掷骰获得+1 物品加值，并将你的徒手攻击的伤害从一枚武器伤害骰增加到两枚（通常为2d4而非1d4，但如果你的拳的武器伤害骰不同，或你有其他徒手攻击，则改为使用该骰面值的两枚骰子）。

你可以像对待一把武器那样对手裹升级、添加与转移符文，并且你可以将护符附着在手裹上。为这些目的，将手裹视为搏击组的近战武器，且具有光负载。属性符文仅在其对你正在使用的徒手攻击适用时才会生效。例如，一个必须应用于挥砍武器的属性，在你以拳攻击时不会起作用；但如果你以爪击或其他挥砍类徒手攻击进行攻击，你将获得其益处。

As you invest these embroidered strips of cloth, you must meditate and slowly wrap them around your hands. These handwraps have weapon runes etched into them to give your unarmed attacks the benefits of those runes, making your unarmed attacks work like magic weapons. For example, +1 striking handwraps of mighty blows would give you a +1 item bonus to attack rolls with your unarmed attacks and increase the damage of your unarmed attacks from one weapon die to two (normally 2d4 instead of 1d4, but if your fists have a different weapon damage die or you have other unarmed attacks, use two of that die size instead).

You can upgrade, add, and transfer runes to and from the handwraps just as you would for a weapon, and you can attach talismans to the handwraps. Treat the handwraps as melee weapons of the brawling group with light Bulk for these purposes. Property runes apply only when they would be applicable to the unarmed attack you're using. For example, a property that must be applied to a slashing weapon wouldn't function when you attacked with a fist, but you would gain its benefits if you attacked with a claw or some other slashing unarmed attack.

Deep Accumulation.name: 深度积累 Deep Accumulation
Deep Accumulation.description:
当你的冰力量在一个生物身上累积@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]状态时，冻结状态的最大值提高2（起始为7，在第20等级时最高为12）。

When your ice powers accumulate the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W] condition on a creature, the maximum value for the frozen condition increases by 2 (starting at 7, to a maximum of 12 at 20th level).

Elemental Assistance.name: 元素援助 Elemental Assistance
Elemental Assistance.description:
在探索期间，你将艾达蒙相位显现，以运用其元素力量来协助你的盟友。你可以在探索期间使用交涉来决定你的援助结果，从而对你的一位盟友的技能检定进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{Aid}，你鼓励你的艾达蒙用其元素力量提供协助。为此，描述艾达蒙的元素能力如何协助你的盟友的检定。

During exploration, you phase in eldamon to use their elemental powers in order to assist your allies. You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{Aid} one of your allies’ skill checks during exploration using Diplomacy to determine the result of your Aid as you encourage your eldamon to assist with their elemental powers. To do so, describe how the eldamon’s elemental abilities assist your ally’s check.

Deep Burns.name: 深度灼烧 Deep Burns
Deep Burns.description:
你尾巴中不灭的火焰强化你的燃烧攻击。你用你的力量造成的持续火焰伤害获得+2状态加值。

The undying flame in your tail empowers your burning attacks. You gain a +2 status bonus to persistent fire damage you deal with your powers.

Fortitude Expertise.name: 强韧专精 Fortitude Expertise
Fortitude Expertise.description:
你的体魄异常强健。你的强韧豁免的熟练度等级提升至专家。

Your physique is incredibly hardy. Your proficiency rank for Fortitude saves increases to expert.

Defensive Quills.name: 防御刺毛 Defensive Quills
Defensive Quills.description:
以近战徒手打击或非触及近战打击命中你的生物会受到@Damage[(max(@actor.level/2,1))[piercing]]伤害，数值等于你等级的一半（最少为1），并需进行一次@Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true]豁免，对抗你的力量DC。

A creature that hits you with a melee unarmed Strike or a non-reach melee Strike takes @Damage[(max(@actor.level/2,1))[piercing]] damage equal to half your level (minimum 1), with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save against your power DC.

So Many Legs.name: 如此之多的腿 So Many Legs
So Many Legs.description:
由于你拥有数量极多的腿，很难将你击倒至 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。你获得+4环境加值，适用于对抗会将你击倒的效果时的强韧与反射豁免和DC。

Due to your extreme number of legs, it's difficult to knock you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. You gain a +4 circumstance bonus to Fortitude and Reflex saves and DCs against effects that would knock you prone.

Mind Element.name: 心智元素 Mind Element
Mind Element.description:
心智元素涵盖心智精粹的元素本质，是星界位面、梦境界以及其他心灵领域的基础。因此，它专注于那些攻击、迷惑或压倒他人心智的力量。

致命创伤：你的心智力量能够造成足以致死的灵能创伤。当你使用造成心灵伤害的心智力量时，你可以选择是否赋予该力量非致命（特征）。如果你不这么做，该力量就可能是致命的。

关联伤害类型：心灵

关联特征：心灵

其他能力

如果你的元素是心智，你会从元素涌动动作、元素护盾动作，以及随元素而变化的元素化身专长中获得以下能力与效果。

元素机动你能纯凭心智推动身体，尽管这种移动较为粗糙。只要你沿直线移动，疾行动作对你而言就是纯粹的心智动作，这意味着即使你处于麻痹时也能执行它。

元素操控当你使用元素操控时，你可以略微调整20英尺内一名生物的心智状态。通常这只是轻微的情绪改变，但在社交场合中，它也可能让某次技能检定更容易或更困难一些。

元素抗力你的心智对心灵效果具有韧性，尤其是那些控制你的动作或情绪的效果。你在对抗会造成被控制（状态）或具有情绪（特征）的心灵效果的豁免检定上获得+1环境加值，并且你获得等于你等级一半的心灵伤害抗力。若你拥有强化抗力专长，你在豁免检定上的环境加值提升为+2。

元素塑形师当你使用元素塑形师专长时，你能够更显著地影响一名生物的心智状态。这使你能够迅速将信息传入其心智中，产生类似心灵连结的效果，或帮助一名生物冷静下来，使其恐惧值减少1。由GM酌情决定，你或许还能对一名生物的心智状态进行其他类似的调整。

元素感官你能侦测附近其他生物的思绪。你获得思绪感知，作为一种30英尺范围的模糊感官。

元素护盾该护盾也给予意志豁免+1环境加值。

元素涌动所选生物将陷入迟钝1，直到你下个回合结束，除非其在对抗你力量DC的意志豁免中成功。

强化机动你纯凭心智的移动尤其精细。你可以仅用心智正常地疾行与踏步；若你拥有其他速度，你也能用心智执行其对应的移动动作，即使你通常需要拍动翅膀才能飞行或摆动鳍才能游泳。

The element of mind encompasses the elemental nature of mental essence, the foundation of the Astral Plane, the Dreamlands, and other mental realms. Thus, it focuses on powers that assault, bewilder, or overwhelm the minds of others.

Lethal Trauma: Your mind powers are capable of causing enough psychic trauma to kill. When you use a mind power that deals mental damage, you can choose whether or not to give the power the nonlethal trait. If you don't, the power is potentially lethal.

Associated Damage Type: Mental

Associated Traits: Mental

Other Abilities

If your element is mind, you gain the following abilities and effects from the Elemental Surge action, the Elemental Shield action, and the elemental avatar feats that vary by element.

Elemental Locomotion You can propel your body purely with your mind, though the movement is coarse. As long as you move in a straight line, the Stride action is a purely mental action for you, which means you can take it while paralyzed.

Elemental Manipulation When you use Elemental Manipulation, you can slightly adjust the mental state of a creature within 20 feet. Normally this is a minor mood alteration, but it could potentially make it slightly easier or harder to succeed at a skill check in a social situation.

Elemental Resistance Your mind is resilient to mental effects, especially those that control your actions or emotions. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on saving throws against mental effects that cause the controlled condition or have the emotion trait, and you gain resistance equal to half your level against mental damage. If you have the Enhanced Resistance feat, your circumstance bonus on saving throws increases to +2.

Elemental Sculptor When you use the Elemental Sculptor feat, you can more significantly affect the mental state of a creature. This allows you to communicate information into their mind rapidly, with an effect similar to mindlink or to help a creature calm down, decreasing their frightened value by 1. At the GM's discretion, you might be able to perform other similar adjustments to a creature's mental state.

Elemental Senses You can detect nearby thoughts from other creatures. You gain thoughtsense as an imprecise sense out to 30 feet.

Elemental Shield The shield also grants a +1 circumstance bonus to Will saves.

Elemental Surge The chosen creature is stupefied 1 until the end of your next turn unless they succeed at a Will save against your power DC.

Enhanced Locomotion Your purely mental motion is especially refined. You can Stride and Step normally using only your mind, and if you have other Speeds, you can use the associated move actions with your mind as well, even if you would normally need to flap your wings to Fly or move your fins to Swim.

Death Element.name: 死亡元素 Death Element
Death Element.description:
死亡元素代表生命的终结，是自然循环的一部分。死亡力量代表终点，因此它们会削弱并杀死活生物与不死生物。由于死亡力量具有死亡（特征），它们会将其目标直接杀死，而不是让其昏迷且仍然活着。作为自然元素的不死化身，埃尔达蒙不会被死亡力量杀死，尽管它们仍会如同遭受其他伤害效果一般照常受到伤害并被消耗。在埃尔达蒙对战中这点很幸运，否则死亡埃尔达蒙将被禁止参赛。

最终终结：死亡力量对活生物造成虚能伤害，抽干其生命；但它们改为对不死生物造成力场伤害，并且在针对不死生物时失去死亡与虚能（特征）。即便如此，不死生物有时仍会免疫死亡力量的一些额外效果，例如即死效果。既非活也非死的生物（如构装体）不在死亡元素的影响范围之内。

生命抽汲：死亡力量会利用生命力被削弱的生物，对已经处于流失（状态）的目标造成更多伤害。每当某个死亡力量对一个已经流失（状态）的生物施加流失（状态）时，该流失的生物会受到额外的虚能伤害，数值等于其等级乘以下述两者中较低者：其既有的流失（状态）值与新施加的流失（状态）值。例如：一个9级且流失 2的生物若将被死亡力量施加流失 1，则其受到额外9点虚能伤害；而一个7级且流失 2的生物若将被死亡力量施加流失 3，则其受到额外14点虚能伤害。

关联伤害类型：虚能

关联特性：虚能

准备去死吧！

死亡埃尔达蒙及其力量对某些敌人而言可能很可怕，尤其是“无可避免的凋亡”，其可见的倒计时尤甚。与任何情形一样，GM可以选择对与死亡力量配合采取的某些类型动作给予环境加值或减值。例如，如果你在非战斗状态下并且对方正处于“无可避免的凋亡”的效果之下，那么使用“快速胁迫”的“胁迫”某人可能会更容易。和往常一样，由GM决定何时给予这些好处。

其他能力

如果你的元素是死亡，你将从元素涌动动作、元素护盾动作以及随元素变化的元素化身专长中获得以下能力与效果。

元素机动你可以在移动时以死亡能量环绕自身，迫使敌人让路，否则自食其果。以单动作，你可以在裹覆死亡能量时疾走。在此次移动期间，你可以尝试穿过一名敌人的空间。该敌人有一个选择：要么允许你穿过其空间；要么阻止你的移动，承受1点虚能伤害外加每当你拥有1等级再额外+1点虚能伤害，并进行一次基础强韧豁免。若敌人以此方式选择阻止你的移动，你的移动会立刻结束，即使你本还可以继续移动更远距离。

元素操控当你使用元素操控时，你可以以较小的方式控制死亡，使你能够将一个生物的濒死值最多提高或降低2，或仅以接触就杀死一株微型的非生物植物。在你的GM酌情裁定下，你也可以进行其他与死亡有关的小幅调整，不过这永远不足以杀死一个并非已经濒死的生物。

元素抗力你的身体对死亡的召唤产生抗性。你获得对抗死亡效果的豁免检定+1环境加值，并获得等同于你等级一半的虚能伤害抗力。若你拥有“强化抗力”专长，你对抗死亡效果的环境加值提升至+2。

元素塑形师当你使用元素塑形师专长时，你能做到比元素操控更大程度的作为。这使你能够在至多20尺外、在大致一个10尺×10尺的方形或更小区域内杀死非生物植物，或杀死一个濒死的生物。在你的GM酌情裁定下，你也可以进行其他类似的、涉及死亡与杀戮的调整，不过这仍不足以杀死一个并非已经濒死的生物。

元素感官你能感知一个生物距离死亡有多近。仅凭观察一个生物，你就能判断其是健康（生命值高于3/4）、受伤（生命值在一半与3/4之间）、重伤（生命值在1/4与一半之间）还是命悬一线（生命值低于1/4）。一个积极试图伪装其生命力或受伤程度的生物可以照常进行一次欺瞒检定来对抗你的察觉DC，但除此之外，你的感官无需进行检定即可生效。

元素护盾该护盾还给予强韧豁免+1环境加值。

元素涌动除非所选生物在对抗你的力量DC的强韧豁免中成功，否则其在1轮内陷入虚弱 1或笨拙 1（由你选择）。

强化机动你与死亡的连结使你能够出现在近期死亡或濒死生物的身侧，几乎如同引魂使者或末日先兆。以单动作（具有移动（特征）），你可以短暂转化为死亡能量，然后在60尺内任意一名正在濒死，或在过去1分钟内曾经死亡的生物的相邻空间中再度出现。你仍需要对该生物具有效果线，并且必须能够以一种精确感官侦测到对方，但你无需穿越其间的方格，从而能够避开障碍与有害地形，并且此移动不会触发基于移动的反应动作（）。

The element of death represents the end of life, part of the natural cycle. Death powers represent the end, so they weaken and kill living things and undead alike. Because death powers have the death trait, they kill their targets outright, rather than leave them unconscious and alive. As undying incarnations of natural elements, eldamon aren't killed by death powers, though they're still harmed and depleted as normal for other damaging effects. This is fortunate when it comes to eldamon battles, as otherwise death eldamon would be banned from competing.

Final End: Death powers deal void damage to living creatures, draining away their life, but they deal force damage to undead instead, losing the death and void traits against undead. Even so, undead are sometimes immune to some of a death power's additional effects, such as instant death effects. Creatures neither alive nor dead, such as constructs, are beyond the reach of the death element.

Life Drain: Death powers take advantage of creatures with weakened life force, dealing more damage to those who are already drained. Whenever a death power applies the drained condition to a creature that's already drained, the drained creature takes additional void damage equal to its level multiplied by the lower of its existing drained condition and the new drained condition. For example, if a 9th-level creature with drained 2 would be drained 1 by a death power, it takes 9 additional void damage, and if a 7th-level creature with drained 2 would be drained 3 by a death power, it takes 14 additional void damage.

Associated Damage Type: Void

Associated Traits: Void

Prepare to Die!

Death eldamon and their powers can be scary for some foes, especially Inexorable Demise, with its visible countdown. Just like in any situation, the GM can choose to grant circumstance bonuses or penalties to certain types of actions taken in conjunction with death powers. For instance, it might be easier to Coerce someone with Quick Coerce if you're out of combat and they're under the effect of Inexorable Demise. As always, the GM determines when to grant these benefits.

Other Abilities

If your element is death, you gain the following abilities and effects from the Elemental Surge action, the Elemental Shield action, and the elemental avatar feats that vary by element.

Elemental Locomotion You can surround yourself with death energy as you move, forcing foes to get out of your way or suffer the consequences. As a single action, you can Stride while swathed in death energy. During this movement, you can attempt to move through a foe's space. The foe has a choice: they can either allow you to move through their space, or they can prevent your movement, taking 1 void damage plus 1 void damage for each level you have, with a basic Fortitude save. If a foe chooses to prevent your movement in this way, your movement immediately ends, even if you still had more distance you could travel.

Elemental Manipulation When you use Elemental Manipulation, you can control death in minor ways, allowing you to increase or decrease a creature's dying value by up to 2 or kill a tiny non-creature plant with just a touch. At your GM's discretion, you can make other small adjustments involving death, though this is never sufficient to kill a creature that isn't already dying.

Elemental Resistance Your body becomes resistant to death's call. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on saving throws against death effects and gain resistance equal to half your level against void damage. If you have the Enhanced Resistance feat, your circumstance bonus against death effects increases to +2.

Elemental Sculptor When you use the Elemental Sculptor feat, you can bring to a greater extent than Elemental Manipulation. This allows you to kill noncreature plants in an area roughly one 10-foot by 10-foot square or less up to 20 feet away or to kill a dying creature. At the GM's discretion, you can make other similar adjustments involving death and killing, though it's still insufficient to kill a creature that isn't already dying.

Elemental Senses You can sense how close a creature is to death. Just by looking at a creature, you can tell if they are healthy (above 3/4 Hit Points), hurt (between half and 3/4 Hit Points), injured (between 1/4 and half Hit Points) or at death's door (below 1/4 Hit Points). A creature actively attempting to disguise its life force or level of injury can attempt a Deception check against your Perception DC as normal, but otherwise your sense works without needing to attempt a check.

Elemental Shield The shield also grants a +1 circumstance bonus to Fortitude saves.

Elemental Surge The chosen creature is enfeebled 1 or clumsy 1 (your choice) for 1 round unless they succeed at a Fortitude save against your power DC.

Enhanced Locomotion Your connection to death allows you to appear by the side of recently or nearly dead creatures, almost like a psychopomp or harbinger of doom. As a single action, which has the move trait, you can briefly transition into death energy and then reappear in a space adjacent to any creature that is dying or has died in the past minute within 60 feet. You still need line of effect to the creature and you must be able to detect them with a precise sense, but you don't need to cross the intervening squares, allowing you to avoid obstacles and hazardous terrain, and this movement doesn't trigger reactions based on movement.

Wood Element.name: 木元素 Wood Element
Wood Element.description:
木元素体现了自然生长，如同你在整个植物界中随处可见的那样。因此，它专注于会生长的力量：通过在战场上播撒植物来逐步累积力量，以便之后收获这些植物以获得更强的效果。木元素使用者学习顺应生长的自然循环，并在播种与收获之间取得平衡，以达到最大效果。

相关伤害类型：穿刺

相关特性：植物，木

木关键术语

你几乎会在每个木元素力量中看到以下一个或两个术语。通常，一个木元素力量会让你选择播种或收获。

播种：当你选择播种时，你会使临时的枝叶或其他植物萌发：要么在该力量列出的地点萌发，要么默认在该力量的效果区域内萌发。你在地面上播撒植物。带有这些植物的区域总是困难地形，并且可能因力量而具有不同效果；这些植物会持续存在，直到你收获它们、它们被摧毁，或直到你刷新——以最先发生者为准。范围效果的火或冰伤害会摧毁你在该区域内播种的植物。你可以在原本自然就有植物的区域播种，但如果你在已经播种过植物的区域再次播种，则不会产生额外效果；若一次或两次播种的植物中有一者或两者因该力量而具有额外效果，你可以在重叠区域选择保留其中一种效果，但不能同时保留两种。

收获：你只能在你已播种植物的区域内，或在自然植被足够茂密以造成困难地形的区域内选择收获；否则，你必须在使用你的力量时选择播种。你不能使用其他生物的法术或能力所播种的植物。若你收获由你的木元素力量播种的植物，它们会消失；若你从自然植被中收获，植被仍会保留，但你在24小时内不能再次从该处收获，因为植物的元素木能量需要补充。通常，当你为某个力量进行收获时，该力量会因收获而给予你一个特殊增益，但某些力量会注明：你用它们播种的植物在被收获时具有额外增益。在这种情况下，你在收获该植物时会同时获得两种增益。

其他能力

如果你的元素是木，你会从“元素涌动”动作、“元素护盾”动作，以及因元素而异的元素化身专长中获得以下能力与效果。

元素机动 植物会为你让路，使你能轻松穿过它们。你无视由植物与真菌（例如灌木、藤蔓与灌丛）造成的任何困难地形或更严重的困难地形。即使是被魔法操控的植物与真菌，也无法阻碍你的前进。

元素操控 当你使用元素操控时，你可以以轻微的方式控制你周围的非生物植物，让它们健康生长、使花苞或花朵绽放、使植物枯萎，等等。由GM裁定，你也可以进行其他类似的微小调整。

元素抗力 植物对你会手下留情。你获得等于你等级一半的抗力，用于抵抗来自植物生物以及带有植物或木特性的效果所造成的伤害。若你拥有“强化抗力”专长，智力为–4或–5的植物生物通常不会攻击你，除非被另一个生物强迫如此。

元素塑形师 当你使用“元素塑形师”专长时，你能够以比元素操控更高的程度塑形并控制植物的位置。这使你能够用区域内的植物塑造粗略的形状与特性，每次大致塑造一个10尺×10尺的方格、且位于20尺内；随着时间推移，可能形成更大的雕塑；并且也允许你移动那些提供困难地形或掩蔽的植物来清出通道或制造障碍，其中也包括你用木元素力量播种的植物。由GM裁定，你也可以对植物进行其他类似调整。

元素感官 你获得“绿视”，使你能够透过活的植物（但不包括木墙、木门等）视物，如同它们是半透明一般，让你能看到另一侧有什么。

元素护盾 若在你的空间内（若你为大型或更大体型，则为你的任一空间）有你可以收获的植物，当敌人攻击你且将恰好命中你的AC时，你可以以自由动作（）收获你空间内的所有植物，将你AC的环境加值提高至2；若你是持有元素护盾的元素化身，则提高至3。提高后的环境加值适用于你在判定该次触发攻击结果时的AC，这通常会使该次攻击未命中。

元素涌动 你在5尺散发或30尺内的5尺爆发中进行播种。

强化机动 当你用你的力量创造植物时，你可以将自己变形为木元素能量在它们之间传送。以一个具有移动（特征）的单动作，你可以短暂转化为木能量，然后在一个你用该力量播种过植物的空间内，或其相邻空间中再现；无论哪种方式，该空间都必须在60尺内。你仍需要对该植物具有效果线，并且你必须能以精确感官侦测到该植物；但你不需要穿过中间的方格，从而能避开障碍与有害地形，并且此移动不会触发基于移动的反应动作（）。

The element of wood embodies natural growth, as seen all across the plant kingdom. Thus, it focuses on powers that grow, building up by sowing plants across the battlefield in order to harvest the plants later for a greater effect. Wood users learn to follow the natural cycle of growth and balance their sowing and harvesting for maximum effect.

Associated Damage Type: Piercing

Associated Traits: Plant, Wood

Wood Key Terms
