You’ll see one or both of the following terms in almost every wood elemental power. Typically, a wood power gives you the choice to sow or harvest.

Sow: When you choose to sow, you cause temporary foliage or other plants to sprout either in a location listed in the power, or in the power's area by default. You sow plants on the ground. Areas with these plants are always difficult terrain and might have different effects depending on the power, and the plants last either until you harvest them, until they are destroyed, or until you refresh, whichever comes first. Area of effect fire or ice damage destroys the plants you sowed in the area. You can sow plants in an area that already naturally has plants, but if you sow plants in an area that you already sowed plants, there's no additional effect; if one or both of the sowed plants had an additional effect depending on the power, you can choose one of the effects to keep in the overlapping area, but not both.

Harvest: You can only choose to harvest either in an area you've already sown plants or in an area that has thick enough natural vegetation to cause difficult terrain; otherwise, you must choose to sow with your power. You can't use plants sown by other creature's spells or abilities. If you harvest plants sown from your wood powers, they vanish, and if you harvest from natural vegetation, the vegetation remains, but you can't harvest from it again for 24 hours, as the plant's elemental wood energy replenishes. Normally, when you harvest for a power, that power grants you a special benefit for harvesting, but some powers indicate that the plants you sow with them have an additional benefit when harvested. In that case, you gain both benefits when harvesting that plant.

Other Abilities

If your element is wood, you gain the following abilities and effects from the Elemental Surge action, the Elemental Shield action, and the elemental avatar feats that vary by element.

Elemental Locomotion The plants get out of your way, allowing you to move through them with ease. You ignore any difficult or greater difficult terrain caused by plants and fungi, such as bushes, vines, and undergrowth. Even plants and fungi manipulated by magic don't impede your progress.

Elemental Manipulation When you use Elemental Manipulation, you can control non-creature plants around you in minor ways, allowing you to help them grow healthily, cause buds or flowers to open, make the plant wilt, and so on. At your GM's discretion, you can make other similar small adjustments.

Elemental Resistance Plants pull their punches against you. You gain resistance equal to half your level to damage from plant creatures and effects with the plant or wood traits. If you have the Enhanced Resistance feat, plant creatures with an Intelligence of –4 or –5 normally won't attack you unless compelled to do so by another creature.

Elemental Sculptor When you use the Elemental Sculptor feat, you can sculpt and control the position of plants to a greater extent than Elemental Manipulation. This allows you to create rough shapes and features out of plants in the area, roughly one 10-foot by 10-foot square at a time within 20 feet, potentially allowing for a larger sculpture over time, and also allows you to move around plants providing difficult terrain or cover to clear a path or create obstructions, including plants you sow with your wood powers. At the GM's discretion, you can make other similar adjustments to plants.

Elemental Senses You gain greensight, which allows you to see through living plants (though not wooden walls, doors, and the like) as if they were semi-transparent, allowing you to view what's on the other side.

Elemental Shield If there's a plant you can harvest in your space (or one of your spaces if you are Large or Larger), you can harvest all plants in your space as a free action when a foe attacks you and would hit your AC exactly, to increase the circumstance bonus to AC to 2, or 3 if you are an elemental avatar holding the elemental shield. The increased circumstance bonus applies to your AC when you're determining the outcome of the triggering attack, which normally makes the attack miss.

Elemental Surge You sow in either a 5-foot emanation or a 5-foot burst within 30 feet.

Enhanced Locomotion When you create plants using your powers, you can transform yourself into wood elemental energy to transport between them. As a single action, which has the move trait, you can briefly transition into wood energy and then reappear in a space where you sowed a plant with your power, or an adjacent space; either way, the space must be within 60 feet. You still need line of effect to the plant and you must be able to detect the plant with a precise sense, but you don't need to cross the intervening squares, allowing you to avoid obstacles and hazardous terrain, and this movement doesn't trigger reactions based on movement.

Sand Shroud.name: 沙之裹身 Sand Shroud
Sand Shroud.description:
当你被命中时，你用沙尘笼罩自己，使你免受后续攻击的影响而难以被看清。若一名生物以一次打击命中你，冲击会扬起一团沙尘，使你被沙尘所@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，直到该生物的回合结束。

When you're hit, you shroud yourself with sand that conceals you from follow-up attacks. If a creature hits you with a Strike, the impact launches a shroud of sand, causing you to become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} by the sand until the end of that creature's turn.

Legendary Elemental Potency.name: 传奇元素效能 Legendary Elemental Potency
Legendary Elemental Potency.description:
你与你所化身的艾达蒙真正合一，使你获得了远超艾达蒙自身潜能的澎湃力量。你在自身元素的元素力量DC上的熟练度等级提升至传奇。

Your true synthesis with the eldamon you embody brings you overflowing power beyond the eldamon's own potential. Your proficiency rank for elemental power DCs of your element increases to legendary.

Elemental Attack Mastery.name: 元素攻击精通 Elemental Attack Mastery
Elemental Attack Mastery.description:
你深度调谐自身与你的元素，使你能够以神秘且近乎本能的精准度瞄准你该元素的元素力量。你使用你元素的元素力量进行攻击掷骰的熟练度等级提升至大师。

You attune yourself deeply to your element, allowing you to aim your elemental powers with mystical and almost instinctual precision. Your proficiency rank for attack rolls with elemental powers of your element increases to master.

Scapegoat.name: 替罪羊 Scapegoat
Scapegoat.description:
每当一名相邻的盟友受到伤害，且你处于清醒状态并拥有超过 1 点生命值时，你失去 1 点生命值（或等同于伤害量的数值，以较小者为准），并将他们所受的伤害减少相同数值。若你在力量 DC 上为大师且拥有超过 2 点生命值，则你改为失去 2 点生命值而非 1 点。

Whenever an adjacent ally takes damage and you are conscious with more than 1 Hit Point, you lose 1 Hit Point (or the amount of damage, whichever is less) and reduce the damage they take by the same amount. If you are a master in power DCs and have more than 2 Hit Points, you lose 2 Hit Points instead of 1.

Elemental Attack Expertise.name: 元素攻击专精 Elemental Attack Expertise
Elemental Attack Expertise.description:
你学会谨慎地瞄准你的元素力量，以精确无比的准确度打击你的敌人。你在以你自身元素的元素力量进行攻击掷骰时的熟练度等级提升为专家。

You learn to aim your element powers carefully, striking your foes with pinpoint accuracy. Your proficiency rank for attack rolls with elemental powers of your element increases to expert.

Clinging Frost.name: 附着寒霜 Clinging Frost
Clinging Frost.description:
你召唤出的冰、霜与雪会持续存在，并黏附在其目标上。进行一个交互动作以降低 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结}状态的数值时，除非该生物为冻结 1，否则不会将冻结数值降低到 1 以下；随后该生物在 1 分钟内暂时免疫黏附霜冻。

The ice, frost, and snow you call forth lingers and sticks to its targets. An Interact action to reduce the value of the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen} condition doesn't reduce the frozen value below 1 unless the creature is frozen 1; the creature then becomes temporarily immune to clinging frost for 1 minute.

Telekinetic Storm.name: 念动力风暴 Telekinetic Storm
Telekinetic Storm.description:
无论你是想将你的力量力量伪装成另一种力量，还是只是喜欢把物体到处移动，你都会通过物体来施展力量力量，即便其他人会使用以太——由纺织而成的纯粹力量丝线。每当你的力量力量将要造成力场伤害时，你可以选择改为通过使用小型物体来造成钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害（由你选择）。如果该力量本来就会投掷一个物体并造成上述伤害类型之一，则你改为在伤害掷骰上获得+1状态加值；若你在力量DC上为专家，该状态加值提升至+2；若你在力量DC上为大师，提升至+3；若你在力量DC上为传奇，提升至+4。

Whether you're trying to disguise your force powers as a different kind of power or just enjoy moving objects around, you deliver force powers via objects even when others would use aether, pure threads of spun force. Any time your force power would deal force damage, you can choose to have it deal bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage instead (your choice) via the use of small objects. If the power would already throw an object and deal one of those damage types, you instead gain a +1 status bonus to the damage roll; this status bonus increases to +2 if you're an expert in power DCs, +3 if you're a master in power DCs, and +4 if you're legendary in power DCs.

Elemental Manipulation.name: 元素操控 Elemental Manipulation
Elemental Manipulation.description:
汲取你体内的元素能量，你可以操控周围的元素，作为一个两动作的行动，其具有专注（特征）、魔法（特征），以及与你的元素相关联的一个或多个特征。这使你能够产生你所选元素中列出的元素操控效果。

Drawing upon the elemental energies within you, you can manipulate the elements around you, as a two-action activity, which has the concentrate trait, the magical trait, and your element's associated trait or traits. This allows you to produce the elemental manipulation effect listed in your element.

Retributive Eruption.name: 惩戒喷发 Retributive Eruption
Retributive Eruption.description:
当一个生物以近战打击对你造成重击时，你背上的火山会喷发，对该生物造成 @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))[fire]] 伤害，数值等于你等级的一半，并以你的力量DC进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。

When a creature critically hits you with a melee Strike, the volcano on your back erupts, dealing @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))[fire]] damage to that creature equal to half your level, with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save using your power DC.

Scarab of Protection.name: 护卫圣甲虫 Scarab of Protection
Scarab of Protection.description:
你体内的生命能量保护你免受毒素、死亡与疾病之力的侵害。你在对抗毒素、死亡与疾病效果的豁免上获得+1环境加值。若你在对抗死亡效果的豁免中掷骰得到成功，则改为大成功或大失败。

The life energies within you protect you from the forces of poison, death, and disease. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against poison, death, and disease effects. If you roll a success on a saving throw against a death effect, you get a critical success instead.

Constant Bolts.name: 恒定闪电束 Constant Bolts
Constant Bolts.description:
只要你处于带电状态，你的电容器就会射出多余的闪电箭。任何在其回合结束时与你相邻的敌人会受到等同于你 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{带电}数值两倍的电击伤害；该伤害不会使其失去震慑状态。在第15等级时，该伤害提高为你带电数值的三倍。

As long as you're charged, your capacitors shoot off superfluous lightning bolts. Any foe that ends its turn adjacent to you takes an amount of electricity damage equal to twice your @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{Charged} value; this damage doesn't make it lose the shocked condition. At 15th level, this damage increases to three times your charged value.

Trained Eldamon.name: 受训 Eldamon Trained Eldamon
Trained Eldamon.description:
你与艾达盟之间拥有比其他人更深的形而上学连结，使你能以比大多数人更深的层次与它们建立联系。这让你能够训练艾达盟，甚至能与它们交换你的个人相位，从而从物质世界相位移出，让你的艾达盟得以相位移入。你在1级时拥有三只艾达盟，它们可以是你选择的任意普通艾达盟，或其他你拥有许可的艾达盟。你可以照常结交额外的艾达盟。每天在你的每日准备期间，选择数量等于3或你的关键属性调整值（取较小者）的艾达盟。你会与这些艾达盟共度更多时间，为在当天与这些艾达盟交换你的相位做准备。你的艾达盟会在你训练它们时与你一同获得等级，并在你每次升级时提高以匹配你的等级。结交一个等级高于你的艾达盟不太可能，即便你真的做到了，你也无法与它们共享你的相位。

由于当你与艾达盟交换你的个人相位时，你与艾达盟之间的形而上学连结，你们共享多重攻击减值和动作（尽管你通常无法行动），并且你可以代表它们使用你的英雄点。

艾达盟不同于凡人生物，它们不会死亡，即使看起来它们会被杀死。达到0生命值的艾达盟不会陷入昏迷或濒死；如果它们已相位移入，则只会相位移出并变得无反应。艾达盟在遭受任意数量的伤害后，会在一次遭遇结束后相位移出时恢复其全部生命值，除非它们曾被降至0生命值。若它们是被死亡效果以外的效果降至0生命值，则它们在遭遇结束后相位移出并持续至少1分钟后，恢复其全部生命值。若被死亡效果降至0生命值，艾达盟仍不会死亡，但它们收集能量所需的时间会更长。在这种情况下，它们会保持无反应并处于相位移出状态1小时。

你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.actions.Item.MEhjM8VvmsgbnOX8]{Phase Eldamon} 行动，而你的艾达盟获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.actions.Item.TwHFeP0ZNdzk8GCJ]{Tug Conduit} 动作。

You have a deeper metaphysical link to eldamon than others, allowing you to connect with them on a deeper level than most. This allows you to train eldamon and even to swap your personal phase with them, phasing out of the material world so your eldamon can phase in. You begin at 1st level with three eldamon, which can be either common eldamon of your choice or other eldamon to which you have access. You can befriend additional eldamon as normal. Each day during your daily preparations, choose a number of eldamon equal to 3 or your key attribute modifier, whichever is less. You spend extra time with those eldamon, preparing to swap your phase with those eldamon throughout the day. Your eldamon gain levels alongside you as you train them, increasing to match your level whenever you level up. It's unlikely to befriend an eldamon of higher level than you, and even if you do, you can't share your phase with them.

Due to your metaphysical connection to your eldamon when you've swapped your personal phase with them, you share multiple attack penalties and actions (though you normally can't act), and you can use your Hero Points on their behalf.

Eldamon aren't the same as mortal creatures, and they don't die, even when it seems like they would be killed. An eldamon that reaches 0 Hit Points doesn't become unconscious or dying; they just phase out if they were phased in and become unresponsive. An eldamon that takes any amount of damage recovers all of their Hit Points after being phased out after an encounter, unless they were reduced to 0 Hit Points. If they were reduced to 0 Hit Points by an effect other than a death effect, they recover all their Hit Points after being phased out after the encounter for at least 1 minute. If reduced to 0 Hit Points by a death effect, an eldamon still doesn't die, but it does take longer for them to collect their energy. In that case, they remain unresponsive and out of phase for 1 hour.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.actions.Item.MEhjM8VvmsgbnOX8]{Phase Eldamon} activity and your eldamon gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.actions.Item.TwHFeP0ZNdzk8GCJ]{Tug Conduit} action.

Red String of Fate.name: 命运红线 Red String of Fate
Red String of Fate.description:
你可以使用围巾上松散的线绳，在相当远的距离勾住敌人，将他们的命运与你系在一起。你可以在最远 20 尺的距离内对敌人使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{擒抱}。被你的围巾 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒制} 的敌人，在对抗你的死亡力量的强韧豁免时承受 –1 环境减值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.Rp6cajsVgmi0S5AY]{效果：命运红线}

You can use the unraveled strings of your scarf to latch onto foes at quite a distance, tying their fate to you. You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple} foes at a distance of up to 20 feet. Foes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} by your scarf take a –1 circumstance penalty to Fortitude saves against your death powers.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.Rp6cajsVgmi0S5AY]{Effect: Red String of Fate}

Retreat Into Shell.name: 缩入壳中 Retreat Into Shell
Retreat Into Shell.description:
作为单动作，你可以缩入你的壳中撤退。若你如此做，你获得对AC的+2环境加值，并且处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}。这些效果持续到你下个回合结束，不过你可以用单动作提前结束该效果。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.gwtf7QTAuTbNSQ3F]{效果：缩入壳中撤退}

As a single action, you can Retreat Into your Shell. If you do, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC and are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}. These effects last until the end of your next turn, though you can end the effect early with a single action.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.gwtf7QTAuTbNSQ3F]{Effect: Retreat Into Shell}

Shell Fortification.name: 贝壳筑垒 Shell Fortification
Shell Fortification.description:
你的甲壳使你免受危险的打击。你获得等同于你等级一半的对精准伤害的抗力，并且当一个生物对你造成大成功或大失败时，你可以尝试一次@Check[type:flat|dc:17]。检定成功时，该大成功或大失败改为普通命中。

Your shell fortifies you from dangerous blows. You gain resistance equal to half your level to precision damage, and when a creature critically hits you, you can attempt a @Check[type:flat|dc:17]. On a success, the critical hit becomes a normal hit instead.

Rending Claws.name: 撕裂爪击 Rending Claws
Rending Claws.description:
你的爪击与力量能更轻易地穿透坚固的物体。你的爪击打击与大地力量会无视等于你等级一半的硬度（最低1）；如常规所述，这对抗力没有效果。

Your claws and powers more easily dig through solid objects. Your claw Strikes and earth powers ignore an amount of Hardness equal to half your level (minimum 1); as normal, this has no effect on resistance.

Eldamon Whisperer.name: 埃尔达蒙低语者 Eldamon Whisperer
Eldamon Whisperer.description:
你感到自己与艾达蒙之间的联系比你所见过的任何人都更深。无论你觉得它们可爱、庄严，还是神秘，它们总是给你留下极其深刻的印象，而你内心的某种声音告诉你，你的命运与艾达蒙交织在一起。就艾达蒙而言，即使与其他艾达蒙训练师相比，它们也一直对你反应良好。

你在对艾达蒙进行“留下印象”的交涉检定、向艾达蒙“提出请求”的交涉检定，或使用你的元素援助职业特性时，获得+2环境加值。你在为建立你与自己艾达蒙的关系而进行的所有其他技能检定，或为直接与自己的艾达蒙进行交互以达到进化阈值而进行的技能检定，也获得+2环境加值；不过，这不适用于你在冒险过程中为了帮助达到进化阈值而进行的任何检定；例如，如果你需要给你的艾达蒙讲一个幽灵故事，则该加值适用于你讲幽灵故事时所进行的检定；但如果你需要寻找有价值的宝藏或在战斗中击败强大的敌人，则该环境加值不适用于你为此进行的检定。

此外，每当你在非敌对环境中遇到一只艾达蒙时——包括在击败它所附身的生物后进行的典型会面，或找到它所附身的物品后进行的典型会面——你都可以立即尝试一次交涉检定来对那只艾达蒙“留下印象”，而不必进行1分钟的交谈。你在该检定上承受–5减值。若你失败，你可以进行1分钟的交谈，并在该时间结束时尝试一次新的检定，而不是接受失败或大成功或大失败的结果。若你拥有“善于应酬”技能专长，且目标是一只艾达蒙，则你进行该检定时不承受该减值。

最后，你获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.actions.Item.JRM2xldo9FdB1NDT]{你能做到！}动作。

You feel a deeper connection to eldamon than anyone else you've met. Whether you find them adorable, majestic, or mysterious, they've always made a huge impression on you, and something inside you told you that your destiny was entwined with eldamon. For their part, eldamon have always reacted well to you, even compared to other eldamon trainers.

You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Diplomacy checks to Make an Impression on an eldamon, Make a Request of an eldamon, or use your elemental assistance class feature. You also gain the +2 circumstance bonus to all other skill checks made to build your relationship with your eldamon or to directly interact with your eldamon to reach an evolution threshold, though this doesn't apply to any checks you make during your adventures to help reach an evolution threshold; for example, if you needed to tell your eldamon a ghost story, the bonus would apply to the check you make to tell the ghost story, but if you needed to find valuable treasure or defeat a powerful enemy in battle, the circumstance bonus wouldn't apply to your checks to do so.

Additionally, whenever you meet an eldamon in a non-hostile environment, including as a typical meeting after defeating a creature it was inhabiting or finding an item it was inhabiting, you can immediately attempt a Diplomacy check to Make an Impression on that eldamon rather than needing to converse for 1 minute. You take a –5 penalty to the check. If you fail, you can engage in 1 minute of conversation and attempt a new check at the end of that time rather than accepting the failure or critical failure result. If you have the Glad-Hand skill feat, you don't take the penalty on your check if the target is an eldamon.

Finally, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.actions.Item.JRM2xldo9FdB1NDT]{You Can Do It!} Action.

Caduceus Flow.name: 蛇杖流 Caduceus Flow
Caduceus Flow.description:
当你帮助他人时，满溢的生命能量也会保护你。每当你使用一个生命力量，使一名或多名盟友受益，但你自己不受益时，你获得 1 点临时生命值，持续到你下个回合开始。若你在力量 DC 上为专家，则提升为 2 点临时生命值；若你在力量 DC 上为大师，则为 3 点临时生命值；若你在力量 DC 上为传奇，则为 4 点临时生命值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.MGO6Kpf2LdrYdMSA]{效果: 司杖之流}

When you help others, the overflowing life energy protects you as well. Whenever you use a life power that benefits one or more allies, but does not benefit yourself, you gain 1 temporary Hit Point until the beginning of your next turn. This increases to 2 temporary Hit Points if you're an expert in power DC, 3 temporary Hit Points if you're a master in power DC, and 4 temporary Hit Points if you're legendary in power DC.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.MGO6Kpf2LdrYdMSA]{Effect: Caduceus Flow}

Elemental Powers (5th).name: 元素力量（5环） Elemental Powers (5th)
Elemental Powers (5th).description:
你学会一个额外的元素力量，其必须为你的等级或更低。

You learn one additional elemental power, which must be of your level or lower.

Fire Element.name: 火元素 Fire Element
Fire Element.description:
火元素代表火焰吞噬一切的威能。因此，它围绕着能造成高伤害并附带持续火焰伤害的力量。所有元素之中，火造成的纯粹伤害最高，使火焰艾达蒙与元素化身能够将敌人化为灰烬。

双重灼烧：当你的敌人被你的火焰覆盖时，你可以催动那火焰使其燃烧得更猛烈。每当一个火焰力量或涌动对一个已因你的火焰力量或涌动而承受等同或更高持续火焰伤害的生物造成持续火焰伤害时，你改为造成等同于该新持续火焰伤害的火焰伤害。若导致该新持续火焰伤害的效果也会造成火焰伤害，则在应用弱点、抗力等之前，将双重灼烧造成的伤害与其一并相加。

关联伤害类型：火

关联特性：火

其他能力

若你的元素为火，你会从元素涌动动作（第70页）、元素护盾动作，以及随元素而变化的元素化身专长中获得以下能力与效果。

元素机动只要你站在坚固表面上，你就可以以单动作从体内喷射出一道火焰喷流（具有移动（特征）），进行一次火焰跳跃。这使你能够以直线向任意方向（甚至垂直向上）移动，距离最多至你的陆地速度。若你在一个无法承载你体重之处结束这次移动（例如在半空中），你可以在坠落前再进行一次不具有移动（特征）的单动作，或使用一个单个主动火焰力量。

元素操控当你使用元素操控时，你可以以细微的方式召唤并控制火焰，使你能从指尖制造小火花以点燃易燃物体、移动极其微小的火焰，或通过接触熄灭蜡烛及其他极小的火源。由你的GM酌情决定，你也可以对火焰进行其他细小的调整。

元素抗力你的身体逐渐适应火焰与高温。你会受到严酷环境高温的保护，并获得等同于你等级一半的火焰伤害抗力。若你拥有强化抗力专长，你也会受到极端环境高温的保护。

元素塑形师当你使用元素塑形师专长时，你能以比元素操控更强的程度移动并控制火焰。这使你能够将一个面积不超过10英尺×10英尺方形区域的火焰移动至多20英尺远，或塑造火焰的形状以改变其外观，例如让火焰看起来呈现为巨龙的形态。由GM酌情决定，你也可以对火焰的形状或位置进行其他类似调整。

元素感官火焰、烟雾及其各种余效不会对你的视野造成阻碍。你可以透过火焰、烟雾与热浪看见。它们不会削弱你的视野，而那些仅因火焰、烟雾或热浪而会处于隐蔽状态的生物，对你而言并不隐蔽。

元素护盾若敌人的近战攻击之所以未命中你，仅是因为元素护盾给予AC的环境加值，则护盾会灼烧敌人，使其受到等同于你等级一半的火焰伤害（最低1）。

元素涌动被选中的生物以对抗你力量DC的基础反射豁免，承受等同于你等级一半的持续火焰伤害（最低1）。若其已承受持续火焰伤害，则其改为以对抗你力量DC的基础反射豁免，受到等同于你等级一半的火焰伤害。

强化机动你可以继续喷射火焰喷流以进行飞行。你获得等同于你陆地速度的飞行速度，但以此方式飞行时，你不能使用元素机动所提供的单动作来进行火焰跳跃。

The element of fire represents the allconsuming might of flame. Thus, it's centered around powers that deal high damage along with persistent fire damage. Of all the elements, fire does the most raw damage, allowing fire eldamon and elemental avatar to turn their foes to ash.

Double Burn: When your foes are covered in your fire, you can push that fire to burn them more. Whenever a fire power or surge deals persistent fire damage to a creature that already has equal or more persistent fire damage from your fire powers or surges, you instead deal fire damage equal to the new persistent fire damage. If the effect that caused the new persistent fire damage also deals fire damage, add the damage from double burn together before applying weaknesses, resistances, and the like.

Associated Damage Type: Fire

Associated Traits: Fire

Other Abilities

If your element is fire, you gain the following abilities and effects from the Elemental Surge action (page 70), the Elemental Shield action, and the elemental avatar feats that vary by element.

Elemental Locomotion You can shoot off a jet of flame from your body as a single action, which has the move trait, to make a fire jump, as long as you are on a solid surface. This allows you to move in a straight line in any direction (even vertically), at a distance out to your land Speed. If you end the movement somewhere that can't support your weight, such as in mid-air, you can take a single additional action that doesn't have the move trait, or use a single active fire power, before falling.

Elemental Manipulation When you use Elemental Manipulation, you can call and control flames in minor ways, allowing you to create small sparks from your fingers that can ignite flammable objects, move very small flames, or put out candles and other extremely small fires by touch. At your GM's discretion, you can make other small adjustments to fires.

Elemental Resistance Your body becomes inured to flames and heat. You are protected from severe environmental heat and gain resistance equal to half your level against fire damage. If you have the Enhanced Resistance feat, you also become protected against extreme environmental heat.

Elemental Sculptor When you use the Elemental Sculptor feat, you can move and control flames to a greater extent than Elemental Manipulation. This allows you to move a fire with at most a 10-foot by 10-foot square area up to 20 feet away, or to sculpt the shape of a fire to change its aesthetic appearance, such as making the flames seem to take the shape of a dragon. At the GM's discretion, you can make other similar adjustments to a fire's shape or position.

Elemental Senses Flames, smoke, and their various aftereffects provide no impediment to your vision. You can see through fire, smoke, and heat haze. They don't impair your vision, and creatures who would be concealed only due to fire, smoke, or heat haze aren't concealed to you.

Elemental Shield If a foe misses their melee attack against you only because of the Elemental Shield's circumstance bonus to AC, the shield burns the foe, and they take fire damage equal to half your level (minimum 1).

Elemental Surge The chosen creature takes persistent fire damage equal to half your level (minimum 1) with a basic Reflex save against your power DC. If they already have persistent fire damage, they instead take fire damage equal to half your level with a basic Reflex save against your power DC.

Enhanced Locomotion You can continue shooting jets of flame in order to fly. You gain a fly Speed equal to your land Speed, but while flying in this way, you can't use the single action from elemental locomotion to make a fire jump.

Resurgent Awakening.name: 复苏觉醒 Resurgent Awakening
Resurgent Awakening.description:
你和你治疗的那些人从 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷} 中醒来时，会带着重新投入战斗所需的能量，就像一头结束冬眠的熊。每当你从 0 生命值被治疗并从昏迷或濒死（状态）醒来时，在你的下个回合，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{加速}，但只能用该动作来起立，或进行交互以捡起你在昏迷倒下时掉落的东西。每当你用生命力量将一名生物从 0 生命值治疗，并且他们从昏迷或濒死（状态）醒来时，他们获得相同的益处。

You and those you heal awake from @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconsciousness} with the energy you need to re-enter the fight, like a bear coming out of hibernation. Whenever you are healed from 0 Hit Points and wake up from the unconscious or dying condition, on your next turn, you are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} but can only use the action to Stand or to Interact to pick up something you dropped when you fell unconscious. Whenever you heal a creature from 0 Hit Points with a life power and they wake up from the unconscious or dying condition, they gain the same benefit.

Countless Spikes.name: 无数尖刺 Countless Spikes
Countless Spikes.description:
你的尖刺无处不在，即使你没有蜷缩起来也会构成威胁，而当你蜷缩起来时还会让你的敌人流血。试图对你进行近战徒手打击或非触及近战打击的生物（无论你是否蜷缩起来，且无论是否命中你）都会受到 @Damage[(1+(floor(@actor.level/4)))[piercing]] 伤害，并且在你超过1级后，每高4个等级再额外受到1点穿刺伤害，至多在19级时为5点伤害，对抗你的力量DC进行一次基础反射豁免。这会取代蜷缩带来的伤害。不过，如果你处于蜷缩状态，则反射豁免失败的生物还会受到等量的 @Damage[(1+(floor(@actor.level/4)))[persistent,bleed]] 伤害。

Your spikes are everywhere, presenting a threat even when you aren't curled up and making your foes bleed when you are. A creature that attempts a melee unarmed Strike or a non-reach melee Strike against you (whether or not you're Curled Up and whether or not it hits you) takes @Damage[(1+(floor(@actor.level/4)))[piercing]] damage, plus 1 additional piercing damage for every 4 levels you have beyond 1st, to a maximum of 5 damage at 19th level, with a basic Reflex save against your power DC. This replaces the damage from Curl Up. However, if you're Curled Up, a creature that fails their Reflex save also takes an equal amount of @Damage[(1+(floor(@actor.level/4)))[persistent,bleed]] damage.

Focused Training: Self-Sufficient Eldamo.name: 专注训练：自给自足的埃尔达蒙 Focused Training: Self-Sufficient Eldamon
Focused Training: Self-Sufficient Eldamo.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.YiWDPrJu3OAFrnTI]{专注训练} 授予

你训练你的艾达盟伙伴，以拓展他们掌握各种技能的能力。对你的每个艾达盟伙伴，为其选择成为强壮、盗窃能手、迷人、灵巧、自给自足、鬼祟或可怖之一。如果你的艾达盟已经拥有与你所选的专注训练相关的技能，则你的艾达盟改为获得另一项专注训练所关联的技能之一，作为艾达盟技能。与他们的其他艾达盟技能一样，你的艾达盟在从专注训练获得的技能上变为受训，并且该技能在第5等级提升为专家，随后在第11等级提升为大师。

  • 自给自足：你的艾达盟可以照料自己，并且能轻松追踪生物。他们获得生存作为一项艾达盟技能，以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.urQZwmzg2kS53vd5]{老练追踪者} 技能专长。

注：将此特性放置到你的艾达盟角色卡上

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.YiWDPrJu3OAFrnTI]{Focused Training}

You train your eldamon friends to broaden their capacity for various skills. For each of your eldamon friends, choose for them to become brawny, burglarious, enthralling, nimble, self-sufficient, sneaky, or terrifying. If your eldamon already has the skill associated with the focused training you chose, your eldamon gains one of the skills associated with another focused training as an eldamon skill instead. Like their other eldamon skills, your eldamon become trained in the skill gained from focused training, and the skill increases to expert at 5th level and then to master at 11th level.

  • Self-Sufficient: Your eldamon can handle themself and can track creatures easily. They gain Survival as an eldamon skill and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.urQZwmzg2kS53vd5]{Experienced Tracker} skill feat.

Note: Place this feature on your Eldamon actors

Phosphorescent Glow.name: 磷光辉光 Phosphorescent Glow
Phosphorescent Glow.description:
在你最初的闪光之后，你会留下短暂的磷光辉光。当你从光力量或涌动获得的 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{显映的} 状态结束时，一道淡蓝色的辉光会将目标显映额外 1 轮。此显映的状态并非源自原本的力量，因此不会施加该力量的任何额外效果。

After your initial flash of light, you leave a momentary phosphorescent glow. When the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{Limned} condition from your light power or surge ends, a pale blue glow limns the target for 1 additional round. This limned condition doesn't come from the original power, so it doesn't apply any additional effects from that power.

Lightning Rod Tail.name: 避雷针尾巴 Lightning Rod Tail
Lightning Rod Tail.description:
当一个电击效果以你30尺内的一名生物为目标，或包含一条距你30尺内的线时，如果该效果本可以以你为目标或将线瞄准以击中你，你可以选择尝试一次反制检定，使用你的力量DC – 10作为你的反制调整值，并以你等级的一半（向上取整）作为你的反制等级。若你成功，你不会结束该效果，而是迫使它以你为目标，或将其瞄准以包含你。若有多种方式可以做到这一点，则只要它们以你为目标或包含你，发起者就为所有其他决定作出选择。

When an electricity effect targets a creature within 30 feet of you or includes a line within 30 feet of you, if it could have targeted you or aimed the line to hit you, you can choose to attempt a counteract check using your power DC – 10 as your counteract modifier and half your level (rounded up) as your counteract level. If you succeed, instead of ending the effect, you force it to target you, or to aim to include you. If there are several ways to do so, the originator makes all other decisions as long as they target or include you.

Dazzling Sparkles.name: 炫目火花 Dazzling Sparkles
Dazzling Sparkles.description:
你的光比大多数更加闪耀与闪烁，使 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩（状态）} 状态更为严重。你因目眩状态而进行的隐藏纯骰检定的 DC 从 5 提高到 6（或对于 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.ZaRLdvBeedlpgwwr]{强化眩光} 反应动作（）则从 7 提高到 8。）

Your light sparkles and twinkles more extensively than most, causing the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} condition to be more severe. The DC for the concealment flat check from your dazzled condition increases from 5 to 6 (or from 7 to 8 for the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.ZaRLdvBeedlpgwwr]{Intensify Glare} reaction.)

Prism Power.name: 棱镜力量 Prism Power
Prism Power.description:
当你的敌人被光显映时，你的光力量会造成额外伤害。当一个生物具有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{显映的} 状态时，你以光力量对该生物造成的火伤害获得+1状态加值；若你在力量DC上为专家，则提升至+3；若你在力量DC上为大师，则提升至+4；若你在力量DC上为传奇，则提升至+5。

When your foe is limned in light, your light powers deal additional damage. While a creature has the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{Limned} condition, you gain a +1 status bonus to fire damage with light powers against that creature; this increases to +3 if you're an expert in power DCs, +4 if you're a master in power DCs, and +5 if you're legendary in power DCs.

Repel Light.name: 排斥光 Repel Light
Repel Light.description:
你运用镜子的力量击退被你的光中@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{显映的}敌人。你对抗被你的光力量或涌动所显映的敌人时，AC获得+1状态加值。

You use the power of mirrors to repel foes @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{Limned} in your light. You gain a +1 status bonus to AC against foes limned by your light powers or surges.

Elemental Powers (3rd).name: 元素力量（3级） Elemental Powers (3rd)
Elemental Powers (3rd).description:
你学会1个额外的元素力量，其必须为你的等级或更低。

You learn one additional elemental power, which must be of your level or lower.

Green Thumb.name: 绿拇指 Green Thumb
Green Thumb.description:
当你播种植物时，你会播种更多。任何时候你以一种力量进行播种时，在与你已经播种的区域相邻的一个方格中播种。如果你是力量DC的专家，你会在额外两个相邻方格中播种；如果你是力量DC的大师，你会在额外三个相邻方格中播种；如果你是力量DC的传奇，你会在额外四个相邻方格中播种。

When you sow plants, you sow more. Any time you sow with a power, sow in a square adjacent to the area where you already sowed. If you're an expert in power DC, you sow in two additional adjacent squares, if you're a master in power DC, you sow in three additional adjacent squares, and if you're legendary in power DC, you sow in four additional adjacent squares.

Weapon Expertise.name: 武器专精 Weapon Expertise
Weapon Expertise.description:
你已献身于学习你武器的精妙之处。你在简易武器和徒手攻击上的熟练度等级提升至专家。

You've dedicated yourself to learning the intricacies of your weapons. Your proficiency ranks for simple weapons and unarmed attacks increase to expert.

Elemental Powers (15th).name: 元素力量（15级） Elemental Powers (15th)
Elemental Powers (15th).description:
你学习1个额外的元素力量，其必须为你的等级或更低。

You learn one additional elemental power, which must be of your level or lower.

Reflex Expertise.name: 反射专精 Reflex Expertise
Reflex Expertise.description:
你的反射神经快如闪电。你的反射豁免熟练度等级提升至专家。

Your reflexes are lightning fast. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to expert.

Curl Up.name: 蜷缩 Curl Up
Curl Up.description:
以单动作，你可以蜷缩。若你这么做，你获得 AC +2 环境加值（或者若你已经有标准掩蔽，则将你的标准掩蔽提升为强效掩蔽），并且处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}，无法进行徒手攻击，且除反应力量外不能使用力量。当你蜷缩时，以近战徒手打击或非触及的近战打击命中你的生物会受到 @Damage[(1+(floor(@actor.level/4)))[piercing]] 伤害，此外，你在 1级以上每有 4 个等级就额外受到 1 点穿刺伤害，至多在 19级时为 5 点伤害，并需以你的力量 DC 进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。这些效果持续至你下个回合结束，但你可以用单动作提前结束该效果。

As a single action, you can Curl Up. If you do, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC (or increase your standard cover to greater cover if you already have standard cover) and are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, can't make unarmed attacks, and can't use powers except reaction powers. A creature that hits you with a melee unarmed Strike or a non-reach melee Strike while you're curled up takes @Damage[(1+(floor(@actor.level/4)))[piercing]] damage, plus 1 additional piercing damage for every 4 levels you have beyond 1st, to a maximum of 5 damage at 19th level, with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save against your power DC. These effects last until the end of your next turn, though you can end the effect early with a single action.

Focused Training: Nimble Eldamon.name: 专注训练：灵巧的艾达蒙 Focused Training: Nimble Eldamon
Focused Training: Nimble Eldamon.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.YiWDPrJu3OAFrnTI]{Focused Training} 赋予

你训练你的Eldamon伙伴，以拓展他们在各种技能上的能力。对你的每一位Eldamon伙伴，为其选择成为强壮、擅闯、蛊惑、灵巧、自给自足、鬼祟或骇人之一。若你的Eldamon已拥有你所选择的专注训练所对应的技能，则你的Eldamon改为获得另一种专注训练所对应的技能之一，作为Eldamon技能。与他们的其他Eldamon技能一样，你的Eldamon在通过专注训练获得的技能上变为受训，并且该技能在第5等级提升为专家，随后在第11等级提升为大师。

  • 灵巧：你的Eldamon格外灵巧，并且总是能稳稳落地。他们获得特技动作作为一项Eldamon技能，以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.LQw0yIMDUJJkq1nD]{Cat Fall} 技能专长。

注：将此特性放置在你的Eldamon角色卡上

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.YiWDPrJu3OAFrnTI]{Focused Training}

You train your eldamon friends to broaden their capacity for various skills. For each of your eldamon friends, choose for them to become brawny, burglarious, enthralling, nimble, self-sufficient, sneaky, or terrifying. If your eldamon already has the skill associated with the focused training you chose, your eldamon gains one of the skills associated with another focused training as an eldamon skill instead. Like their other eldamon skills, your eldamon become trained in the skill gained from focused training, and the skill increases to expert at 5th level and then to master at 11th level.

  • Nimble: Your eldamon is especially nimble and always lands on their feet. They gain Acrobatics as an eldamon skill and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.LQw0yIMDUJJkq1nD]{Cat Fall} skill feat.

Note: Place this feature on your Eldamon actors

Shovelling Dig.name: 铲掘 Shovelling Dig
Shovelling Dig.description:
你可以用你的铲状尾巴迅速在战场上挖掘前进。你获得20英尺的掘地速度，使你能够挖穿松软的大地以及其他类似质地的表面。

You can use your shovel tail to quickly dig your way across the battlefield. You gain a 20 foot burrow Speed, allowing you to dig through soft earth and other surfaces of similar consistency.

Elemental Powers.name: 元素力量 Elemental Powers
Elemental Powers.description:
你体内的艾达兽会根据你的元素赐予你不可思议的力量。力量（也称为元素力量）是一种特殊的魔法能力类型，与法术不同。作为一名元素化身，你使用力量与敌人战斗。一旦你使用了一个力量，通常在你进行刷新（见 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.QsiJY2HP4WuA7Ntt.JournalEntryPage.eRfWb2pyr5IQMdrf#using-and-refreshing-powers]{使用与刷新力量}）以补充你的力量之前，你不能再次使用该力量，不过这个限制不适用于刷新力量。力量在攻击与DC方面有各自独立的熟练度，它们与法术、职业DC、武器或徒手熟练度并不相同。然而，若你的力量DC更高，你可以用你的力量DC替代基于你职业DC的能力所需的职业DC。作为元素化身，你将强力打击缠手布提供的物品加值加入你以元素力量进行的攻击掷骰，但强击符文与属性符文没有效果。你也可以选择灌注一把魔法武器，以改为将该武器的效力符文提供的攻击掷骰物品加值加入你的力量攻击掷骰。你的力量DC与力量攻击调整值基于你的关键属性：感知。

作为一名新的元素化身，你学会一个1级反应力量、一个1级刷新力量，以及另外两个1级力量。你学会的所有元素力量，无论来自此特性还是其他来源，都必须是你所属元素的力量或通用力量。每天在你的每日准备期间，你可以选择四个力量进行准备；其中一个必须是反应力量，一个必须是刷新力量，另外两个可以是任意类型的力量（主动、反应或刷新），不过多数元素化身会选择主动力量，以便在不刷新时能支撑更久。当你刚开始时，你只知道四个力量，因此你每天都会选择那同样的力量，但随着你的等级提升，你会学会更多力量。

在3级、5级、7级、9级、11级、13级、15级以及17级时，你额外学会一个元素力量，其必须为你的等级或更低等级。到19级时，你改为学会一个终极力量（更多细节见终极力量职业特性）。

The eldamon within you grants you incredible powers based on your element. Powers, also known as elemental powers, are a special type of magical ability, different from spells. As an elemental avatar, you use powers to battle your foes. Once you use a power, you normally can't use that power again until you Refresh (see @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.QsiJY2HP4WuA7Ntt.JournalEntryPage.eRfWb2pyr5IQMdrf#using-and-refreshing-powers]{Using and Refreshing Powers}) to replenish your powers, though that limit doesn't apply to refresh powers. Powers have separate proficiencies for attacks and DCs, which aren't the same as spells, class DCs, or weapon or unarmed proficiencies. However, you can use your power DC in place of your class DC for abilities based on your class DC, if it's higher. As an elemental avatar, you add the item bonus to attack rolls from handwraps of mighty blows to your attack rolls with elemental powers, though striking runes and property runes have no effect. You can also choose to Invest a magic weapon in order to add the item bonus to attack rolls from the weapon's potency rune to your power attack rolls instead. Your power DC and power attack modifier are based on your key attribute, Wisdom.

As a new elemental avatar, you learn one 1st level reactive power, one 1st level refresh power, and two other 1st level powers. All elemental powers you learn, from this feature or elsewhere, must be powers from your element, or universal powers. Each day during your daily preparations, you can choose four powers to prepare; one must be a reactive power, one must be a refresh power, and the other two can be any type of power (active, reactive, or refresh), though most elemental avatars choose active powers so that they can go longer without refreshing. When you're just starting out, you only know four powers, so you'll pick those same powers each day, but you learn more powers as you increase in level.

At 3rd level, 5th level, 7th level, 9th level, 11th level, 13th level, 15th level, and 17th level, you learn one additional elemental power, which must be of your level or lower. At 19th level, you instead learn an ultimate power (see the ultimate power class feature for more details).

Eldamon.name: 艾尔达蒙 Eldamon
Eldamon.description:
当添加该族裔时，此艾达蒙职业物品会自动添加到艾达蒙中。

This eldamon class item is added automatically to eldamon when adding the ancestry.

Advanced Training.name: 进阶训练 Advanced Training
Advanced Training.description:
你与自己的艾达蒙在多种技巧上进行了大量训练，而所有这些训练都通过提升它们的多样性得到了回报。你的艾达蒙在未受训技能上的熟练度加值变为等同于它们的等级。此外，你的艾达蒙获得四次属性提升，分别施加在它们四项最低的属性上。这通常会将它们四项最低的调整值从+2、+1、+0和–1提升为+3、+2、+1和+0。

你的艾达蒙在第5等级时还会获得若干其他熟练度与能力，包括能够学习一个额外力量的容量，尽管即使你没有这个职业特性，它也仍会如此。

通过并肩训练，你提升的不只是你的艾达蒙的能力，也提升了你自己的能力。这使你每天可以准备将四只艾达蒙进入相位，而非三只，只要你的关键属性调整值至少为+4。

You've trained with your eldamon extensively in a variety of techniques, and all that training paid off by increasing their versatility. Your eldamons' proficiency bonus to their untrained skills becomes equal to their level. Additionally your eldamon gain four attribute boosts, one to each of their four lowest attributes. This typically increases their four lowest modifiers from +2, +1, +0, and –1 to +3, +2, +1, and +0.

Your eldamon also gain several other proficiencies and abilities at 5th level, including the capacity to learn an additional power, although it does so even if you don't have this class feature.

By training side by side, you improve your own capabilities, not just your eldamons'. This allows you to prepare to phase four eldamon each day, instead of three, as long as your key attribute modifier is at least +4.

Rainbow Light.name: 彩虹光 Rainbow Light
Rainbow Light.description:
当你用你的光力量造成伤害时，不再造成火伤害，而是掷骰 [[/r 1d8]]。结果为：

1 光为红色，你的力量造成火伤害
2 光为橙色，你的力量造成酸蚀伤害
3 光为黄色，你的力量造成电击伤害
4 光为绿色，你的力量造成毒素伤害
5 光为蓝色，你的力量造成音波伤害
6 光为靛色，你的力量造成精神伤害
7 光为紫罗兰色，你的力量造成力场伤害
8 你从7种颜色与伤害类型中选择一种。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.wHJXoM6YjRi0sfFj]

如果你的力量造成持续伤害，你仍然只掷骰一次来决定光的颜色，并在该力量的持续时间内造成该伤害类型。

When you deal damage with your light powers, instead of dealing fire damage, roll [[/r 1d8]]. On a:

1 the light is red and your power deals fire damage
2 the light is orange and your power deals acid damage
3 the light is yellow and your power deals electricity damage
4 the light is green and your power deals poison damage
5 the light is blue and your power deals sonic damage
6 the light is indigo and your power deals mental damage
7 the light is violet and your power deals force damage
8 you choose one of the 7 colors and damage types.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.wHJXoM6YjRi0sfFj]

If your power deals damage over time, you still only roll once to determine the color of the light and deal that damage type for the duration of the power.

Questing Beast.name: 探索兽 Questing Beast
Questing Beast.description:
你可以成为引导他人抵达其使命的指路星，也可以成为将其引入歧途的鬼火。以一个具有专注与心灵（特征）的单动作，你可以对30尺内一名生物的察觉DC或意志DC（取较低者）进行一次欺瞒检定。成功时，你选择：在1轮内让其下一次察觉检定或意志豁免获得+1环境加值，或使其在1轮内@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}。大成功时，你可以给予+2环境加值，或使该生物@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}。

@Check[type:deception|defense:perception]{欺瞒（察觉DC）}

@Check[type:deception|defense:will]{欺瞒（意志DC）}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.QY2ivwj9QhtfSXMR]{效果：Questing Beast（有益效果）}

You can be a guiding star for others to reach their quest or a will-o'-wisp leading them astray. As a single action, which has the concentrate and mental trait, you can attempt a Deception check against the lower of the Perception DC or Will DC of a creature within 30 feet. On a success, you choose whether to give them a +1 circumstance bonus on their next Perception check or Will save within 1 round or to make them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round. On a critical success, you can grant a +2 circumstance bonus or make the creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}.

@Check[type:deception|defense:perception]{Deception (Perception DC)}

@Check[type:deception|defense:will]{Deception (Will DC)}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.QY2ivwj9QhtfSXMR]{Effect: Questing Beast (Beneficial Effects)}

Expert Elemental Potency.name: 专家级元素强度 Expert Elemental Potency
Expert Elemental Potency.description:
当你调谐至你灵魂中艾达蒙的力量时，你的元素力量提升。你元素的元素力量DC的熟练度等级提升至专家。

As you attune to the power of the eldamon within your soul, your elemental power increases. Your proficiency rank for elemental power DCs of your element increases to expert.

Puppet Tail.name: 傀儡尾巴 Puppet Tail
Puppet Tail.description:
你的尾巴可以引诱敌人疏于防备并分散他们的注意力。作为一个单动作，你可以尝试进行一次 @Check[type:performance|defense:perception] 检定，对抗一个生物的察觉DC，使其在成功时直到你下个回合结束前变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。

如果你尝试一次尾巴打击，在结算该打击后，除非该打击为大成功或大失败中的失败，否则目标直到你回合结束前变为Off-Guard。当一个敌人因你的尾巴而处于Off-Guard时，你的移动不会触发该敌人基于移动的反应动作（（））（例如反应式打击以及类似的反应动作（（））。

Your tail can lure foes off guard and distract them. As a single action, you can attempt a @Check[type:performance|defense:perception] check against a creature's Perception DC, causing them to become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the end of your next turn on a success.

If you attempt a tail Strike, after resolving the Strike, the target becomes off-guard until the end of your turn unless the Strike was a critical failure. While a foe is off-guard due to your tail, your movements don't trigger reactions from that foe based on movement (such as Reactive Strikes and similar reactions).

Regal Nemes.name: 王者涅墨斯 Regal Nemes
Regal Nemes.description:
你闪亮的头饰最终证明了你真正的尊贵与华丽，同时保护你免受那些试图窃取你主权的效果。你对抗情绪效果，以及施加 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{被控制（状态）} 状态的效果时的豁免获得+1环境加值。若你对抗此类效果的豁免掷骰取得成功，则改为大成功或大失败中的大成功。

Your shiny headdress proves you once and for all as truly regal and magnificent, while protecting you from effects that would seek to steal your sovereignty. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against emotion effects and effects that apply the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled} condition. If you roll a success on a saving throw against such an effect, you get a critical success instead.

Magical Disruption.name: 魔法扰乱 Magical Disruption
Magical Disruption.description:
你那令敌人呆滞的力量对施法的干扰强于寻常。因你的心智力量而陷入呆滞时，施放法术所需的纯骰检定DC从5加上呆滞（状态）的数值，提高为7加上呆滞（状态）的数值。

Your powers that stupefy foes disrupt spellcasting more than normal. The flat check DC to Cast a Spell while stupefied by your mind powers increases from 5 plus the stupefied condition's value to 7 plus the stupefied condition's value.

Calling.name: 感召 Calling
Calling.description:
每位艾达蒙训练师都有一个感召。感召对应着艾达蒙训练师在大地上旅行并与艾达蒙结交的理由，但它不只是一个理由。那些缺乏惊人的意志与绝对的确信、无法将自己的感召贯彻到底的人，很少能显现出与艾达蒙足够强的联系，以至于能让他们与艾达蒙分享他们自己个人的相位。

Every eldamon trainer has a calling. A calling corresponds to the reason the eldamon trainer travels the land befriending eldamon, but it’s more than just a reason. Those without the incredible will and absolute certainty to see their calling through rarely manifest a connection to eldamon strong enough to allow them to share their own personal phase with an eldamon.

Bone Mantle.name: 白骨斗篷 Bone Mantle
Bone Mantle.description:
你被保护性的骨骼覆盖，防止最糟的情况发生。你的防护骨质披风使你对大成功或大失败的攻击获得等同于你等级一半（最低1）的抗力。此抗力不能将一次大成功或大失败的攻击所造成的伤害降低到低于一次普通命中所造成的伤害。

Your covered in protective bones that prevent the worst from happening. Your protective bone mantle grants you resistance equal to half your level (minimum 1) to critical hits. This resistance can't reduce the damage from a critical hit lower than the damage from a normal hit.

Spectral Flame.name: 幽焰 Spectral Flame
Spectral Flame.description:
你可以像鬼火一样移动在你鹿角之间跳动的幽魂火焰。幽魂火焰在60尺内提供微光照明。作为自由动作（），每回合一次，你可以将火焰关闭或开启，或将火焰移动至多60尺。只要火焰在你的空间内，你在进行欺瞒检定以使用你的追寻兽能力时获得+2环境加值。

You can move the spectral flame that dances between your antlers like a will-o'-wisp. The spectral flame provides dim illumination within 60 feet. As a free action, once per turn, you can turn the flame off or on, or move the flame up to 60 feet. As long as the flame is in your space, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Deception checks to use your questing beast ability.

Elemental Powers (7th).name: 元素力量（第7级） Elemental Powers (7th)
Elemental Powers (7th).description:
你学会一个额外的元素力量，其必须为你的等级或更低。

You learn one additional elemental power, which must be of your level or lower.

Surging Currents.name: 奔涌的水流 Surging Currents
Surging Currents.description:
当你用你的水力量移动一名敌人至少10英尺时，你可以将其额外移动最多5英尺；当你用你的水力量移动一名敌人至少30英尺时，你可以将其额外移动最多10英尺。

When you move a foe at least 10 feet with your water powers, you can move them up to 5 additional feet, and when you move a foe at least 30 feet with your water powers, you can move them up to 10 additional feet.

Exploit Lapse.name: 利用破绽 Exploit Lapse
Exploit Lapse.description:
你的心智力量对因困惑或恐惧而使心智易受影响的生物造成更多伤害。你使用心智力量造成的伤害获得状态加值，其数值等于目标生物来自任何来源的迟钝值与你的心智力量、你的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{挫志}，或如果你是艾尔达蒙则来自你的凡人朋友的挫志所施加的恐惧值之中较高者，最多为+2。若你在力量DC上为专家，则你使用心智力量造成的伤害的最大状态加值为+3。若你为大师，则只要生物处于任意数值的恐惧或迟钝状态，状态加值便增加1，总上限为+5；若你为传奇，则只要生物处于任意数值的恐惧或迟钝状态，状态加值总共增加2，总上限为+6。

Your mind powers deal more damage to creatures whose mind is vulnerable due to being befuddled or afraid. You gain a status bonus to damage with your mind powers equal to the highest of a creature's stupefied value from any source or their frightened value they received from your mind powers, your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize}, or your mortal friend's Demoralize if you're an eldamon, to a maximum of +2. If you're an expert in power DCs, the maximum status bonus to damage with your mind powers is +3. If you're a master, the status bonus increases by 1 as long as a creature is either frightened or stupefied at any value, to a total maximum of +5, and if you're legendary, the status bonus increases by a total of 2 as long as a creature is frightened or stupefied at any value, to a total maximum of +6.

Attuned Avatar.name: 调谐化身 Attuned Avatar
Attuned Avatar.description:
你已经与体内的艾尔达蒙深度调谐，使你获得了同时处理更多元素力量的能力。你每天可以准备第五个元素力量，其可以为主动、反应或刷新。你学习一个额外的元素力量，这与您从元素力量职业特性在第5等级学习到的力量是累加的。

You've attuned deeply with the eldamon within you, granting you the ability to process more elemental power at once. You can prepare a fifth elemental power each day, which can be active, reactive, or refresh. You learn an additional elemental power, which is cumulative with the power you learn at 5th level from your elemental power class feature.

Mortal Friend.name: 凡人挚友 Mortal Friend
Mortal Friend.description:
这只Eldamon有一位凡人朋友。

This eldamon has a mortal friend.

Mental Assistance.name: 精神援助 Mental Assistance
Mental Assistance.description:
你的力量锁定敌人的弱点，帮助你的盟友打击你的敌人。在你对一个或多个敌人使用一次主动心灵力量后，选择一个你用力量攻击掷骰成功命中的敌人，或在对抗你的力量时其豁免失败的敌人。在你下个回合前，对该敌人进行攻击掷骰的下一名盟友，其攻击掷骰获得+1环境加值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.kIks4KlAUBGzzbdO]{效果：心灵协助}

Your powers hone in on the enemies' weak points to help your allies strike your foes. After you use an active mental power against one or more foes, choose one foe that you successfully hit with a power attack roll or that failed their saving throw against your power. Your next ally to make an attack roll against that foe before your next turn gains a +1 circumstance bonus to their attack roll.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.kIks4KlAUBGzzbdO]{Effect: Mental Assistance}

Dry Bones.name: 枯骨 Dry Bones
Dry Bones.description:
你的骷髅形态保护你免受各种伤害。你获得5点抗力，适用于寒冷、电击、火、穿刺和挥砍。

Your skeletal form protects you from various forms of harm. You gain resistance 5 against cold, electricity, fire, piercing, and slashing.

Kite Tail.name: 风筝尾巴 Kite Tail
Kite Tail.description:
你彩虹色的风筝尾巴可以迷住敌人，迫使他们把注意力集中在你身上。你可以用你的风筝尾巴来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EEDElIyin4z60PXx]{Perform}，进行一次表演检定，对抗30尺内一个生物的意志DC。若成功，该生物对你处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} 状态，持续1轮；若大成功或大失败，则持续2轮。

Your rainbow-colored kite tail can fascinate foes, forcing them to focus their attention on you. You can use your kite tail to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EEDElIyin4z60PXx]{Perform}, rolling a Performance check against the Will DC of a single creature within 30 feet. On a success, that creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} with you for 1 round, or for 2 rounds on a critical success.

Greater Trainer's Heart.name: 高等训练师之心 Greater Trainer's Heart
Greater Trainer's Heart.description:
你与艾尔达蒙朋友们的羁绊达到了新的等级。你的意志豁免的熟练度等级提升至传奇。当你在意志豁免中掷骰获得成功时，你获得大成功或大失败。当你在意志豁免中掷骰获得大成功或大失败时，你改为获得失败。当你在对抗造成伤害的效果的意志豁免中掷骰获得失败时，你承受一半伤害。

Your bonds with your eldamon friends reach a new level. Your proficiency rank for Will saves increases to legendary. When you roll a success on a Will save, you get a critical success. When you roll a critical failure on a Will save, you get a failure instead. When you roll a failure on a Will save against a damaging effect, you take half damage.

Elemental Powers (11th).name: 元素力量（11级） Elemental Powers (11th)
Elemental Powers (11th).description:
你学会一个额外的元素力量，其必须为你的等级或更低。

You learn one additional elemental power, which must be of your level or lower.

Crystalline Guard.name: 晶簇守卫 Crystalline Guard
Crystalline Guard.description:
触发 你的回合结束

遍布你全身的众多水晶使大地能量能轻易流经你，并储存在水晶之中，以便在需要时释放。在你的回合结束时，你可以选择耗尽能量，获得+2环境加值至你的AC，持续至你下个回合开始。若你这么做，在你至少刷新三次以补充缺失的能量之前，你不能再次这么做。由于你在一次遭遇结束后会立刻刷新，你也可以迅速补充你的水晶守卫。

Trigger Your turn ends

The many crystals throughout your body allow earth energy to flow through you easily and store within the crystals to release when needed. At the end of your turn, you can choose to deplete your energy to gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your AC until the beginning of your next turn. If you do, you can't do so again until you refresh at least three times to replenish the missing energy. Since you refresh instantly after an encounter, you can also replenish your crystalline guard swiftly.

Sinuous Backflow.name: 蜿蜒回流 Sinuous Backflow
Sinuous Backflow.description:
当你使用一个区域水力量时，如果你在该区域内，或者你的区域水力量从你的方格发出（例如线状或锥形（区域）力量），你可以选择让你的力量使你移动任意与你的盟友可选择移动的相同距离。然而，你的移动方向与其他生物相反。例如，这意味着你会从高潮线状或锥形（区域）向后并远离地移动，进一步拉开你与任何被推开的敌人的距离；并会朝向低潮线状或锥形（区域）移动，进一步接近那些被拉向你的敌人。如果该区域力量是爆发或放射，且以你为中心，则无论潮汐如何，你都可以选择朝任意方向移动。

When you use an area water power, if you're in the area, or your area water power originates from your square (such as a line or cone area power), you can choose to let your power move you any of the same distances your allies can choose to move. However, you move in the opposite direction as the other creatures. For example, this means you move back and away from a high tide line or cone, further distancing yourself from any foes who were pushed back, and toward a low tide line or cone, further approaching foes who were pulled toward you. If the area power is a burst or an emanation, and it's centered on you, you can move in whichever direction you choose regardless of the tide.

Riding a Pale Horse.name: 骑一匹苍白的马 Riding a Pale Horse
Riding a Pale Horse.description:
你的基础陆地速度为40尺，而非25尺。此增益已反映在你的数据中。

Your base land Speed is 40 feet instead of 25 feet. This benefit is already reflected in your statistics.

Silken Puff.name: 丝绸绒团 Silken Puff
Silken Puff.description:
你让自己被一团轻盈的丝雾包围，为你提供类似于对远程攻击和造成伤害的区域效果的掩蔽。该丝雾使你在对抗远程攻击的AC以及对抗造成伤害的效果的反射豁免上获得+1环境加值。

You surround yourself in a puff of airy silk, providing you something akin to cover against ranged attacks and damaging area effects. The puff grants you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC against ranged attacks and to Reflex saves against damaging effects.

Drink Breath.name: 饮用吐息 Drink Breath
Drink Breath.description:
当你在附近时，你会饮下垂死敌人的最后一口吐息。如果一个敌人在你5英尺内死亡，或者你移动到一个在上一轮内死亡的敌人5英尺内，你可以以自由动作窃取他们的最后一口吐息。若你这样做，你获得[[/r max(@actor.level,1)]]点临时生命值，等于你的等级，持续1轮。

You drink the last breath of a dying foe when you're nearby. If a foe dies within 5 feet of you, or if you move within 5 feet of a foe who died in the last round, you can steal their last breath as a free action. If you do, you gain [[/r max(@actor.level,1)]] temporary Hit Points equal to your level, which last for 1 round.

Alertness.name: 警觉 Alertness
Alertness.description:
你始终对周遭的威胁保持警觉。你的察觉熟练度等级提升至专家。

You remain alert to threats around you. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to expert.

Mane of Shadow.name: 暗影鬃毛 Mane of Shadow
Mane of Shadow.description:
在昏暗光照中，你的暗影鬃毛会保护性地在你周围盘旋。在昏暗光照中时，你获得AC+1环境加值；如果你在昏暗光照中使用移动动作进行移动时受到攻击，该环境加值提升至+3。

Your mane of shadow swirls around you protectively in dim light. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC when in dim light, which increases to a +3 circumstance bonus if you're attacked while you're using a move action to move in dim light.

Thousand Breaths.name: 千次吐息 Thousand Breaths
Thousand Breaths.description:
你从终末吐息中吸收的无数生命精华从你的身体中涌现，伤害那些攻击你的敌人。一个以近战徒手打击或非触及近战打击命中你的生物会受到 @Damage[(max(@actor.level/2,1))[void]] 伤害，数值等于你等级的一半（最低1），并以你的力量DC进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。

The countless life essences you've absorbed from final breaths emerge from your body, harming foes who attack you. A creature that hits you with a melee unarmed Strike or a non-reach melee Strike takes @Damage[(max(@actor.level/2,1))[void]] damage equal to half your level (minimum 1), with a @Check[fortitude|against:eldamon|basic:true] save against your power DC.

Shadow Eruption.name: 暗影喷发 Shadow Eruption
Shadow Eruption.description:
当你使用黑暗力量时，你的手掌上方会爆发出冰冷、无光的黑暗能量火焰。每当你使用一次黑暗力量时，在接下来的1轮内，任何以近战徒手打击或非触及的近战打击命中你的生物都会受到@Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))[cold]]点寒冷伤害，数值等于你等级的一半（最低1），并可进行一次@Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true]豁免，对抗你的力量DC。

The top of your hand body erupts with cold lightless flames of darkness energy when you use darkness powers. Whenever you use a darkness power, for 1 round, a creature that hits you with a melee unarmed Strike or a non-reach melee Strike takes @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))[cold]] damage equal to half your level (minimum 1), with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save against your power DC.

Scarf Glide.name: 围巾滑翔 Scarf Glide
Scarf Glide.description:
你的围巾使你能够在空气中滑翔。作为一个具有移动（特征）的单动作，你朝向地面移动5尺，并在空气中移动至多25尺。与飞行的艾尔达兽相似，如果你未通过相位融合与艾尔达兽训练师合体，那么你会在你的回合结束时落到地面上，不过你可以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.qm7xptMSozAinnPS]{制止坠落}。

Your scarf allows you to glide through the air. As a single action, which has the move trait, you move 5 feet toward the ground and up to 25 feet through the air. Like flying eldamon, you land on the ground at the end of your turn if you aren't combined with your eldamon trainer through Melded Phase, though you can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.qm7xptMSozAinnPS]{Arrest the Fall}.

Elemental Fortitude.name: 元素坚韧 Elemental Fortitude
Elemental Fortitude.description:
你的身体与体内的长生魔谐和，使你变得更为强韧。你的强韧豁免的熟练度等级提升至大师。当你在强韧豁免上掷骰获得成功时，你改为获得大成功。

Your body is in tune with the eldamon within, causing you to grow hardy. Your proficiency rank for Fortitude saves increases to master. When you roll a success on a Fortitude save, you get a critical success instead.

Earth Element.name: 大地元素 Earth Element
Earth Element.description:
大地元素代表岩石与石头的力量与耐久。因此，其力量往往射程较短，但侧重于让使用者承受各种攻击并取得上风。

关联伤害类型：钝击

关联特性：大地

其他能力

如果你的元素是大地，你会从元素涌动动作（第70页）、元素护盾动作（第57页）以及随元素而变化的元素化身专长中获得以下能力与效果。

元素移动你可以攀爬岩石、石头与泥土表面。你获得一个攀爬速度，等于你陆地速度的一半，你可以在任何岩石或泥土表面上使用该攀爬速度。

元素操控当你使用元素操控时，你可以移动石头与泥土物体，或以轻微方式翻动大地，使你能够翻耕土壤、拖拽一个最高8负载的石质物体至多15英尺，等等。在GM裁量下，你可以对大地或岩石进行其他小幅调整。

元素抗力你身体与大地的连接使你只要站在坚实地面上就能抗拒移动。只要你站在坚实表面上，你在对抗试图推撞或绊摔你的尝试时，你的强韧或反射DC获得+2环境加值。该加值也适用于对抗试图让你倒地的法术或效果的豁免。此外，若在你站在坚实表面上时任何效果会强迫你移动10英尺或更多，你只会被移动一半距离。若你拥有强化抗力专长，该环境加值提升至+4。

元素塑形师当你使用元素塑形师专长时，你可以将松散泥土塑造成所需形状。一次使用元素塑形师无法创造出足以承受外力的坚固造物，也无法达到可凭美学价值出售的艺术水准，不过在长时间内反复运用，或许能让你使用元素塑形师来制作某件物品。泥土雕塑必须小到能放入一个10英尺×10英尺的方格内或更小，并且你可以塑形至多20英尺外的泥土。在GM裁量下，你可以对大地的形状或位置进行其他类似调整。

元素感官你可以通过震动感知同一表面上与其接触的其他事物。你获得颤动感知，作为一种模糊感官，距离30英尺。

元素护盾在使用元素护盾后，你第一次受到物理伤害时，若该伤害不是精金，将伤害减少你等级的一半（最低1）。

元素涌动你获得等同于你等级一半（最低1）的抗力，以对抗物理伤害（精金除外），持续1轮。

强化移动你可以掘入大地。你获得一个掘地速度，等于你陆地速度的一半或20英尺，取较小者。你可以用该掘地速度在松软泥土中掘进，但不能穿过坚硬岩石，如同掘地速度的常规限制。

The element of earth represents the strength and endurance of rock and stone. Thus, its powers tend to have a shorter range but focus on allowing their user to endure various attacks and come out on top.

Associated Damage Type: Bludgeoning

Associated Traits: Earth

Other Abilities

If your element is earth, you gain the following abilities and effects from the Elemental Surge action (page 70), the Elemental Shield action (page 57), and the elemental avatar feats that vary by element.

Elemental Locomotion You can climb up rock, stone, and earthen surfaces. You gain a climb Speed equal to half your land Speed, which you can use on any rock or earthen surface.

Elemental Manipulation When you use Elemental Manipulation, you can move stone and earthen objects, or churn through earth in minor ways, allowing you to till soil, drag a stone object of up to 8 Bulk up to 15 feet, and so on. At your GM’s discretion, you can make other small adjustments to earth or rock.

Elemental Resistance Your body’s connection to the earth allows you to resist movement as long as you’re standing on solid ground. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Fortitude or Reflex DC against attempts to Shove or Trip you as long as you are standing on a solid surface. This bonus also applies to saving throws against spells or effects that attempt to knock you prone. In addition, if any effect would force you to move 10 feet or more while you’re standing on a solid surface, you are moved only half the distance. If you have the Enhanced Resistance feat, the circumstance bonus increases to +4.

Elemental Sculptor When you use the Elemental Sculptor feat, you can shape and sculpt loose earth into a desired shape. A single use of Elemental Sculptor doesn’t create something solid enough to stand up to force or artistic enough to sell off aesthetic merit, though repeated application over a long period of time might allow you to Craft something using Elemental Sculptor. The earthen sculpture must be small enough to fit in a single 10-foot by 10-foot square or less, and you can sculpt earth up to 20 feet away. At the GM’s discretion, you can make other similar adjustments to earth’s shape or position.

Elemental Senses You can sense anything else in contact with the same surface via tremors. You gain tremorsense as an imprecise sense out to 30 feet.

Elemental Shield The first time you take physical damage after using Elemental Shield, if the damage isn’t adamantine, reduce the damage by half your level (minimum 1).

Elemental Surge You gain resistance equal to half your level (minimum 1) to physical damage (except adamantine) for 1 round.

Enhanced Locomotion You can burrow into the earth. You gain a burrow Speed equal to half your land Speed or 20 feet, whichever is less. You can use this burrow Speed to burrow through soft earth but not solid rock, as normal for a burrow Speed.

Spiked Carapace.name: 尖刺甲壳 Spiked Carapace
Spiked Carapace.description:
你的甲壳覆盖着尖刺。用近战徒手打击或非触及的近战打击命中你的生物会承受 @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))[piercing]] 伤害，数值等于你等级的一半（最低 1），并且需要进行一次以你的力量 DC 为目标的 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。

Your carapace is covered in spikes. A creature that hits you with a melee unarmed Strike or a non-reach melee Strike takes @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))[piercing]] damage equal to half your level (minimum 1), with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save against your power DC.

Tentacles of Water.name: 水之触手 Tentacles of Water
Tentacles of Water.description:
你可以将你的水力量的动力变形为卷须，转而扰乱敌人的姿态。若你的水力量将会将一名敌人移动至少10英尺，你可以选择不移动该敌人，改为使其获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}，直到你下个回合开始。若你的水力量将会将其移动至少20英尺且你选择不移动其，则其直到你下个回合结束都处于off-guard；若将会将其移动至少40英尺且你选择不移动其，则其处于off-guard持续2轮。

You can transform the motive force of your water powers into tendrils that throw off your foes' stance instead. If your water power would move a foe at least 10 feet, you can choose not to move the foe and instead make them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the beginning of your next turn. If your water power would move them at least 20 feet and you choose not to move them, they become off-guard until the end of your next turn, and if it would move them at least 40 feet and you choose not to move them, they become off-guard for 2 rounds.

Moment of Contemplation.name: 沉思时刻 Moment of Contemplation
Moment of Contemplation.description:
当你在战斗中停下来片刻沉思时，你的心智防御会增强。在一次战斗遭遇中，当你在你的回合使用刷新力量或一次涌动，且未使用主动力量时，你在下个回合开始前获得+2状态加值至意志豁免。若你使用Mind Palace，则改为获得+4状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.ObbcWR5zFNTqWgtD]{效果：沉思片刻}

When you pause for a moment to contemplate during a battle, your mental defenses increase. During a combat encounter, when you use a refresh power or a surge on your turn and don't use an active power, you gain a +2 status bonus to Will saves until your next turn. If you use Mind Palace, you gain a +4 status bonus instead.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.ObbcWR5zFNTqWgtD]{Effect: Moment of Contemplation}

Parchment Furling.name: 羊皮纸卷褶 Parchment Furling
Parchment Furling.description:
你可以像羊皮纸一样卷起和展开你的身体，让你能轻松抓住多个物体或生物并延长你的触及。通过展开自身并延伸，你的脚的触及增加到20尺（已反映在其数据中）。此外，你的六片翅膀和你的主躯干各自都可以擒抱一名中型或更小的生物，你 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple}，不过如果你没有至少两片翅膀空闲，你就无法飞行。只要你至少有一片翅膀或你的身体空闲，你就可以用它们来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.3yoajuKjwHZ9ApUY]{Grab an Edge}。这并不会让你同时擒抱多于一个生物，只是让你能比平常抓住更多生物。

You can furl and unfurl your body like parchment, allowing you to grab onto multiple objects or creatures with ease and extending your reach. By unfurling itself and extending, your foot's reach increases to 20 feet (already reflected in its statistics). Additionally, your six wings and your main body can each hold a Medium or smaller creature you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple}, though if you don't have at least two wings free, you can't Fly. As long as you have at least one wing or your body free, you can use them to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.3yoajuKjwHZ9ApUY]{Grab an Edge}. This doesn't allow you to Grapple more than a single creature at once, only to hold onto more creatures than normal.

Mantle of Darkness.name: 黑暗斗篷 Mantle of Darkness
Mantle of Darkness.description:
你的皱领变形为一件旋涡般阴影的披风，当你不移动时（例如在狭窄处保持静止时），它会在你周围沉降。你可以在没有掩蔽或隐蔽的情况下进行躲藏（但不能 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行}），并且如果你在 1 轮内不行动（或在一次战斗遭遇中约 6 秒），你会被黑暗的披风所 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，直到你移动或做出显著的动作。

Your ruff transformed into a mantle of swirling shadows that settle around you when you aren't moving, such as when holding still in a narrow place. You can Hide (though not @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak}) without cover or concealment, and if you don't act for 1 round (or about 6 seconds out of a combat encounter), you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} by the mantle of darkness until you move or make a significant motion.

Raging Cycle.name: 狂怒循环 Raging Cycle
Raging Cycle.description:
你的力量与防御会随潮汐起伏。在使用一次高潮力量后，你的 AC 在 1 轮内承受 –1 减值。在使用一次低潮力量后，你的 AC 在 1 轮内获得 +1 状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.P8x7JPyttwN2tgsz]{效果：狂怒循环}

当使用高潮水力量时，你的伤害掷骰获得 +2 状态加值。若你在力量 DC 上为专家，则该加值提高至 +3；若为大师，则提高至 +4；若为传奇，则提高至 +5。

Your power and defenses fluctuate with the tides. After using a high tide power, you take a –1 penalty to your AC for 1 round. After using a low tide power, you gain a +1 status bonus to AC for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.P8x7JPyttwN2tgsz]{Effect: Raging Cycle}

When using a high tide water power, you gain a +2 status bonus to damage rolls. This increases to +3 if you're an expert in power DCs, +4 if you're a master in power DCs, and +5 if you're legendary in power DCs.

Handy Eyes.name: 灵巧之眼 Handy Eyes
Handy Eyes.description:
你那被黑暗魔法灌注的双眼揭示其他@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐藏}的生物，帮助你伏击它们。你持续获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]{看见不可见}法术的效果。

Your dark magic-imbued eyes reveal other @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} creatures, helping you ambush them. You constantly gain the effects of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]{See the Unseen} spell.

Elemental Powers (9th).name: 元素力量（9环） Elemental Powers (9th)
Elemental Powers (9th).description:
你学会一个额外的元素力量，且其必须为你的等级或更低。

You learn one additional elemental power, which must be of your level or lower.

Paper Folding.name: 折纸 Paper Folding
Paper Folding.description:
你可以折叠自己，以便轻松穿过狭窄的区域。你可以穿过狭窄的空间，就好像你的体型小了两级（如果你是中型或更小，你视为微型生物；如果你是大型，你视为小型生物；如果你是超大型，你视为中型生物；如果你是巨型，你视为大型生物）。

You can fold yourself in order to easily fit through narrow areas. You can fit through narrow spaces as if you were two sizes smaller (a Tiny creature if you're Medium or smaller, a Small creature if you're Large, a Medium creature if you're Huge, and a Large creature if you're Gargantuan).

Elemental Duality.name: 元素二元性 Elemental Duality
Elemental Duality.description:
你将多条元素力量的路径刻入你的生命力、心智、身体与灵魂，使你能够在两组力量之间进行选择。每当你准备你的元素力量时，准备两组力量而非一组，但在任何时候你只能使用其中一组。在一次遭遇中你的第一个回合开始时，以及每当你刷新时，选择两组力量中的哪一组对你可用。你只能使用你所选择那一组中的力量。

You etch multiple paths of elemental power into your life force, mind, body, and soul, allowing you to choose between two sets of powers. Whenever you prepare your elemental powers, prepare two sets of powers instead of one, though only one is available to you at a time. At the beginning of your first turn in an encounter, and whenever you refresh, choose which of the two sets of powers are available to you. You can only use powers from the set you chose.

Gecko Tongue.name: 壁虎舌头 Gecko Tongue
Gecko Tongue.description:
你的舌头特别长，具有10尺的触及。你可以用舌头从远处进行有限的操作动作，这些动作不需要手指或显著的手部敏捷（例如开门），或用来对一个生物进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{擒抱}。

Your tongue is especially long, with a reach of 10 feet. You can use your tongue to make limited manipulate actions from a distance that don't require fingers or significant manual dexterity (such as opening a door) or to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple} a creature.

Shadow Dance.name: 暗影之舞 Shadow Dance
Shadow Dance.description:
你在阴影的边缘迅捷而优雅地舞动。当你在昏暗光照或黑暗的区域中开始你的移动时，你的各项速度获得+10尺状态加值，并且当你处于昏暗光照的阴影中时，你无视困难地形。

You dance swiftly and gracefully on the edge of shadows. You gain a +10-foot status bonus to your Speeds when you start your movement in an area of dim light or darkness, and while in the shadows of dim light, you ignore difficult terrain.

Power of Three.name: 三重力量 Power of Three
Power of Three.description:
当你收割木元素能量时，你会将你的愤怒三重降临于你的敌人身上。当你以造成伤害的力量进行收割时，你对其方格中有被收割植物的生物造成的该力量伤害获得+2状态加值。若你在力量DC上为专家，此加值提高至+4；若你在力量DC上为大师，则提高至+5；若你在力量DC上为传奇，则提高至+6。

When you harvest wood elemental energy, you bring down your wrath on your foes threefold. When you harvest with a damaging power, you gain a +2 status bonus to the power's damage against creatures with a harvested plant in their square. This increases to +4 if you're an expert in power DC, +5 if you're a master in power DC, and +6 if you're legendary in power DC.

Harvest Celebration.name: 丰收庆典 Harvest Celebration
Harvest Celebration.description:
每当你收获时，你会庆祝木之能量在你体内奔流。在使用一个力量并选择进行收获后，如果你至少收获了一株植物，你在1轮内对察觉检定、技能检定以及豁免获得+1状态加值。若你在力量DC上为传奇，则你改为对察觉检定、技能检定以及豁免获得+2状态加值。

Whenever you harvest, you celebrate as the wood energy courses through you. After using a power and choosing to harvest, if you harvested at least one plant, you gain a +1 status bonus to Perception checks, skill checks, and saving throws for 1 round. If you're legendary in power DCs, you instead gain a +2 status bonus to Perception checks, skill checks, and saving throws.

Air Antennae.name: 空气触角 Air Antennae
Air Antennae.description:
你的触角赋予你从远处嗅闻事物的能力。你获得嗅觉作为一种模糊感官，范围为60尺。与嗅觉的常规规则相同，其范围会根据气味来源是在上风处还是下风处而调整。

Your antennae provide you the ability to smell things from a distance. You gain scent as an imprecise sense out to 60 feet. As normal for scent, this is adjusted based on if the source of the smell is upwind or downwind.

Focused Training: Brawny Eldamon.name: 专注训练：魁伟的艾达蒙 Focused Training: Brawny Eldamon
Focused Training: Brawny Eldamon.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.YiWDPrJu3OAFrnTI]{专注训练} 授予

你训练你的艾达兽伙伴，以拓宽它们在各种技能上的能力。对于你的每一位艾达兽伙伴，为其选择成为强壮、窃盗、摄心、灵巧、自给自足、潜行或骇人之一。如果你的艾达兽已经拥有你所选择的专注训练所关联的技能，则你的艾达兽改为获得另一个专注训练所关联的一项技能作为艾达兽技能。与它们其他的艾达兽技能一样，你的艾达兽在通过专注训练获得的技能上变为受训，并且该技能在第5等级提升为专家，随后在第11等级提升为大师。

  • 强壮：你的艾达兽相较于同类尤为强壮。它获得运动作为一项艾达兽技能，以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.KxaYlC50zzHysJj8]{泰坦摔跤手} 技能专长。

注：将此特性放置到你的艾达兽角色上

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.YiWDPrJu3OAFrnTI]{Focused Training}

You train your eldamon friends to broaden their capacity for various skills. For each of your eldamon friends, choose for them to become brawny, burglarious, enthralling, nimble, self-sufficient, sneaky, or terrifying. If your eldamon already has the skill associated with the focused training you chose, your eldamon gains one of the skills associated with another focused training as an eldamon skill instead. Like their other eldamon skills, your eldamon become trained in the skill gained from focused training, and the skill increases to expert at 5th level and then to master at 11th level.

  • Brawny: Your eldamon is particularly brawny compared to others of their type. They gain Athletics as an eldamon skill and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.KxaYlC50zzHysJj8]{Titan Wrestler} skill feat.

Note: Place this feature on your Eldamon actors

Eldamon Evolution.name: 艾达蒙进化 Eldamon Evolution
Eldamon Evolution.description:
你在训练你的eldamon方面取得了重大突破，使你能够帮助它们进化。每个eldamon都有进化状态，而如果你满足它们，eldamon就会获得一种新的进化后战斗形态。该进化形态会获得更高的熟练度、对eldamon三项最高属性的属性提升，以及一种新的特殊能力。

你的eldamon也会在第11等级获得数项其他熟练度与能力，即使你没有这个职业特性，它也会如此。

通过与你的eldamon一同努力，你也开始理解自己的极限。这使你能够每天准备五只相位五eldamon，而不是四只，只要你的关键属性调整值至少为+5。

You've hit a major breakthrough in training your eldamon, allowing you to help them evolve. Each eldamon has evolution conditions, and if you meet them, the eldamon gains a new evolved battle form. This evolved form gains increased proficiencies, an attribute boost to the eldamon's three highest attributes, and a new special ability.

Your eldamon also gain several other proficiencies and abilities at 11th level, although it does so even if you don't have this class feature.

By working hard with your eldamon, you have come to understand your own limits as well. This allows you to prepare to phase five eldamon each day, instead of four, as long as your key attribute modifier is at least +5.

Force Element.name: 力元素 Force Element
Force Element.description:
力元素体现了一种神秘的形而上力量，即使在远处也能移动或轰击事物。因此，它专注于能在战场上移动其他生物的力量，利用站位来打乱你的敌人的节奏。

关联伤害类型：力场

关联特征：力场

其他能力

如果你的元素是力，你将从元素涌动动作、元素护盾动作，以及随元素而变化的元素化身专长中，获得以下能力与效果。

元素机动你运用对力的力量以单动作穿行于空中，该动作具有移动（特征）。只要你从坚固表面开始，你就能沿任意方向（甚至垂直）作直线移动，距离至多等于你的陆地速度。若你在某处结束此次移动而该处无法支撑你的重量（例如在半空中），你可以在坠落前再做一个不具有移动（特征）的单一额外动作，或使用一个单一力场力量。

元素操控当你使用元素操控时，你可以用力移动一个负载为1或更低且在20尺内的物体，使其移动至多20尺。这仅会将物体从一处移动到另一处，不会执行操纵或交互动作或类似行为。

元素抗力你的身体逐渐适应超自然的力。你在对抗力场效果的豁免检定上获得+1环境加值，并获得等同于你等级一半的力场伤害抗力。若你拥有强化抗力专长，你在对抗力场效果的豁免检定上的环境加值提高至+2。

元素塑形师当你使用元素塑形师专长时，你可以塑造力以移动一个物体：该物体负载至多40，移动距离至多20尺，且其占据的空间不大于10尺×10尺×10尺，并且该物体在你20尺内。这仅会将物体从一处移动到另一处，不会执行操纵或交互动作或类似行为。

元素感官你投射一片力场传感器场域以侦测附近的移动。你获得动觉感知，作为一种模糊感官，范围至多30尺。

元素护盾若敌人之所以未命中其近战攻击仅仅是因为元素护盾给予AC的环境加值，则护盾之力会短暂扰乱该敌人的防御，使其在你下个回合结束前对下一次针对其进行的攻击变为措手不及。

元素涌动你可以使所选生物重新定位5尺，除非其在对抗你的力量DC的强韧豁免中成功。

强化机动你能如此轻易地以力推进自己，以至于几乎等同于飞行。你获得等同于你的陆地速度的飞行速度，但以此方式飞行时，你不能使用元素机动中的单动作来以力推进自己。

The element of force embodies a mystical metaphysical force that can move or blast things even at a distance. Thus, it focuses on powers that move other creatures around the battlefield, taking advantage of positioning to throw off your foes' rhythm.

Associated Damage Type: Force

Associated Traits: Force

Other Abilities

If your element is force, you gain the following abilities and effects from the Elemental Surge action, the Elemental Shield action, and the elemental avatar feats that vary by element.

Elemental Locomotion You use your power over force to move yourself through the air, as a single action, which has the move trait. This allows you to move in a straight line in any direction (even vertically), at a distance out to your land Speed, as long as you start on a solid surface. If you end the movement somewhere that can't support your weight, such as in mid-air, you can take a single additional action that doesn't have the move trait or use a single force power, before falling.

Elemental Manipulation When you use Elemental Manipulation, you can use force to move an object of 1 Bulk or less and within 20 feet up to 20 feet. This just moves an object from one place to another, it doesn't perform manipulate or Interact actions or the like.

Elemental Resistance Your body becomes accustomed to supernatural force. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on saving throws against force effects and gain resistance equal to half your level against force damage. If you have the Enhanced Resistance feat, your circumstance bonus on saving throws against force effects increases to +2.

Elemental Sculptor When you use the Elemental Sculptor feat, you can sculpt force in order to move an object up to 40 Bulk up to 20 feet away and taking up no larger than a 10-foot by 10-foot by 10-foot space up to 20 feet. This just moves an object from one place to another, it doesn't perform manipulate or Interact actions or the like.

Elemental Senses You project a field of force sensors to detect nearby movement. You gain motionsense as an imprecise sense out to 30 feet.

Elemental Shield If a foe misses their melee attack only because of the Elemental Shield's circumstance bonus to AC, the shield's forces disrupt the foe's defenses momentarily, and they become off-guard against the next attack made against them before the end of your next turn.

Elemental Surge You can reposition the chosen creature 5 feet unless they succeed at a Fortitude save against your power DC.

Enhanced Locomotion You can propel yourself with force so easily that you might as well be flying. You gain a fly Speed equal to your land Speed, but while flying in this way, you can't use the single action from elemental locomotion to propel yourself with force.

Shadow Flight.name: 暗影飞行 Shadow Flight
Shadow Flight.description:
你的身体下半部分逐渐隐没于阴影之中，使你得以翱翔。你获得等同于你速度的飞行速度，而你那扭曲的阴影之躯使你在进行用于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}的特技检定时获得+1环境加值。

The bottom of your body trails away into shadows, allowing you to soar. You gain a fly Speed equal to your Speed, and your body of twisting shadow gives you a +1 circumstance bonus to Acrobatics checks made to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}.

Sixfold Spiked Legs.name: 六重尖刺腿 Sixfold Spiked Legs
Sixfold Spiked Legs.description:
你获得第三对长满尖刺的腿。你的陆地速度提升至30英尺，并且当你穿过一名敌人的空间时（通常是因为你的体型比对方大三级，或你翻滚穿越他们的空间），他们会受到 @Damage[1d8[piercing]] 伤害。无论你在该空间中移动多少次，一名生物每轮只能承受一次该穿刺伤害。你的舌头的触及增加到20英尺。

You gain a third pair of legs that are covered with spikes. Your land Speed increases to 30 feet, and when you move through a foe's space (usually either because you are three sizes larger or you Tumbled Through their space), they take @Damage[1d8[piercing]] damage. A creature only takes this piercing damage once per round, no matter how many times you move through this space. Your tongue's reach increases to 20 feet.

Air Unleashed.name: 空气释放 Air Unleashed
Air Unleashed.description:
空气的解放力量使你能够以不受限制的机动性移动。向上飞行对你而言不算困难地形，而且你不必在回合结束时下降到地面，即使你未与使用融合相位的eldamon训练师结合也是如此。

The unleashed power of air allows you to move with unrestricted mobility. Flying upward isn't difficult terrain to you, and you don't have to end the turn by descending to the ground, even if you aren't combined with an eldamon trainer using Melded Phase.

Air Wings.name: 空气之翼 Air Wings
Air Wings.description:
你的翅膀完全由空气构成，使你在飞行时比大多数其他生物拥有显著更高的机动性。你在进行特技检定以执行飞行机动和制止坠落时，获得+2环境加值。

Your wings are formed entirely out of air, providing you significantly greater maneuverability in flight than most other creatures. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Acrobatics checks to Maneuver in Flight and Arrest a Fall.
